programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Steve Irwins family at Australia Zoo. After months of training with Steves best friend Wes, son Robert is ready to solo feed Graham, the zoos most notorious crocodile

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Tia races to save the life of a dog that has been shot. Matt and Lizzy scramble to rescue a scared and sick puppy running loose on the busy roads near the warehouse

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Behaviourist Jackson Galaxy helps a family whose once-cuddly kitten has matured into a demonic feline, as well as a couple whose pet resents the arrival of a new cat

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: A couple are concerned about starting a family because of their cats aggressive behaviour, and two friends struggle to cope with a yowling, troublesome feline

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Dove hunting season begins in Texas, while in Beaumont, road hunters get an early start on deer season during a decoy sting

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: A dog with a shattered leg and seven bad-tempered chickens arrive at the clinic. The team unites when a tiny kitten is found unconscious at a construction site

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete Nelson travels to Germany in search of a range of different treetop homes, hooking up with his friend and former student Christopher Richter, and meeting Andreas Richter, who has a modern treehouse that sets him apart from the rest

programme.title: 100 Days Wild
programme.desc: A disastrous fish haul threatens the colonys food supply. Adam sets off down river alone, and tensions between Oliver and the group reach boiling point

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: As autumn arrives, the Kilchers race to finish their preparations for winter. Meanwhile, Elvin uses a samurai sword to prepare a Thanksgiving dinner

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: A medical emergency on the Wolfpacks ranch forces them to be more resourceful. And, Gabes family are concerned when he makes a hasty leap towards marriage.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters
programme.sub-title: The Silver Giant of Boone County
programme.desc: The team members look for a bear-like creature known as the Silver Giant in Boone County, and build their largest trap ever. Along the way they also learn about other beasts too

programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Steve Irwins family at Australia Zoo. After months of training with Steves best friend Wes, son Robert is ready to solo feed Graham, the zoos most notorious crocodile

programme.title: Richard E Grants Seven Deadly Sins
programme.desc: Actor Richard E Grant explores the origins of the seven cardinal sins, examining the dramatic effect they have. He begins with the evolutionary roots of wrath, learning that, like humans, animals also experience the sensation. Cutting-edge wildlife footage is used to illustrate his points as wrathful hippopotamuses take centre stage

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: An owner puts his badly behaved cat in kitty jail, and a problem feline leaves bowel movements and shredded furniture in its wake

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: A dark spirit menaces a womans tranquil home, and she worries that it may be a deceased relative who was a master of the occult

programme.title: Million Dollar Duck
programme.desc: The weird world of the Federal Duck Stamp Contest, in which artists paint waterfowl in their obsessive quests to win what has been described as the Olympics of wildlife art

programme.title: Romancing the Stone: The Golden Ages of British Sculpture
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke examines sculpture in the 20th century, an era of innovation, scandal and creativity. He examines the artistic revolution spearheaded by Eric Gill and Jacob Epstein, which paved the way for the work of Gilbert and George and Damien Hirst. He also explores the art forms rise in popularity, from First World War memorials to the landmark work of Antony Gormley and Rachel Whiteread

programme.title: Canals: The Making of a Nation
programme.desc: Liz McIvor recounts the story of canal mania - a boom period of frenzied activity that helped develop Britains modern financial economy, now centred in London. The new canal capitalists made money by investing and speculating in waterways used to carry fuel and goods around the country. However, not all canals were profitable and investors soon discovered that such a venture created losers as well as winners

programme.title: Canal Walks with Julia Bradbury
programme.desc: The presenter embarks on an eight-mile trip along the Caledonian Canal, the waterway that cuts through beautiful Scottish mountain country and is regarded as one of the most ambitious canals of its time. Its engineer, Thomas Telford, intended not only to create an engineering marvel, but also provide badly needed jobs and wealth for the Highlands

programme.title: The Normans
programme.desc: Professor Robert Bartlett travels from Britain to Jerusalem via Sicily, examining the expansion and unchecked ambition of the Norman empire, and how its impact still resonates in todays culture and politics. He discovers how, under the leadership of Scandinavian raider Rollo, these descendants of the Vikings first established themselves in northern France and became an unstoppable force of Christian knights and warriors

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jayne Middlemiss presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on May 14, 1999. Featuring 911, Bryan Adams, Whitney Houston, Fierce, Kula Shaker, Pete Heller, Stereophonics and Backstreet Boys

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Scott Mills presents the pop chart programme, first broacast on May 21, 1999. Featuring Shania Twain, Geri Halliwell, Super Furry Animals, Skunk Anansie, Powerhouse featuring Duane Harden, 1000 Clowns, Happy Mondays and Boyzone

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Noel Edmonds presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on March 2, 1978. Featuring performances by Darts, Kate Bush, Nick Lowe, Andy Williams, Samantha Sang, Rita Coolidge, the Tom Robinson Band and Abba

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jakki Brambles presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on February 28, 1991. Featuring performances by N-Joi, Massive Attack, Jesus Jones, Free, the Clash, the Source featuring Candi Staton, Madonna and the Simpsons

programme.title: Simon and Garfunkel: The Concert in Central Park
programme.desc: The duos 1981 reunion concert in New York City, performing favourites including The Sound of Silence, The Boxer, Mrs Robinson, Homeward Bound and Bridge Over Troubled Water, as well as songs from Simons solo career

programme.title: Simon and Garfunkel: The Harmony Game
programme.desc: The story of Simon and Garfunkels 1970 album Bridge Over Troubled Water, which was made during a particularly creative period in the duos career, but turned out to be their final studio LP. The film covers all aspects of the records creation, from technical breakthroughs to the emotional feelings the artists had for each other, and features interviews with Paul Simon, Art Garfunkel and their collaborators, including manager Mort Lewis and drummer Hal Blaine

programme.title: Sounds of the Sixties
programme.desc: A look through the BBC archives, featuring folk performances by artists including Pete Seeger, Tim Buckley, Joan Baez, Bob Dylan and Leonard Cohen. First broadcast 26 October 1991

programme.title: Peter, Paul and Mary: Rhythm on Two
programme.desc: Part one. A concert given by the well known American folk trio during their 1980s visit to the United Kingdom, recorded on location at the Southport Theatre. First broadcast 28 September 1983

programme.title: Peter, Paul and Mary: Rhythm on Two
programme.desc: The second part of the concert performed by the American folk trio, recorded at the Southport Theatre. First broadcast 26 November 1983

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jayne Middlemiss presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on May 14, 1999. Featuring 911, Bryan Adams, Whitney Houston, Fierce, Kula Shaker, Pete Heller, Stereophonics and Backstreet Boys

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Scott Mills presents the pop chart programme, first broacast on May 21, 1999. Featuring Shania Twain, Geri Halliwell, Super Furry Animals, Skunk Anansie, Powerhouse featuring Duane Harden, 1000 Clowns, Happy Mondays and Boyzone

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Noel Edmonds presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on March 2, 1978. Featuring performances by Darts, Kate Bush, Nick Lowe, Andy Williams, Samantha Sang, Rita Coolidge, the Tom Robinson Band and Abba

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jakki Brambles presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on February 28, 1991. Featuring performances by N-Joi, Massive Attack, Jesus Jones, Free, the Clash, the Source featuring Candi Staton, Madonna and the Simpsons

programme.title: Design Classics
programme.desc: A look at the map of the London Underground railway network, originally created in 1931 by graphics revolutionary Harry Beck

programme.title: The Good Old Days
programme.desc: Leonard Sachs hosts a 1976 edition of old-time music hall programme from the Leeds City Varieties. Artists Taking to the stage are Les Dawson, Peggy Mount, Larry Parker, Jeannie Harris, Chantal and Dumont, Albert Aldred and members of the Players Theatre London, and there is a performance from the Jan Madd Magic Show

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: The sleuthing housewife investigates a spiritualist who appears to be blackmailing her customers, while Geoffrey falls in love, but his secret romance threatens to undermine Hettys carefully laid trap - and nearly causes him to quit the agency

programme.title: The Turkish Detective
programme.desc: A serial killer appears to be targeting rubbish collectors in a poverty-stricken neighbourhood of Istanbul. With Ikmen on leave looking after his new baby, Ayse leads the investigation instead, and Suleyman finally entrusts her with the secret shes suspected for so long

programme.title: The Turkish Detective
programme.desc: With his family still growing, Ikmen decides its time to mature a bit and seek promotion. Suleyman goes undercover as a rubbish collector to try to find the serial killer before they strike again, while Ayse turns to an unlikely old acquaintance for help

programme.title: Brief History of a Family (2024)
programme.desc: Enigmatic 15-year-old Yan Shuo is injured in an accident caused by Tu Wei, a classmate from an affluent family. Wei invites Shuo to his house, where he impresses the Tu family and begins to feel at home. Psychological thriller, starring Keyu Guo. In Mandarin

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth visits a stately home, where she naturally tries her hardest to meet the lord of the manor - only to be thwarted by the untimely arrival of Onslow and Daisy. Suburban comedy, starring Patricia Routledge, Clive Swift and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: Sorry!
programme.desc: Timothy Lumsden meets Annette at his amateur dramatics society, but all his attempts to court her are ruined by his overbearing and tyrannical mother. First episode of the comedy, starring Ronnie Corbett and Barbara Lott

programme.title: The Good Old Days
programme.desc: Leonard Sachs hosts a 1976 edition of old-time music hall programme from the Leeds City Varieties. Artists Taking to the stage are Les Dawson, Peggy Mount, Larry Parker, Jeannie Harris, Chantal and Dumont, Albert Aldred and members of the Players Theatre London, and there is a performance from the Jan Madd Magic Show

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: The sleuthing housewife investigates a spiritualist who appears to be blackmailing her customers, while Geoffrey falls in love, but his secret romance threatens to undermine Hettys carefully laid trap - and nearly causes him to quit the agency

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: Julian Richards investigates the discovery of a human jawbone in a farmers field in Cheshire, which led to the unearthing of a 12th-century chapel and the remains of medieval landowners. As archaeologists piece together the clues, Julian is able to present a Hampshire teacher with an image of his ancestors

programme.title: Newscast
programme.desc: A panel of BBC journalists hosts a weekly round-up from Westminster, delivering the usual mix of serious analysis and light-hearted gossip about the biggest stories in politics

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: Jade Thirlwall bravely hands over her phone for an ambitious Send to All with a twist, and Love island star Tasha Ghouri helps surprise an inspirational Unexpected Star of the Show as the theatre is transformed into a train station. With music from Jack Savoretti

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and Holly Hamilton present the weekday magazine show featuring a mixture of topical discussion and expert advice for viewers

programme.title: Crimewatch Live
programme.desc: An appeal for information on the stabbing of Paul McGrath. Plus, the tragic killing of 15-year-old Elianne Andam, who was murdered after a row over a teddy bear

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Tommy Walsh and Dion Dublin assess two properties changing ownership in Lancashire and another in Somerset. They then meet the new owners, who outline their plans for their aquisitions

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Married couple Emma and Ty, and friends Tammy and Amanda scour the stalls of Shepton Mallet antiques fair in Somerset for valuable items to sell at auction

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather

Liverpool have comfortably overcome Barnsley and Brighton and Hove Albion so far and are among the favourites to win the trophy they last lifted in 2022

She follows that up with Bombay spiced roast potatoes, with sticky tamarind coating, and chicken smothered in yoghurt marinade, coated in Nadiyas essential spices. To finish, she serves up coconut and fennel-fragranced Bundt cake topped with a coconut fudge layer

programme.title: Live Six Nations Rugby Union
programme.desc: Scotland v France (Kick-off 2.10pm). Gabby Logan presents coverage of the both teams fourth and penultimate match of the championship, held at Scottish Gas Murrayfield. France secured the title with a 35-16 victory over Scotland at Stade de France last year and also won 20-16 at this venue in 2024. However, the Scots prevailed 31-20 in their only other home match of this campaign and that contest will give them high hopes of another strong display this afternoon. With analysis from John Barclay, Martin Johnson and Benjamin Kayser, and commentary by Andrew Cotter, Chris Paterson and Sam Warburton

programme.title: Asia
programme.desc: Animals that live in Asias deserts and dry grasslands, including the Gobi bear, one of the rarest animals on Earth who communicate by leaving their scent on ancient trees. The Thar in India is the most densely populated desert in the world, and a place where Demoiselle cranes migrate thousands of miles to reach, being welcomed with grain put out by the local Jain community

programme.title: Match of the Day Live: The FA Cup
programme.desc: Wrexham v Chelsea (Kick-off 5.45pm). Mark Chapman presents all the action from the fifth-round tie at StoK Racecourse. Wrexham have progressed from the National League to fighting for promotion to the Premier League since being taken over by Rob McElhenney and Ryan Reynolds in 2020, and they have already defeated one top flight team here in this cup run, overcoming Nottingham Forest on penalties in round three. However, Chelsea represent an even tougher test, and they showed no mercy away to Championship opposition in the previous two rounds, defeating both Charlton Athletic and Hull City by four-goal margins. With analysis from Wayne Rooney, Micah Richards and Ben Tozer, and reports from Sarah Mulkerrins

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Bradley and Barney Walsh host the last of the quarter-finals. Over five savage events and the morale-sapping Eliminator, only the fastest and fittest will make it to the next stage of the competition and be in with a chance to claim the ultimate glory. Giant gets the rematch hes been waiting for, Apollo uses his head, and Bradley and Barney meet Legends biggest fan

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Jan answers a call to blood-chilling screams from a woman begging for help for her baby, and Iain struggles to contain his emotions as he rushes to the callers aid to find the child has been crushed. SIobhan is told that charges against Chris Banfield will be dropped, Matty is reluctant to treat a patient with lung cancer alone, and Rida faces losing two staff members

Meanwhile, Maggie tells Garv she wants to start IVF, but he brushes her off, reluctantly agreeing to a rigid sex schedule

programme.title: Blade Runner 2049 (2017)

programme.title: Top Gear

James meets American rally driver Ken Block, and Jeremy tests out the Mercedes SL Black. Comedian Michael McIntyre is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Shooting Joe Exotic
programme.desc: Louis revisits his 2011 documentary Americas Most Dangerous Pets, returning to Oklahoma to explore what has happened since. Joe Exotic, aka Joseph Allen Maldonado-Passage, now resides in a federal prison after being found guilty of a murder-for-hire plot and multiple animal cruelty charges, and having been the subject of hit Netflix documentary Tiger King

programme.title: My Mates a Bad Date
programme.desc: Relationship expert Oloni helps Cardiff-based 20-year-old hopeless romantic Lewis, who is scaring away potential partners by talking wedding plans on the first date

programme.title: Dinosaur
programme.desc: After so many misunderstandings, Nina knows her true feelings and wants to make things right, but a family emergency might stop her from telling Lee the truth

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the days news

programme.title: Spider-Man 2 (2004)
programme.desc: Peter Parker continues his fight for justice, but unrequited love and personal worries take their toll and he is tempted to abandon his web-slinging alter ego. However, the arrival of deadly new bad guy Doctor Octopus plunges him into a race against time to save New York. Comic-book adventure sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Alfred Molina, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Louis Therouxs Forbidden America
programme.desc: The film-maker returns to the US to explore the impact of the internet and social media on some of the most controversial corners of American society. He begins by meeting the new influencers of the far-right who are promoting an ideology that is defiantly racist, misogynistic, homophobic and anti-Semitic, often packaging the most extreme views as irony. Louis attempts to understand their recent surge in popularity and challenges the divisive rhetoric that is being streamed to millions of young viewers online

programme.title: How to Win the Champions League
programme.desc: The first instalment of a three-part look at what it takes to achieve continental success, beginning with Real Madrid becoming European champions for a record-extending 15th time. Former players Clarence Seedorf and Sami Khedira reflect on the clubs evolution, the never-say-die Los Blancos mindset, and the decisive factors that led to a sixth UEFA Champions League triumph in the space of a decade

programme.title: How to Win the Champions League
programme.desc: A look at Liverpools 2019 UEFA Champions League triumph, the sixth time they had become champions of Europe. Key players Andy Robertson and Alisson Becker look back at how they narrowly progressed from a tough group, former director of research Ian Graham discusses the recruitment approach that saw them sign players such as Mo Salah, and journalists Barney Ronay and Melissa Reddy recall the memorable semi-final comeback against Barcelona

programme.title: How to Win the Champions League
programme.desc: A profile of Jose Mourinho, who won the UEFA Champions League with FC Porto and Inter Milan

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Documentary following boxer Tommy Furys return to the ring. Tommy is at his lowest point personally and professionally, living alone in a house that was meant to be his and partner Molly-Maes forever home. His role as a father to baby Bambi brings both joy and pressure as he tries to convince Molly-Mae he is a changed man. After finally getting the medical all-clear to fight again, Tommy and his trainer and father John prepare for his return to the ring against MMA fighter Darren Till. Team Fury travels to the press conference - with John promising to be on his best behaviour

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommy prepares for his first gym appearance since announcing his comeback, but with fighter Darren Till throwing threats and chaos into the mix, trainer John pulls Tommy out of the fight claiming he is unwilling to risk his sons future career. Its a crushing blow for Tommy, whos desperate for momentum and purpose. Amid the pressure, theres a flicker of hope - Tommy and partner Molly-Mae Hague are spotted together on New Years Eve, with a kiss that hints at a brighter future

programme.title: Louis Therouxs Forbidden America
programme.desc: The film-maker returns to the US to explore the impact of the internet and social media on some of the most controversial corners of American society. He begins by meeting the new influencers of the far-right who are promoting an ideology that is defiantly racist, misogynistic, homophobic and anti-Semitic, often packaging the most extreme views as irony. Louis attempts to understand their recent surge in popularity and challenges the divisive rhetoric that is being streamed to millions of young viewers online

Its a crushing blow for Tommy, whos desperate for momentum and purpose. Amid the pressure, theres a flicker of hope - Tommy and partner Molly-Mae Hague are spotted together on New Years Eve, with a kiss that hints at a brighter future

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommys fight for redemption continues, but this time, its a battle for his own mind. Struggling to secure a new opponent, he knows a comeback fight is crucial for his mental health. Meanwhile, Molly-Maes new series trailer drops, pushing Tommy to face his own truths in the toughest interview of his life, where he opens up about his battle with alcohol addiction. Back in training, hope returns as a potential fight looms, leading him and his father John to a career-defining meeting

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommy is hopeful that he could be fighting again soon, and he and Molly-Mae are spending more time together. Then, disaster strikes when KSI cancels the night when Roman was due to be in the fighting, claiming illness. John is furious, but decides the boys need cheering up so tells them he is taking them on a camping trip. However, neither Tommy nor Roman share their fathers love of the outdoors

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Time Lord and the Ponds arrive in a Wild West town where the residents are being terrorised by a cyborg killing machine. The relentless gunslinger will stop at nothing until it has terminated the remaining name on its hit list - and it turns out to be targeting an alien doctor. Matt Smith stars, with Karen Gillan and Arthur Darvill

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Earth is invaded by millions of sinister-looking black cubes, but nobody knows what they are for and who sent them? Reunited with his allies at UNIT, the Doctor is forced to play a waiting game, so moves in with Amy and Rory. But months of living a normal life soon take a toll on his patience. Guest starring Steven Berkoff and Mark Williams, with Jemma Redgrave making her first appearance as UNIT leader Kate Stewart

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, the Wests join the Shipmans for one of Micks famous turkey dinners. Smithy can hardly wait to spend his first yuletide with baby Neil, but fails to realise Dave will be tagging along and playing happy families with Nessa. Meanwhile, Gavin and Stacey make an announcement that does not exactly fill their friends and relatives with joy, and Bryn has a heart-to-heart with Jason. Festive edition of the comedy from 2008, starring Mathew Horne and Joanna Page

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: A hypnotist is booked to provide the entertainment at the triplets baptism - and Agnes soon finds herself under his spell. Meanwhile, the matriarchs kitchen is falling apart - but that turns out to be the least of her problems when son Mark delivers some heartbreaking news. Hit comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll as the foul-mouthed mother-of-six

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Cathy goes to extreme lengths to impress her psychologist boyfriend, much to Agness disgust, while Rory locates the perfect apartment for him and Dino - the problem is, its in Kilbride, meaning hell have to learn to drive. Mark prepares to emigrate to Australia. Hit comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll as the foul-mouthed mother-of-six

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys DMovie (2014)
programme.desc: The indomitable Irish matriarch discovers that a plan is afoot by developers to buy the famous Dublin street market where her family has run a fruit and veg stall for generations. Assembling a band of eccentric allies, she plans to fight back, only to realise her daughter is not interested in taking over the family business. Comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll and Jennifer Gibney

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonnys job-hunting plans are put on hold by a sex-starved cat. Gaz comes face to face with the brother he never knew he had, and Louise chokes on her lunch. Comedy, starring Ralf Little and Will Mellor

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Gaz tries to spice up his sex life with Donna using whipped cream, Janets attempt to quit smoking has an alarming side-effect, and Louise discovers the identity of her secret admirer. Comedy, starring Ralf Little, Will Mellor, Natalie Casey and Sheridan Smith

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny gets more than he bargained for when he begs Janets dad for his blessing to marry his daughter. Donna plans a kinky night in to ensure Gaz and Munch get an eyeful and Louise plays strange love games with David. Comedy, starring Ralf Little and Sheridan Smith

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Munch falls for Donna, Louise has to live with a sordid secret from Davids past and Janet gets caught in a conflict between her two bridesmaids. Comedy, starring Natalie Casey and Lee Oakes

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Gaz lands in hospital when he attempts to avoid Munch, and Jonny tries to persuade Janets father to approve of their marriage and pay for the ceremony - but ends up blackmailing him into agreeing. Sitcom, starring Ralf Little, Will Mellor, Natalie Casey, Kathryn Drysdale and Sheridan Smith

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: The girls go shopping for Janets wedding dress, little suspecting what an epic adventure they are embarking on. Jonny and Gaz decide to set out on a search of their own, and are thrilled to discover an unattended barrel of beer. Comedy, starring Ralf Little and Will Mellor

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey

Smithy can hardly wait to spend his first yuletide with baby Neil, but fails to realise Dave will be tagging along and playing happy families with Nessa. Meanwhile, Gavin and Stacey make an announcement that does not exactly fill their friends and relatives with joy, and Bryn has a heart-to-heart with Jason. Festive edition of the comedy from 2008, starring Mathew Horne and Joanna Page

programme.title: LS Lowry: The Unheard Tapes
programme.desc: An insight into the secretive matchstick men painter as he guides viewers through his revealing life story in unheard interviews from the end of his life. Recorded by a young fan, Angela Barratt, in 1972, the tapes uncover much about Lowrys life story and the changing north he captured in his iconic paintings. Lip-synced by actors Ian McKellen and Annabel Smith.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Bradley and Barney Walsh host the second quarter-final. Four contenders must face five brutal events before going head to head in the legendary Eliminator. Giant climbs back onto Everest, Sabre defends her territory on The Edge, and Apollo launches a rocket in the Gauntlet

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The Scottish chefs serve up their mains and desserts inspired by the British film industry, including venison loin smoked in gunpowder tea inspired by Skyfall and a frangipane custard tart in honour of Brave. Veteran judge Adam Handling helps to decide who deserves to say and who should go home. Presented by Andi Oliver

programme.title: Global Eye
programme.desc: Norberto Paredes reports from Venezuela on the future of its oil sector, asking whether the return of US firms is the answer the country needs. BBC Eyes forensic investigators also uncover the story of last years mass protests in Nepal that toppled the government. With eyewitness accounts, they reveal where the order to use live ammunition came from and how unarmed demonstrators were killed as authorities lost control of the crowds

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Wild Reckoning
programme.desc: Demitchi acts like a mum to her younger sister Felicia, but its coming across as controlling. Bear sets the feuding sisters a blindfold task to show them how to work together, while psychologist Tara Quinn-Cirillo helps them to understand how their conflict might be rooted in their childhood

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: The Battle of the Sports Stars
programme.desc: Sporting legends from past road trips, football pundit Chris Kamara, wheelchair basketball star Ade Adepitan and tennis ace Judy Murray, have their eyes set on antiques glory

programme.title: Clive Myries African Adventure
programme.desc: In Abeokuta, Clive tests his basketball skills on the court with an inspirational coach, before attending the birthday celebrations of a local Gospel singer to see just how Nigerians throw a party. Hell also get hands on to create authentic tie-and-dye Adire clothes and join in with an incredible contemporary dance troupe

programme.title: Clive Myries African Adventure
programme.desc: In Morocco, Clive travels to Marrakesh, known around the world as the Red City for the red clay buildings that line its streets. He meets a Medina chef whose slow roasted lamb, cooked in underground ovens, has had the Royals of approval. In a souk, he masters the art of creating stunning tile mosaics, learns the skills required to make authentic Moroccan rugs, before spending the night in the High Atlas Mountains

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: Nina Wadia presents an appeal on behalf of Breakthrough T1D, a charity funding research to help cure, treat and prevent type 1 diabetes

programme.title: Political Thinking with Nick Robinson
programme.desc: The journalist in conversation with people who influence our political thinking about what has shaped theirs

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Rick Edwards hosts a game show in which players compete for the chance to win £10,000, with a single impossible answer knocking them out for the day

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Over three rounds, contestants vie to find the single unbeatable answer and streak ahead of the rest to make the final where they can win a cash prize. General knowledge quiz, hosted by Jason Manford

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Susan Calman in which one contestant becomes the Boss and has to use judgement and tactics to decide which player is best suited to answer questions

programme.title: The Vintage French Farmhouse
programme.desc: Antiques dealers Jon Swanston, Melissa Drabble and Lucy Ryder Richardson head to the French town of LIsle-sur-la-Sorgue, where there are over 300 stalls and second-hand shops scattered along its picturesque roads and canal banks. Their hope is to pick up two hidden treasures each, to buy and sell for a profit online. Mel strikes a deal on a cast iron umbrella stand, a mysterious pair of metal boots catch Jons eye, while Lucy selects a holy water canteen from Lourdes

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson uncovers the secrets of Cornwalls Tintagel, famed as the legendary birthplace of King Arthur. Ben discovers Tintagel was potentially more important than London a thousand years ago, based on recent evidence unearthed at an archaeological dig overseen by English Heritage. It was found that over 2,000 people were living here which, at the time, which would have made it the largest settlement anywhere of its kind in Britain

programme.title: Italys Invisible Cities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Dr Michael Scott explore the Italian city of Venice, using 3D technology to discover how a city built in a swamp came to be one of the most powerful locations in Medieval Europe. The pair dive deep into the many canals in this unique place to experience how its buildings still remain standing to this day, and highlight how Venices beauty once masked a ruthless secret state, and a world of excess and vice

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: The team heads to Dulwich College in south-east London, where Michael Baggott falls in love with a Chinese censer, and Kate Bateman casts her eye over a collection of bronze animals. Paul Martin visits the Dulwich Picture Gallery

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Former players Josh Jones, Sarah Keyworth, Melvin Odoom and Kimberly Wyatt test their general knowledge skills before the days winner, and weeks victor is revealed

programme.title: Do You Know Your Place?
programme.desc: Vernon Kay hosts the final day of the weeks whistlestop tour of the UK. Former EastEnders star Nitin Ganatra, Rev Kate Bottley and Alex Gray, aka Apollo from Gladiators, are this weeks players, and this is their final chance to claim glory. Paul Gorton is the unreliable tour guide, and hes taking the players to Wrexham

programme.title: The Wild Gardener
programme.desc: Part two of two. During the second year, Colin Stafford-Johnson begins to reap the rewards of his labours. Working through the winter, the wildlife cameraman reflects on his journey so far and plans the busy spring and summer months ahead. With most of the heavy lifting done, Colin will now use a gentle hand to maintain the garden as he tries to lure back as many wild creatures as possible

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: Monty Don breathes new life into a tired agapanthus, pots up a fig tree for future harvests and shares a tip for growing roses. A retired GP shows Frances Tophill around his West Yorkshire garden, where prairie planting is the order of the day, Ashley Edwards explores the resilience of drought-resistant plants at RHS Hyde Hall and Arit Anderson visits the garden of two designers who have blended three distinct planting styles into one

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: The Xudum prides mothers and young cubs flee south as four dangerous intruder male lions close in, threatening to kill cubs and take over the pride. For Pobe the cheetah, the pressure is on to provide for her family, but as one of the Okavangos underdogs, she must defend every meal from bigger cats. Leopard mum Lediba has no choice but to leave her cubs alone while she hunts, despite the sinister presence of an unknown male

programme.title: True North
programme.desc: Tommy McCarthy sets out to prove hes the ultimate entertainer. The former European cruiserweight champion has thrown in the towel on his boxing career believing he has a shot at fame and glory in the world of stand-up comedy. With a wife and four daughters depending on him, can Tommy turn his part-time hobby as a comic into a full-time career?

programme.desc: Analysis of the days events

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest forecast

programme.title: The End We Start From (2023)
programme.desc: A woman and her newborn must find their way home after an environmental crisis leaves London submerged by floodwaters, tearing the young family apart. Thriller, starring Jodie Comer, Joel Fry, Benedict Cumberbatch and Mark Strong

programme.title: Panorama
programme.sub-title: Will Robots Take My Job? - Panorama
programme.desc: Reporter Richard Bilton investigates the rise of automation in the workforce, questioning if it will bring freedom from toil or leave millions discarded and impoverished. In Silicon Valley, plans are underway for massive changes in employment, prompting fears that millions of people will be replaced by robots and AI

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A cohort of junior doctors join the midwives on their district rounds, including Timothy Turner, while Violet turns her hand to midwifery

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two highest-scoring chefs from Scotland must go head-to-head and cook their six-course menus again. They need to impress a panel of exacting judges - chef Tom Kerridge, former Great British Menu Champion of Champions Lorna McNee, and comedian Phil Wang. The guest judge is Bafta-winning actress Katherine Parkinson. How will she judge dishes celebrating the British film industry? Only one of the chefs will triumph and go through to represent Scotland at the national finals. Andi Oliver presents

programme.title: The Zero Line: Inside Russias War
programme.desc: Russian soldiers and civilians share their experiences of the war with Ukraine, including accounts of torture and summary executions to ensure obedience, and extreme brutality by the police to crush dissent on the home front

programme.desc: It is Weasys birthday and he is keen to find out if the ducklings have got him his dream present, but he keeps ruining their party preparations

programme.desc: Callum transforms Adam and Joe into aliens, challenging them to take members of the public around in their UFO taxis and protect their backs from a Sharky-shaped storm

programme.desc: Nitro hires a fake image guru and he and a producer tell Viper and Phantom they need new looks as a prancing unicorn and a lassoing cowboy

programme.title: Blue Peter
programme.desc: Packed full of amazing celeb guests, epic challenges and lols galore!

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: Current affairs reports aimed at a younger audience

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: Monty Don breathes new life into a tired agapanthus, pots up a fig tree for future harvests and shares a tip for growing roses. A retired GP shows Frances Tophill around his West Yorkshire garden, where prairie planting is the order of the day, Ashley Edwards explores the resilience of drought-resistant plants at RHS Hyde Hall and Arit Anderson visits the garden of two designers who have blended three distinct planting styles into one

programme.title: The Great Caruso (1951)
programme.desc: Biopic of the acclaimed Italian operatic tenor Enrico Caruso, charting his progress from humble beginnings as a choirboy in Naples, to his difficult rise to fame in America, as he struggles to find acceptance before ultimately being recognised as one of the worlds greatest singers. Starring Mario Lanza, Ann Blyth, Dorothy Kirsten and Jarmila Novotna

programme.title: Mary Berry - Love to Cook
programme.desc: The culinary expert offers tips for beginners, showing how to make recipes that will build confidence in the kitchen, including a Victoria sandwich, a mouthwatering stir fry, an open burger, and a biscuit for first-time bakers. In Newcastle, she meets the Mens Pie Club, a group set up to combat male social isolation and the members impress her with their spiced chicken and apricot tagine pie

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Four chefs compete for Scotland with canapes, starters and fish dishes inspired by the British film industry. The dishes are judged by Michelin-starred chef Adam Handling, and include a leek and potato veloute inspired by Trainspotting and an aubergine baba ganoush in honour of Limbo. Presented by Andi Oliver

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The Scottish chefs serve up their mains and desserts inspired by the British film industry, including venison loin smoked in gunpowder tea inspired by Skyfall and a frangipane custard tart in honour of Brave. Veteran judge Adam Handling helps to decide who deserves to say and who should go home. Presented by Andi Oliver

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Claire Rawle and James Lewis value antiques and collectibles at St Albans Cathedral and Abbey in Hertfordshire, while Paul Martin visits nearby Knebworth House

programme.title: The Bridge at Remagen (1969)
programme.desc: As Allied forces prepare for a major assault on Germany, a small unit of American soldiers is sent to capture a strategically important bridge over the Rhine - but German forces are determined to prevent the Allied advance, and seek to destroy it. Second World War adventure, starring George Segal, Robert Vaughn, Ben Gazzara and Bradford Dillman

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates this documentary following a couple of mountain lion families in Wyomings Rocky Mountains. The dramatic story of two mothers struggling to raise their cubs is giving scientists an invaluable insight into the behaviour of these elusive predators

programme.title: Jane Reas Bloomin Wild
programme.desc: The arrival of autumn sees Jane preparing for a Halloween gathering. She also harvests some ornamental gourds, which she turns into candle holders for her table, and shares some exciting news with her daughter. In Garvagh, Jane catches up with a friend and fellow farmers daughter, the Ulster-Scots writer and poet Anne McMaster

programme.title: Story and Song: 180 Years of Queens
programme.desc: A concert at the Whitla Hall in which the Ulster Orchestra mark the 180th anniversary of Queens University Belfast, with guest appearances by Alfie Boe, Declan ORourke, Dani Larkin, Soak and Robocobra Quartet, the Answer, Dana Masters, Jolene OHara and more

programme.title: Europe on the Edge with Katya Adler
programme.desc: The journalist finds out what the future holds for Europe in a world where it can no longer fully rely on America, beginning by visiting Italy and Germany to explore how theyre changing in a turbulent new world. In the Tuscan hills, she joins Italian paratroopers on a Nato exercise with 1,500 soldiers from seven different countries, then she heads to Germany, where she visits a Volkswagen car factory to learn how theyre being affected by both Russia and China. And in Germanys far south, not far from Munich, she meets a family who are building a house with a nuclear bunker

programme.title: One-Hit Wonders at the BBC: Volume 3
programme.desc: Another celebration of artists who lit up the charts exactly once before slipping mysteriously out of view, including Jennifer Paiges Crush, the 1998 hit that defined a summer, alongside the off-kilter charm of Jimmy the Hoovers Tantalise (Wo Wo Ee Yeh Yeh) from 1983. This instalment digs deeper into the vaults to unearth more unforgettable one-offs and near misses, reminding why the charts remain such a thrilling, unpredictable arena

programme.title: One-Hit Wonders at the BBC: Volume 2
programme.desc: A selection of archive performances of hits by artists who barely troubled the singles charts again, including appearances by the Las, the Mock Turtles, Joan Jett, Kim Carnes, Don Henley, Patti Smith, Curtis Mayfield and John Denver

programme.title: One-Hit Wonders at the BBC
programme.desc: Compilation of hits by artists that were hardly heard from again after one of their songs climbed to the pinnacle of pop, alongside an analysis of the one-hit wonder phenomenon. Featuring Peter Sarstedts 1969 track Where Do You Go To (My Lovely)?, Trios 1982 smash Da Da Da, Move Closer, by Phyllis Nelson, and You Get What You Give, by New Radicals

programme.title: Sound of Metal (2021)
programme.desc: Rock drummer Ruben Stone begins to lose his hearing and begrudgingly enrols in a residential programme for deaf recovering addicts run by a Vietnam War veteran. Oscar and Bafta-winning drama, starring Riz Ahmed, Olivia Cooke and Paul Raci

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: Following Whitneys bold move in the US, Yasmin and Henry are left with the albatross Tender has become. Yasmin seizes the chance of a new opportunity, while Henry considers whether to challenge the status quo. Harper, Yasmin and Henry face a moment of reckoning

programme.title: Small Prophets
programme.desc: The prophets have to be buried in horse manure to make them grow, and Clive is at the end of his tether when a truckload of the stuff is dumped at the front of Michaels house, though Bev is intrigued and wants to be involved. When Kacey comes round to help bury the jars and asks Michael about the boxes hoarded in his house, he opens up about Clea and the life he once dreamed of

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Curse of Skinwalker Ranch
programme.sub-title: Behind the Gates: Hot, Hot, Hot Spots
programme.desc: Matty Blake and the team break down how the phenomena - and the locations where they happen - on Skinwalker Ranch, may all be connected

programme.title: Curse of Skinwalker Ranch
programme.desc: Dr Travis Taylor reviews some of the most compelling evidence that the team has documented so far, which suggests they may be close to revealing the secret of Skinwalker Ranch.

Helen Gardiner has a hard time sealing a deal for a collection of 1950s Dinky toys, while Karen Dalmeny haggles for a commemorative sword and Corrie Jeffreys interest is aroused by an 18th-century snuff box

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: The dealers head to Northwich in Cheshire. Mark Stevens tries his hardest to buy everything that comes to his table, and Tim Hogarth is given a run for his money by the sellers. Other dealers in the den include Jan Keyne and James Layte

programme.title: Canadian Pickers

programme.desc: An invasion of Burmese pythons is decimating the Florida Everglades, with entire species of animals being wiped out. King of the Swamp Troy Landry, his sharpshooting son Chase, legendary gator hunter Bruce Mitchell, and big fish wrangler Zak Catchem join forces with professional snake hunter Bill Booth to dive deep into the underbelly of the Everglades to capture these sinister beasts. programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a charity edition of the game show, with three famous faces all trying to say what they see, as they guess well-known phrases for the chance to win a £50,000 jackpot for their chosen good causes

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a family of five answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: Blankety Blank
programme.desc: Comedy quiz show with celebrity guests. Presented by Lily Savage

programme.title: Blankety Blank

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Leon, William, Nikki and Julie pit their wits against quiz genius the Chaser. Answering general knowledge questions, they each add as much money as they dare to the jackpot - but if anyone is caught theyre out for good, leaving fewer players for the final chase

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Colin Baker, David Weir, Chelsee Healey and Alex Horne pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: The team attend a man who has slipped while crossing a stream and is left with a bone sticking out of his arm. In Wasdale, an emergency call has come in for a man with a badly broken leg on the Corridor Route to Scafell Pike. Darkness is closing in, and the first challenge is to locate the casualty. Leaving him on the hill in plummeting temperatures would be life-threatening

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Jersey to transform Maxs Bar and Grill. Even though its been serving up famous hotdogs for almost 100 years, its on the verge of crumbling, with over $1million of debt. The situation isnt helped by a power struggle between the divorced owners, who still work together

programme.title: French Exit (2020)
programme.desc: Frances Price, an ageing Manhattan socialite, cashes in the last of her possessions and resolves to live out her twilight days anonymously in a borrowed apartment in Paris, accompanied by her directionless son Malcolm and a cat named Small Frank. Comedy drama, starring Michelle Pfeiffer, Lucas Hedges and Valerie Mahaffey, with the voice of Tracy Letts

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Dumfries to meet Maggie, whose farm holds an extraordinary collection of memorabilia

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Now that permission has been granted, Keith and Marj start work in the main chapel hall, removing the pews, parquet floor and large pulpit. Keith visits a fellow potter, and Marj makes a discovery in the once-pigeon-infested Sunday school ceiling vents

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: Siobhán McSweeney hosts the semi-final, where the four remaining potters make wall-mounted water fountains inspired by Romes Trevi Fountain and take on guest judge and ceramic artist Cleo Mussis surprise mosaic challenge. Whose fountain will make a splash and see them through to the final, and whose mosaic will leave them picking up the pieces?

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with comedian Neil Delamere joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Dont Shoot, Im Only the Psychiatrist
programme.desc: Sam foolishly allows Woody to cut his hair, and Frasier brings the members of his therapy group for those with low self-esteem to the bar, in the hope they can meet normal people. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody has to take a second job as a gravedigger to pay for Kellys engagement ring and soon finds himself hallucinating due to lack of sleep. Starring Ted Danson and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla opposes her sons decision to become a priest, Sam finds a way to get even with John Hill, and Cliff begins a new life as a stand-up comedian. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Eccentric cousin Gerard persuades Robert to join a cult known as the Inner Path, which claims to teach its members how to attain peace and achieve their full potential. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra learns two of her friends have been to see a marriage counsellor, and tries to convince Ray they should seek professional advice to resolve their relationship problems. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Allys teacher overhears Ray commenting about the childrens excessive workload, she invites him to address the curriculum review board and gives him a mountain of material for review and evaluation. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of two. Roz panics at the thought of becoming a mother, prompting Frasier to lend her a friendly shoulder to cry on - while he ponders the fathers identity. Award-winning comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Special episode filmed on location in Seattle. Frasier is guest of honour at a public rally to mark his 1,000th radio show - but the celebrations go awry as Niless jealousy reaches new peaks. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink is asked to be a guest speaker on an all-star cruise, and invites the family to accompany him. However, the so-called celebrities also appearing are not exactly famous. Meanwhile, Niless marital problems worsen once he discovers Maris will also be coming along

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio psychiatrist begins dating a successful lawyer, but it is not long before conflicting career demands start to get in the way of their relationship

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz find a huge sculpture of Elvis and trawl through a trailer full of rare art and military memorabilia

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head off to Loughborough, Leicestershire, to take on a 1992 Saab 900 Turbo thats in desperate need of repair. The car belongs to Saab enthusiast and former electrical engineer Pravesh. Sadly, due to ill health, Pravesh has been left with little strength to work on the car, so its been left to rot. His family believe getting his Saab back on the road would give him the boost he needs

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit Herefordshire to meet former farmer Julian. Henry finds an old cattle feeder that he wants to turn into a garden bench, while Simon hatches plans to turn a vintage seed drill into a trendy dining table

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with comedian Neil Delamere joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Claudia Winkleman joins Clare Balding for more live coverage from the National Exhibition Centre, as dog owners from across the globe descend on Birmingham. This year, the Flyball is wide open with the reigning Belgian champions Road Runners Beep Beep not competing. Jim Rosenthal and Graham Partridge commentate on todays heats, while Radzi Chinyanganya captures all the emotion from the Main Arena. Plus: the latest from the NEC halls with Claudia Winkleman

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: The season winds down for the Brits abroad, but theyre gearing up for the biggest days of their lives. Its hoped that Abi and Darrens wedding in Spain and Andrew and Richards wedding event in France will go off without a hitch. Friends Janey and Sharon also have plenty to celebrate at their BandB - but success comes at a cost

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: With cleanliness being the buzz word of the week, almost all of the hosts are unhappy about their less-than sparkling scores and theres suspicions that some of the hoteliers have been playing dirty

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Civil servant Sandra hosts the final night in south Wales. After a week of culinary highs and lows, Sandras planning a menu thats heavy on cream and mushrooms - a risky move since her guests have made it very clear throughout the week that these two ingredients are not much-loved. With a new twist shaking things up during dessert, its a dramatic end to a lively week

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Live coverage of the spectacular Opening Ceremony of the Milano Cortina 2026 Paralympic Winter Games from the Arena di Verona. This beautiful Roman amphitheatre is the first UNESCO World Heritage Site to be used in a Paralympic Ceremony. In the studio, Channel 4s presenting team of Ade Adepitan, Billy Monger, Ed Jackson, Dame Sarah Storey and Alice Tai preview the next nine days of elite sporting competition, highlighting the key athletes to watch out for and ParalympicsGBs main medal hopes. Among those athletes are curler Jo Butterfield, who is aiming to become the first British athlete to win at both the Summer and Winter Games, and Neil Simpson, wholl be wanting to defend his super-G title

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the weeks biggest and best shows

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Nick Mohammed, Vittorio Angelone and Penny Mordaunt for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Rhod Gilbert: The Book of John
programme.desc: A stand-up performance by the comedian filmed live at the Wales Millennium Centre in Cardiff, which was his first live show in six years. Raw, personal and brutally honest like never before, Rhod takes us on a no-nonsense journey into finding humour when youve hit rock bottom - and the unexpected encounter that leads you to a lower place

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Cosmic Jam
programme.desc: In his classic debut live stand-up show, filmed at Londons Bloomsbury Theatre in 1996, Bill explains why Bryan Adams is perhaps the greatest ever exponent of the rock anthem; demonstrates the influence that Cockney music has had on the great classical composers; and warns of the perils of a world ruled by insects, while playing the second-biggest gong in Britain

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Long Island, New York, to help an Indian restaurant which used to run a Mexican eatery out of the same kitchen. Its been operating for 35-years, but a decline in business led to fusion experiments, which havent always been successful and which have confused the customers. With some dishes tasting soggy and swimming with oil, Ramsay has his work cut out trying to turn things round

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Another selection of BandB owners take it in turns as hosts to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money. The contest begins at Knockaloe Beg Farm on the Isle of Man, where owners Fiona and John Anderson hope their guests will embrace their green ethos. They kick things off with an afternoon of laser mayhem, and continue the fun the next day by following breakfast with hands-on animal antics

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests head to the Arches on the Isle of Man for their second stay, where owner Phil Routledge hopes to wow them with scenic views and scuba diving at the BandBs own pool. However, some of the owners are dismayed by modern gadgets with a lack of instructions, and even find cobwebs in their rooms

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants arrive at the Trafford in Blackpool, owned by Robbie and John Welling, who are proud of their traditional bucket and spade BandB. The guests are pleasantly surprised, even if previous host Phil is intent on finding dust as a bit of tit-for-tat retaliation, and the afternoon is spent learning the art of making sticks of rock

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Host Julie welcomes the contestants to Sheepy Lodge, Warwickshire, where they are shocked by their surroundings, and disappointed by a variety of things in the rooms. The host puts on some old-fashioned parlour games, before a fierce hide-and-seek contest erupts. At breakfast, Julie frets when she must prepare poached eggs, and is left emotional after the feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rival BandB owners meet to settle some scores and discover what they have been paid. Knockaloe Beg Farm owners Fiona and John Anderson tackle criticisms of a missing host at breakfast, and Phil Routledge from The Arches on the Isle of Man takes on Robbie and John Welling from The Trafford in Blackpool about their forensic investigation. After some heated discussion, the winner is announced

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: With the chapel being unliveable for many more months, Keith and Marj have come up with a radical idea to sleep onsite a lot sooner, in the shape of a shipping container in their car park, which they hope to transform into their first official finished bedroom

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie about working late so he can get out of a seminar and play mud football, but his escapade in the rain makes him so feverish that he has a nightmare about appearing in TV shows with Arthur. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie wants Arthur to socialise more and encourages her father to attend an old peoples centre, which he hates. Doug takes pity on his father-in-law and takes him to a cocktail party instead - but ends up having to take sole responsibility for him. Kevin James stars

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug feels unappreciated at work and aims to get a pay rise by claiming a major courier service wants to hire him - but he ends up getting sacked. Meanwhile, Carries enthusiasm for tanning lotion proves disastrous. With Lou Ferrigno, star of cult TV series The Incredible Hulk

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge compete to be the subject of Lisas Most Interesting Person I Know essay, but instead she chooses Professor Frink. With the guest voice of Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Todd, Todd, Why Hast Thou Forsaken Me?
programme.desc: Todd Flanders stops believing in God so Ned asks the Simpsons to look after his son for a while and help him rediscover his faith

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Ed Jackson and Billy Monger present coverage of the opening events on the first day of the Games in Italy. The men and womens para alpine downhill at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre sees Neil Simpson defend his title after becoming the first British male to win gold on the snow alongside his guide, and brother, Andrew in the super-G in Beijing. Meanwhile, the wheelchair curling mixed team event begins with Great Britain taking on Slovakia at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Continued coverage of the opening day of the Games, held in Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. Great Britains Scott Meenagh competes in his third and final Paralympics in the para biathlon 7.5km sprint finals sitting at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium. In 2025, he won bronze in the Para Biathlon Sprint World Cup in Sweden, so now hes looking to keep up the momentum and earn another medal as a final farewell to a spectacular career. His compatriot and three-time world champion Menna Fitzpatrick, with her guide Katie Guest, is also bidding for glory in the alpine skiing downhill final at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre. With reports from Dame Sarah Storey and Alice Tai

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones presents action from the battle for grid positions in the opening round of the season, held at Albert Park Circuit in Melbourne. Lando Norris took pole position here last year and his McLaren teammate Oscar Piastri joined him on the front row. With analysis from David Coulthard and Mark Webber

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Radzi Chinyanganya and Clare Balding present all the action with live coverage from the NEC in Birmingham. Claudia Winkleman is roving the halls to cover all the hot topics in the dog world. Meanwhile, Ashleigh Butler joins Jim Rosenthal and Graham Partridge in the commentary box to add insight to the skills on show in the Large Agility competition

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Highlights
programme.desc: Ade Adepitan presents action from day one of the Games, held in Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. Paralympic GBs Menna Fitzpatrick and Neil Simpson both went for gold in the downhill alpine skiing at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre. Plus, Alice Tai reports from Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium, where Scott Meenagh, Sam Cozens and Fred Warburton competed for Great Britain in the super-G, and Dame Sarah Storey provides curling updates from Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Claudia Winkleman joins Clare Balding on a star-studded Saturday night at the worlds greatest dog show, in Birmingham. The road to Best in Show continues with judging of both the Utility Group, including schnauzers and poodles, and the pocket rockets of the canine world - the Toy dogs. Ellie Simmonds talks about her Dog of the Day, while Scruffts gives crossbred dogs their chance to shine in categories including Most Handsome, Golden Oldie, and the Good Citizen Dog Scheme. And it wouldnt be Saturday evening without Claudia Winkleman witnessing some top-class dancing. Its not strictly ballroom, but the Heelwork to Music dogs and owners will be strutting their stuff in the International Freestyle competition

programme.title: Bill Baileys Vietnam
programme.desc: Bill travels down the Indochina peninsula, exploring the profound changes of the past half-century. Arriving in Ho Chi Minh City, the most populous city in Vietnam, Bill finds himself caught between wartime tunnels, endless traffic, and the music genres of metal and folk. With the expert assistance of scooter guide KK, Bill wonders if he can find old Saigon in modern Ho Chi Minh City

programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry (2023)
programme.desc: Devon-based pensioner Harold Fry receives a letter from his dying former work colleague, Queenie. She is living out her final few days in a Northumberland hospice. Harold spontaneously embarks on a physically gruelling 500-mile trek north. Drama based on Rachel Joyces novel, starring Jim Broadbent and Penelope Wilton

programme.title: Fury (2014)
programme.desc: A veteran American sergeant leads a tank crew on one final dangerous mission in the last months of the Second World War. The assignment takes the soldiers behind enemy lines and into battle with overwhelming enemy forces, while the presence of an inexperienced new recruit in the team raises tension. Drama, starring Brad Pitt and Shia LaBeouf

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: Jonathan Ross hosts this reality challenge in which nine pairs of strangers with different beliefs, lifestyles, opinions and habits are handcuffed together for as long as they can stand it. The pairs must navigate eating, dressing and even sleeping just inches apart as they are sent on a road trip across the UK - with the ones who last the longest in the running for £100,000. From a bar tender and a millionaire to an alpha male and a proud feminist, which couple will be the first to take the cuffs off?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Jersey to transform Maxs Bar and Grill. Even though its been serving up famous hotdogs for almost 100 years, its on the verge of crumbling, with over $1million of debt. The situation isnt helped by a power struggle between the divorced owners, who still work together
