programme.title: Bill Bailey: Cosmic Jam
programme.desc: In his classic debut live stand-up show, filmed at Londons Bloomsbury Theatre in 1996, Bill explains why Bryan Adams is perhaps the greatest ever exponent of the rock anthem; demonstrates the influence that Cockney music has had on the great classical composers; and warns of the perils of a world ruled by insects, while playing the second-biggest gong in Britain

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Long Island, New York, to help an Indian restaurant which used to run a Mexican eatery out of the same kitchen. Its been operating for 35-years, but a decline in business led to fusion experiments, which havent always been successful and which have confused the customers. With some dishes tasting soggy and swimming with oil, Ramsay has his work cut out trying to turn things round

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Another selection of BandB owners take it in turns as hosts to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money. The contest begins at Knockaloe Beg Farm on the Isle of Man, where owners Fiona and John Anderson hope their guests will embrace their green ethos. They kick things off with an afternoon of laser mayhem, and continue the fun the next day by following breakfast with hands-on animal antics

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests head to the Arches on the Isle of Man for their second stay, where owner Phil Routledge hopes to wow them with scenic views and scuba diving at the BandBs own pool. However, some of the owners are dismayed by modern gadgets with a lack of instructions, and even find cobwebs in their rooms

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants arrive at the Trafford in Blackpool, owned by Robbie and John Welling, who are proud of their traditional bucket and spade BandB. The guests are pleasantly surprised, even if previous host Phil is intent on finding dust as a bit of tit-for-tat retaliation, and the afternoon is spent learning the art of making sticks of rock

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Host Julie welcomes the contestants to Sheepy Lodge, Warwickshire, where they are shocked by their surroundings, and disappointed by a variety of things in the rooms. The host puts on some old-fashioned parlour games, before a fierce hide-and-seek contest erupts. At breakfast, Julie frets when she must prepare poached eggs, and is left emotional after the feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rival BandB owners meet to settle some scores and discover what they have been paid. Knockaloe Beg Farm owners Fiona and John Anderson tackle criticisms of a missing host at breakfast, and Phil Routledge from The Arches on the Isle of Man takes on Robbie and John Welling from The Trafford in Blackpool about their forensic investigation. After some heated discussion, the winner is announced

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: With the chapel being unliveable for many more months, Keith and Marj have come up with a radical idea to sleep onsite a lot sooner, in the shape of a shipping container in their car park, which they hope to transform into their first official finished bedroom

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie about working late so he can get out of a seminar and play mud football, but his escapade in the rain makes him so feverish that he has a nightmare about appearing in TV shows with Arthur. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie wants Arthur to socialise more and encourages her father to attend an old peoples centre, which he hates. Doug takes pity on his father-in-law and takes him to a cocktail party instead - but ends up having to take sole responsibility for him. Kevin James stars

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug feels unappreciated at work and aims to get a pay rise by claiming a major courier service wants to hire him - but he ends up getting sacked. Meanwhile, Carries enthusiasm for tanning lotion proves disastrous. With Lou Ferrigno, star of cult TV series The Incredible Hulk

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge compete to be the subject of Lisas Most Interesting Person I Know essay, but instead she chooses Professor Frink. With the guest voice of Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Todd, Todd, Why Hast Thou Forsaken Me?
programme.desc: Todd Flanders stops believing in God so Ned asks the Simpsons to look after his son for a while and help him rediscover his faith

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Ed Jackson and Billy Monger present coverage of the opening events on the first day of the Games in Italy. The men and womens para alpine downhill at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre sees Neil Simpson defend his title after becoming the first British male to win gold on the snow alongside his guide, and brother, Andrew in the super-G in Beijing. Meanwhile, the wheelchair curling mixed team event begins with Great Britain taking on Slovakia at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Continued coverage of the opening day of the Games, held in Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. Great Britains Scott Meenagh competes in his third and final Paralympics in the para biathlon 7.5km sprint finals sitting at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium. In 2025, he won bronze in the Para Biathlon Sprint World Cup in Sweden, so now hes looking to keep up the momentum and earn another medal as a final farewell to a spectacular career. His compatriot and three-time world champion Menna Fitzpatrick, with her guide Katie Guest, is also bidding for glory in the alpine skiing downhill final at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre. With reports from Dame Sarah Storey and Alice Tai

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones presents action from the battle for grid positions in the opening round of the season, held at Albert Park Circuit in Melbourne. Lando Norris took pole position here last year and his McLaren teammate Oscar Piastri joined him on the front row. With analysis from David Coulthard and Mark Webber

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Radzi Chinyanganya and Clare Balding present all the action with live coverage from the NEC in Birmingham. Claudia Winkleman is roving the halls to cover all the hot topics in the dog world. Meanwhile, Ashleigh Butler joins Jim Rosenthal and Graham Partridge in the commentary box to add insight to the skills on show in the Large Agility competition

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Highlights
programme.desc: Ade Adepitan presents action from day one of the Games, held in Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. Paralympic GBs Menna Fitzpatrick and Neil Simpson both went for gold in the downhill alpine skiing at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre. Plus, Alice Tai reports from Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium, where Scott Meenagh, Sam Cozens and Fred Warburton competed for Great Britain in the super-G, and Dame Sarah Storey provides curling updates from Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Claudia Winkleman joins Clare Balding on a star-studded Saturday night at the worlds greatest dog show, in Birmingham. The road to Best in Show continues with judging of both the Utility Group, including schnauzers and poodles, and the pocket rockets of the canine world - the Toy dogs. Ellie Simmonds talks about her Dog of the Day, while Scruffts gives crossbred dogs their chance to shine in categories including Most Handsome, Golden Oldie, and the Good Citizen Dog Scheme. And it wouldnt be Saturday evening without Claudia Winkleman witnessing some top-class dancing. Its not strictly ballroom, but the Heelwork to Music dogs and owners will be strutting their stuff in the International Freestyle competition

programme.title: Bill Baileys Vietnam
programme.desc: Bill travels down the Indochina peninsula, exploring the profound changes of the past half-century. Arriving in Ho Chi Minh City, the most populous city in Vietnam, Bill finds himself caught between wartime tunnels, endless traffic, and the music genres of metal and folk. With the expert assistance of scooter guide KK, Bill wonders if he can find old Saigon in modern Ho Chi Minh City

programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry (2023)
programme.desc: Devon-based pensioner Harold Fry receives a letter from his dying former work colleague, Queenie. She is living out her final few days in a Northumberland hospice. Harold spontaneously embarks on a physically gruelling 500-mile trek north. Drama based on Rachel Joyces novel, starring Jim Broadbent and Penelope Wilton

programme.title: Fury (2014)
programme.desc: A veteran American sergeant leads a tank crew on one final dangerous mission in the last months of the Second World War. The assignment takes the soldiers behind enemy lines and into battle with overwhelming enemy forces, while the presence of an inexperienced new recruit in the team raises tension. Drama, starring Brad Pitt and Shia LaBeouf

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: Jonathan Ross hosts this reality challenge in which nine pairs of strangers with different beliefs, lifestyles, opinions and habits are handcuffed together for as long as they can stand it. The pairs must navigate eating, dressing and even sleeping just inches apart as they are sent on a road trip across the UK - with the ones who last the longest in the running for £100,000. From a bar tender and a millionaire to an alpha male and a proud feminist, which couple will be the first to take the cuffs off?

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: The unlikely manacled couples are still living cheek by jowl as they get to know each other - for better or for worse. Housewife and self-confessed prude Charlie hopes being handcuffed to a total stranger will help broaden her mind. After her initial shock at being chained to 6ft 7 heavily tattooed Rob, they settle into domestic bliss at Charlies cottage. Meanwhile, the forced friendship between Christian hairdresser Nina and chatty mum of seven Sara could be the start of something beautiful - until the former realises just how talkative her partner is

programme.title: Iain Stirlings Roast the Internet
programme.desc: Comedy entertainment show about the very worst things on the internet, with Joe Thomas, London Hughes and Harriet Kemsley joining the host on the first edition to examine social clips, posts and trends

programme.desc: Debra suffers from PMT, so Ray decides to help alleviate her symptoms - but only succeeds in making matters worse. Ray Romano stars

programme.desc: Rachel realises she wants to start dating Ross again and writes him an 18-page letter expressing her feelings - but he falls asleep while reading it. Phoebe and her estranged birth mother discover they have a lot in common, and Monica is stung by a jellyfish

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica goes on a date with her high-school heart-throb. Ross begins playing tricks on Rachel, and Phoebe convinces herself a stray cat is the reincarnation of her long-dead mother. Comedy, starring Lisa Kudrow, Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler finds himself in hot water while dating Rachels pushy boss. Joey decides to buy an encyclopaedia, but discovers he can only afford one volume, and Monica resolves to prove her mother wrong. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry, Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.desc: Chandler agrees to spend Thanksgiving in a packing crate as penance for kissing Kathy, and the friends decide to give each other seasonal gifts. Monica visits Richards son, who finds her every bit as attractive as his father did. Comedy, guest starring Michael Vartan

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes half-brother makes a startling announcement and asks a great favour of her, while Joey attempts to break down social barriers when he takes a job as a tour guide at Rosss museum. Chandler fears not living up to Kathys expectations

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Princess Leia Fantasy
programme.desc: Ross foolishly lets Rachel in on his most secret sexual fantasy, while Phoebe consoles a heartbroken Monica and Chandler gets involved with an old flame whom Joey cannot stand. David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No Ones Ready
programme.desc: Ross is due to make an important speech at the museum, and invites the gang along for moral support - but bickering and personal problems soon threaten to make him late. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe is alarmed to learn she has attracted the unwanted attentions of a stalker, and Monica comes up with a plan to deal with her broodiness. American comedy, guest starring David Arquette, with Lisa Kudrow and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Metaphorical Tunnel
programme.desc: Chandler ponders the importance of commitment, Monica starts work in a restaurant and Phoebes home truths make her an unpopular choice as Joeys agent. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Actress Isabella Rossellini makes Rosss day by dropping into Central Perk for a coffee. Phoebes efforts to introduce her half-brother to the city give him the wrong idea about her line of work. Comedy, with David Schwimmer, Lisa Kudrow and Giovanni Ribisi

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Janice persuades the pals to reveal their deepest, darkest secrets about a period in their relationships three years earlier. Phoebe is trying to move out without telling Monica, Rachel wants one last fling before she gets married and Ross makes a distressing discovery. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Maggie Wheeler

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Race Car Bed
programme.desc: Monica buys a bed from Janices husband but the wrong one is delivered. Joey gets a job teaching a soap opera acting class, while Rachel tries to ease the tension between Ross and her father

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Giant Poking Device
programme.desc: Phoebe convinces herself she is a walking jinx who keeps causing people to die mysteriously. Monica hides the fact that Ben has been injured, while Chandler and Janice make a tough decision about their relationship

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang holds an American football match on Thanksgiving. Opposing team captains Ross and Monica relive their sibling rivalry on the pitch, while Joey tries to outflank Chandler

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel hands in her notice at Central Perk, while Ross accidentally breaks a girls leg and ends up having to go door to door peddling cookies. Joey starts a new job selling Christmas trees, but Phoebe thinks it is a cruel trade and sets about saving the merchandise

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Cant Remember Which Sister
programme.desc: Rachels attractive and influential new friend sends Ross into a jealous frenzy, while Chandler gets drunk and falls for the curvaceous charms of one of Joeys many sisters - but later cannot remember which one

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Jealousy
programme.desc: Ross becomes increasingly jealous of Rachels new workmate, and Joey auditions for a Broadway musical - even though he cannot dance. Meanwhile, Monica falls for a would-be poet

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Monica and Richard Are Just Friends
programme.desc: Monica bumps into ex-boyfriend Richard in a video store and the pair agree it would be a mistake to start dating again - but soon fall back into bed. Meanwhile, Phoebe begins seeing an athlete. Tom Selleck guest stars

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes former singing partner turns up with the idea of using Smelly Cat in a commercial. Chandler dates a woman with a prosthetic leg, and Rosss jealousy gets the better of him. Sherilyn Fenn guest stars

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross and Rachel Take a Break
programme.desc: A harassed Rachel tells Ross she thinks they should take a break from each other - so he responds by getting drunk and sleeping with a woman Joey and Chandler have been chasing. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross tries to prevent Rachel discovering he slept with Chloe from the photocopying shop, but she finds out anyway and a major argument ensues at her apartment. Trapped in Monicas bedroom, the other friends cannot help overhearing everything

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Without the Ski Trip
programme.desc: Ross and Rachels separation begins to cause friction among the pals, who feel they have to choose between the estranged pair - and an impending skiing holiday only makes matters worse. Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Hypnosis Tape
programme.desc: Phoebe is shocked to discover her half-brother Frank is planning to marry a woman more than twice his age. Chandler tries to stop smoking with the aid of hypnosis, only to suffer strange side-effects, and Monica gets a handy tip that could net her a small fortune

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Tiny T-Shirt
programme.desc: Monica steals the heart of a millionaire, but Rosss spirits plummet thanks to Rachel, who dates his arch-rival Mark. Meanwhile, Joey lands a part in a new play, but clashes with his female co-star. Guest starring Iron Man director Jon Favreau

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey meets Miss Right, and Rachel is dismayed to learn her boss has started dating Chandler. Meanwhile, Monica inherits a dolls house, filling Phoebe with jealousy

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with a Chick and a Duck
programme.desc: Heartbroken Ross makes a sacrifice for Rachel, Monica faces a difficult decision over a career opportunity and Chandler is surprised by Joeys strange choice of gift

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey proves a hit with his co-star, despite what the critics think. Rachel dates a stranger who seems outwardly charming - until he starts screaming at people. Unfortunately, only Ross witnesses his bizarre behaviour and nobody else believes him. Guest starring Ben Stiller

programme.title: The Rock (1996)
programme.desc: A renegade general and his crack team of mercenaries take over the abandoned fortress prison of Alcatraz and threaten San Francisco with toxic nerve-gas rockets to extort a massive ransom. To break their stranglehold on the city, the FBI sends in a chemical weapons expert and a jailed SAS veteran, chosen because he is the only man to have ever escaped from the infamous penitentiary. Action thriller, with Sean Connery, Nicolas Cage and Ed Harris

programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz try to earn the respect of their idol, Lt Melanie Hawkins after accidentally disrupting one of her undercover cases. programme.sub-title: Recipe for Death II: Kiss the Cook
programme.desc: Adam asks his father for money to film his own action movie. Erica and Beverly go clothes shopping, and Erica uses Beverlys sweaters to create her own version of a popular outfit. Comedy, starring Sean Giambrone, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam gets between Murray and Marvin when they go without him to the Philadelphia Thanksgiving Day parade to see KITT from TV show Knight Rider. programme.desc: Steph and Billy, their best man George and bridesmaid Becca relive the unforgettable piggy wedding that shocked many back in 2016

programme.sub-title: We Need to Talk About Lily

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Handlebar, Casa Roma and The Black Pearl
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he tried to save - Handlebar, Casa Roma and the Black Pearl - to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam tells Beverly that he doesnt want her to chaperone the school trip to a theme park, his mother attempts to manipulate him with guilt letters. After attending a career night, Geoff realises he doesnt want to be an eye doctor like his father

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Despite Beverlys wishes, Jackies parents allow Adam to watch horror movie A Nightmare on Elm Street, and a family disagreement ensues. Meanwhile, Erica starts hanging out at her old high school and soon realises shes not as popular as she once was

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: As the birth of Haley and Dylans twins approaches, the programme reflects on how all the family members celebrated their birthdays in the past year

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley is determined to follow the advice in her parenting books with the twins, but Phil and Claire think their old methods are better. Meanwhile, Manny is set to direct Jays dog bed commercial in the hopes of winning his ex-girlfriend back. Return of the American comedy for what is reportedly its final season, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to Giuseppis and Sante La Brea to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress? Plus, an update on Finn McCools from season one

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Jerseys Spanish Pavillion, which is run by two warring brothers whose staff spend more time using their mobile phones than working. The chef plans to turn the eaterys fortunes around, and starts by giving the dining room and menu a modern makeover

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part one of two. A prison van crash sees a mass escape of convicts take place and the entire squad has to track the villains down. Peralta and Santiago make a bet on which of them can bring in the most escaped prisoners, with the loser forced to move into the winners apartment when they start living together. Former American football star Marshawn Lynch guests

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part two of two. Only one fugitive remains on the loose on the streets of Brooklyn after the mass escape of convicts from the prison van and Peralta is forced to enlist a surprising ally in order to apprehend him. Elsewhere, Santiago and Gina attempt to introduce Boyle to proper texting etiquette. Craig Robinson guest stars

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is distressed to learn that Lenny and Carl fixed the result of a senior class presidential election, which he lost in high school - leading him to speculate on how his life would have changed for the better had he won the ballot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge helps a former convict fulfil his artistic ambitions by painting a mural at the school, but he soon clashes with Principal Skinner over the design. With the guest voice of Michael Keaton

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and his friends are recruited to the William Penn Academy baseball team. Barry remains in denial about his pitching skills, while Geoffs father interferes in his relationship with Erica

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Assisted by Geoff, Erica and Valley Erica find a new band member to replace Lainey, but Barry convinces Geoff that the new musician is trying to steal Erica from him. Adam and Murray each plot to get out of going to Valentines Day dinner with Beverly

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Alexs new company puts her up at a new luxury apartment with full amenities - and a list of high-profile residents that everyone is eager to take advantage of, without her knowing. Phil is on a mission to review the restaurants famous sliders for his food blog, while Mitch and Cam sneak in separately to meet David Beckham. Meanwhile, Luke and Manny head straight for the gym to try to pick up older women and end up in hot water. Guest starring Courtney Cox and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil pays a visit to his dad to make sure he is okay after hearing some concerning news about him. Meanwhile, Jay gives Claire and Mitch some of their old childhood memorabilia, which prompts them to revaluate a long-held memory of their first family vacation

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz learn theres more to Lt Melanie Hawkins team than meets the eye as they continue their search for the gang of bank robbers. Jeffords, Boyle and Santiago begin to suspect that Gina is harbouring a secret. Ryan Phillippe, Gina Gershon and Jason Mantzoukas guest star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta and Diaz are framed for a crime they didnt commit, its up to the other members of the Nine-Nine to find out what really happened and try to save them from going to jail

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer helps Ned build a Christian amusement park called Praiseland as a lasting monument to Maude Flanders. Unfortunately, it meets with an unenthusiastic response - until a seemingly genuine miracle occurs

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Marge and the kids hitch a ride on a train, where they are entertained by a tramp who tells them a series of colourful yarns based on American folklore - all of which feature characters suspiciously reminiscent of Homer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Grampa falls victim to a phone scam, the rest of the Simpsons set out to get his money back. With the guest voice of Alan Cumming

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night, Kristina Goodsell hosts an orange party, which Kieran takes too literally when he turns up dressed in a traffic cone, while Ella comes dressed as her nan

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Matt Lucas welcomes TV presenter Anneka Rice, comedian John Bishop, pop star Nadine Coyle and wheelchair basketball player-turned-presenter Ade Adepitan into the tent. Under the watchful eye of judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith, the celebrity bakers attempt decorative choux buns in the signature and tackle financiers in the technical before making a showstopping cake that represents something from their bucket list

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate (2019)
programme.desc: An augmented human and Sarah Connor must stop an advanced liquid Terminator named Rev-9 from hunting down a young girl in Mexico City, whose fate is critical to the human race. As the Rev-9 ruthlessly destroys everything and everyone in its path, the three are led to a T-800 from Sarahs past that may be their last best hope. Sci-fi adventure, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Linda Hamilton and Mackenzie Davis

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Married couple Abbie and Charlie join host Anna Richardson and feature as the first picker pair as they search for another woman to join their relationship. Plus 41 year-old actor and glamour puss Chrissie from Leeds is hoping to find husband number four

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson is joined by 25 year-old Lauren, a movie buff and professional online gamer from Camberley who is looking for a geeky gamer to be her perfect player two so she can reboot her love life after three years of being single. Ryan who is 28 and from Cheltenham, is looking for his Mr Right. As a sucker for a silver fox and a dad bod, can he find his dream guy to wake up to every morning?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including The Traitors, Ginos Cooking up Love, Lady Chatterleys Lover, I Can See Your Voice, Blowing LA, This Morning and White Christmas

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Mostafas new date Megan has a list of qualities shes looking for in a man and is trying to put the past behind her after being cheated on, while Corinne is hoping it will be third time lucky as she meets Will. Gym manager Claire is impressed by the physique of former basketball player Kenny, Tommy continues his search for Mr Right and suave Parisian Jean-Christophe bonds with twice-divorced writer and fellow wine connoisseur Sarah. Former Countdown contestant Jonny also returns, hoping for someone hell have an intellectual rapport with. Could mystical world traveller Clare be his dream woman?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for the Grasshopper Also in Carlstadt, New Jersey, a family-owned Irish restaurant. There, he lends a helping hand to Mitch Sandler, who has been struggling to live up to the expectations of his father-in-law since he invested heavily in the business. The chef also tries to improve the presentation of dishes emerging from the kitchen

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. The estranged couples two children are struggling to save the business from their parents disputes, and the visiting chef tries to shock the pair into stopping the restaurant from becoming a casualty of their quarrel

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zekes, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds himself in trouble when he steals a mobile phone from Denis Leary and subsequently uses it to land the actor a comical film role. The trouble-maker then leads his family to the ancient ruins of Machu Picchu after Marge confiscates the device and decides to use its GPS technology to track her son

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Homer and Lisa Exchange Cross Words
programme.desc: Lisa learns she is good at crossword puzzles and enters a city-wide contest. Homer opens a break-up service after discovering he has a flair for letting loved ones down, but gets himself into trouble with his daughter when he places a bet against her in the competition

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes a trip to the mall to buy a new gadget, while Bart manages to cause chaos. After making a hasty retreat, he befriends a boy named Bashir - but Homer begins to believe that his sons new pal is involved in a terrorist plot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is distressed to learn that Lenny and Carl fixed the result of a senior class presidential election, which he lost in high school - leading him to speculate on how his life would have changed for the better had he won the ballot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Nasa decides to send an average American into space as a publicity stunt - but the chances of success are jeopardised when Homer is selected for the honour. Featuring the guest voices of Buzz Aldrin and James Taylor

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer begins to believe Ned Flanders may not be so bad after all, and starts hanging around with him - but his friendliness and good cheer are not reciprocated for long

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart wins a competition and becomes the lucky owner of a fully grown elephant, which proceeds to eat his hard-up family out of house and home

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns realises he has no heir and decides to hold auditions, intending to choose one from the children of Springfield. Unfortunately, only Bart comes close to fitting the bill

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Barts antics with family dog Santas Little Helper cause mayhem, and ultimately result in Principal Skinner getting the sack and eternal do-gooder Ned Flanders being appointed in his place

programme.title: The Greatest Showman (2017)

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: First Dates

programme.desc: In Plymouth, three couples compete to host the best dinner party and win the £1,000 cash prize. Next up, charity worker Amber and marine engineer Lees basic Mexican menu doesnt go down very well. On the last night, retired businessmen Adrian and Marks well thought-out menu and unusual entertainment bring everything to a lively conclusion

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bournemouth, Dorset, PR company owners Jackie and Richard are first to host, putting on a classy evening with a few celebrity names thrown in for good measure. Next, Ross and Hanne stake their claim to the £1,000 prize, before everyone is brought to the farm for Gail and Nigels evening

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Its hammer time in the third series as the property brothers work more makeover magic. Will helping their homeowners be as tough as nails or as easy as flipping a switch? When Julie and Rob moved into their cosy home in a lakeside community, it was just the two of them. But a decade later, with two kids and dreadful design choices which lowered the value of their home, theyre fishing for a new place. Can Jonathan doll up this property? And will Drew find a home that will make frugal Rob splash the cash? Short:Rob and Julies design choices have lowered the value of their cosy lakeside home. Can Jonathan doll up the place? Will Drew persuade Rob splash the cash?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Former boxing champ and groom-to-be Jordan plans a fight-night wedding in front of thousands of people, but his fiancee Danielle dreams of a girly and intimate wedding day

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Thrill junkie Lee plans to push his unadventurous bride Aimee to the extreme with a wedding that would send most brides over the edge. While Aimee wanted to play it safe with a picturesque traditional event, Lee hopes shell take a leap of faith to be his wife

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Stephen J Cloobeck, chairman and CEO of hotel company Diamond Resorts International, becomes the first boss to go incognito at his own organisation for a second time. His mission is to rebuild a business that he has just purchased, Pacific Monarch Resorts, which has locations across the western US and Mexico. He disguises himself as an ex-construction worker who wants to open a boutique hotel, going the extra mile by having his ears pierced to complete the look

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Steve Greenbaum goes undercover among the workforce of his company PostNet, which offers design, printing and shipping services to small businesses. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations hes ever encountered

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride

programme.desc: Bowlero is a global bowling company with thousands of employees and hundreds of centres. It became a bowling giant almost overnight when it took over AMF and Bowlmor Lanes. As her alter ego Michelle, who recently lost her job as a court reporter and now wants to find a second career, Colie works as a trainee manager, a lane server, an event host and a trainee facilities manager

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Adrian Perkins, the mayor of Shreveport, Louisiana, is in charge of 3,000 employees serving its 200,000 residents. Louisianas third largest city has fallen on hard times with crime and unemployment on the rise. Mayor Perkins wants to change the fortunes of his home town and he thinks going undercover will help. As his alter ego Wayne Oliver, an unemployed steel worker looking for a new career, he works alongside a firefighter, a police officer and a parks maintenance worker to see what life is like working for the city, and gets the chance to meet his community without them knowing that theyre talking to the mayor

Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Bostons La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell

Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Matt Lucas welcomes TV presenter Anneka Rice, comedian John Bishop, pop star Nadine Coyle and wheelchair basketball player-turned-presenter Ade Adepitan into the tent. Under the watchful eye of judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith, the celebrity bakers attempt decorative choux buns in the signature and tackle financiers in the technical before making a showstopping cake that represents something from their bucket list

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate (2019)
programme.desc: An augmented human and Sarah Connor must stop an advanced liquid Terminator named Rev-9 from hunting down a young girl in Mexico City, whose fate is critical to the human race. As the Rev-9 ruthlessly destroys everything and everyone in its path, the three are led to a T-800 from Sarahs past that may be their last best hope. Sci-fi adventure, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Linda Hamilton and Mackenzie Davis

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Married couple Abbie and Charlie join host Anna Richardson and feature as the first picker pair as they search for another woman to join their relationship. Plus 41 year-old actor and glamour puss Chrissie from Leeds is hoping to find husband number four

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson is joined by 25 year-old Lauren, a movie buff and professional online gamer from Camberley who is looking for a geeky gamer to be her perfect player two so she can reboot her love life after three years of being single. Ryan who is 28 and from Cheltenham, is looking for his Mr Right. As a sucker for a silver fox and a dad bod, can he find his dream guy to wake up to every morning?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including The Traitors, Ginos Cooking up Love, Lady Chatterleys Lover, I Can See Your Voice, Blowing LA, This Morning and White Christmas

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Mostafas new date Megan has a list of qualities shes looking for in a man and is trying to put the past behind her after being cheated on, while Corinne is hoping it will be third time lucky as she meets Will. Gym manager Claire is impressed by the physique of former basketball player Kenny, Tommy continues his search for Mr Right and suave Parisian Jean-Christophe bonds with twice-divorced writer and fellow wine connoisseur Sarah. Former Countdown contestant Jonny also returns, hoping for someone hell have an intellectual rapport with. Could mystical world traveller Clare be his dream woman?

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz learn theres more to Lt Melanie Hawkins team than meets the eye as they continue their search for the gang of bank robbers. Jeffords, Boyle and Santiago begin to suspect that Gina is harbouring a secret. Ryan Phillippe, Gina Gershon and Jason Mantzoukas guest star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta and Diaz are framed for a crime they didnt commit, its up to the other members of the Nine-Nine to find out what really happened and try to save them from going to jail

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry makes fun of Adam for taking part in a school musical production, but when he finds out that Adam and Lainey have been cast in roles that require them to kiss, he tries to sabotage it by joining the stage crew. Meanwhile, substitute teacher Beverly causes chaos in Ericas class. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam creates a video that makes it look as though he and his friends beat Barry in a game of basketball, Barry demands a rematch in the school gym. Beverly tries to throw a surprise party for Murrays 50th birthday, despite his objections to the idea

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Bride Lauren and music-mad Perry are under the spotlight as they regroup with best man Michael and bridesmaid Leigh to relive their gig-themed wedding at The Forum, Kentish Town

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: The teams have 14 hours to build their own portion of a city-wide mini-figure-scale heist,featuring a bank, an art gallery, a jewellery store, a hotel, docks and a train station

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, including a man pretending to be a walrus, an incredible downhill bike run and some computer keyboard hurling

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Australian-born Adam plans a 1980s Aussie soap-themed wedding in South Shields, despite the wishes of his fiancee Rachel, who dreams of a classy, sophisticated ceremony

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil finds himself in an awkward situation when he meets his former high-school girlfriend, who confesses she still has feelings for him, while Mitchell stands up to his boss and Jay summons up the courage to confess he killed Mannys turtle

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire help out with their childrens school projects, while Gloria and Cameron spend quality time together. Elsewhere, Mitchell and Manny learn they have more in common than they thought during a trip to watch a meteor shower with Jay. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire struggles to get hold of the years must-have gadget for Phils birthday. Cam gets involved in a neighbours marital problems, while Mitchell decides it is time to toughen up. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen, Ty Burrell, Eric Stonestreet and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke and Mannys hot-tempered basketball coach quits, causing Jay and Phil to compete for the position. Elsewhere, Mitchell introduces Cameron to a prospective employer. Comedy, starring Nolan Gould, Rico Rodriguez, Ed ONeill and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for the Grasshopper Also in Carlstadt, New Jersey, a family-owned Irish restaurant. There, he lends a helping hand to Mitch Sandler, who has been struggling to live up to the expectations of his father-in-law since he invested heavily in the business. The chef also tries to improve the presentation of dishes emerging from the kitchen

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. The estranged couples two children are struggling to save the business from their parents disputes, and the visiting chef tries to shock the pair into stopping the restaurant from becoming a casualty of their quarrel

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zekes, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds himself in trouble when he steals a mobile phone from Denis Leary and subsequently uses it to land the actor a comical film role. The trouble-maker then leads his family to the ancient ruins of Machu Picchu after Marge confiscates the device and decides to use its GPS technology to track her son

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Homer and Lisa Exchange Cross Words
programme.desc: Lisa learns she is good at crossword puzzles and enters a city-wide contest. Homer opens a break-up service after discovering he has a flair for letting loved ones down, but gets himself into trouble with his daughter when he places a bet against her in the competition

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes a trip to the mall to buy a new gadget, while Bart manages to cause chaos. After making a hasty retreat, he befriends a boy named Bashir - but Homer begins to believe that his sons new pal is involved in a terrorist plot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is distressed to learn that Lenny and Carl fixed the result of a senior class presidential election, which he lost in high school - leading him to speculate on how his life would have changed for the better had he won the ballot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Nasa decides to send an average American into space as a publicity stunt - but the chances of success are jeopardised when Homer is selected for the honour. Featuring the guest voices of Buzz Aldrin and James Taylor

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer begins to believe Ned Flanders may not be so bad after all, and starts hanging around with him - but his friendliness and good cheer are not reciprocated for long

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart wins a competition and becomes the lucky owner of a fully grown elephant, which proceeds to eat his hard-up family out of house and home

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns realises he has no heir and decides to hold auditions, intending to choose one from the children of Springfield. Unfortunately, only Bart comes close to fitting the bill

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Barts antics with family dog Santas Little Helper cause mayhem, and ultimately result in Principal Skinner getting the sack and eternal do-gooder Ned Flanders being appointed in his place

programme.title: The Greatest Showman (2017)
programme.desc: After losing his job as a shipping clerk, PT Barnum creates and develops his circus in New York in the mid-1800s with the help of playwright Phillip Carlyle and an adopted family of entertainers shunned by society. Musical drama, starring Hugh Jackman, Zac Efron, Michelle Williams, Rebecca Ferguson and Zendaya

programme.desc: Viewers including Jordan and Ashley Banjo, Mel B, Martin and Roman Kemp, Fearne Cotton, Gok Wan, Clare Balding, Alice Arnold, Nick Grimshaw and Jane McDonald offer their opinions of shows including The Piano, Bridgerton, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, The Sky at Night, UKs Strongest Man 2024, The Worlds Most Luxurious Retirement Homes and Scam Interceptors

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Strictly Come Dancing, Victoria Beckham, Blue Lights, Slow Horses, Antiques Roadshow, Eva Longoria: Searching for Spain, Police Interceptors and a BBC news report on parking apps

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Talkative teacher Sarah-Jayne is looking for her Prince Charming, Ross returns to the restaurant armed with more jokes following his disappointing date with Regan, and glamorous Rachel talks to old romantic Alan about her experiences of living with OCD. programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Headstrong Mancunian make-up artist Regan returns to the restaurant and self-confessed metrosexual Jon is determined to find her soft side. Plus, alpha-male playboy Mostafa believes every girl would like to marry him, heavy metal fan Dan seems to find a kindred spirit in Sarah and Corinne is back after her catastrophic date with Rajan

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents as 22-year-old Ukrainian refugee Mariia enters the studio. Since fleeing the war, the pansexual sex therapist has settled in the UK and is now looking for love with a far-from-average man or woman who can keep up with her in the bedroom. She is followed by 24-year-old Alannah, a content creator from Bristol, who is seeking a forever bloke who can speak the language of love and feels comfortable in his body

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holts mother seeks support from the precinct when her house is burgled. Jeffords, Diaz and Boyle redecorate the breakroom. Santiago teaches Gina how to change a tyre. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz try to earn the respect of their idol, Lt Melanie Hawkins after accidentally disrupting one of her undercover cases. Boyle, Jeffords and Gina attempt to resolve a petty conflict between Scully and Hitchcock, while Holt loses Santiagos favourite pen. Guest starring Gina Gershon

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: Recipe for Death II: Kiss the Cook
programme.desc: Adam asks his father for money to film his own action movie. Erica and Beverly go clothes shopping, and Erica uses Beverlys sweaters to create her own version of a popular outfit. Comedy, starring Sean Giambrone, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam gets between Murray and Marvin when they go without him to the Philadelphia Thanksgiving Day parade to see KITT from TV show Knight Rider. Beverly invites Lainey and Bill to Thanksgiving dinner so that Barry wont split his time between two households, but her plans soon go awry. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Steph and Billy, their best man George and bridesmaid Becca relive the unforgettable piggy wedding that shocked many back in 2016

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria tricks Phil and Joe into participating in the local malls new ad campaign, technology gets the better of Jay during a video conference, and Cam faces up to a school bully

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: We Need to Talk About Lily
programme.desc: Phil thinks he has come up trumps by finding Pepper his dream home, while Mitch and Cam try to connect with Lily by getting invited to an exclusive event for her favourite vlogger

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Handlebar, Casa Roma and The Black Pearl
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he tried to save - Handlebar, Casa Roma and the Black Pearl - to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam tells Beverly that he doesnt want her to chaperone the school trip to a theme park, his mother attempts to manipulate him with guilt letters. After attending a career night, Geoff realises he doesnt want to be an eye doctor like his father

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Despite Beverlys wishes, Jackies parents allow Adam to watch horror movie A Nightmare on Elm Street, and a family disagreement ensues. Meanwhile, Erica starts hanging out at her old high school and soon realises shes not as popular as she once was

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: As the birth of Haley and Dylans twins approaches, the programme reflects on how all the family members celebrated their birthdays in the past year

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley is determined to follow the advice in her parenting books with the twins, but Phil and Claire think their old methods are better. Meanwhile, Manny is set to direct Jays dog bed commercial in the hopes of winning his ex-girlfriend back. Return of the American comedy for what is reportedly its final season, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to Giuseppis and Sante La Brea to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress? Plus, an update on Finn McCools from season one

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Jerseys Spanish Pavillion, which is run by two warring brothers whose staff spend more time using their mobile phones than working. The chef plans to turn the eaterys fortunes around, and starts by giving the dining room and menu a modern makeover

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part one of two. A prison van crash sees a mass escape of convicts take place and the entire squad has to track the villains down. Peralta and Santiago make a bet on which of them can bring in the most escaped prisoners, with the loser forced to move into the winners apartment when they start living together. Former American football star Marshawn Lynch guests

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part two of two. Only one fugitive remains on the loose on the streets of Brooklyn after the mass escape of convicts from the prison van and Peralta is forced to enlist a surprising ally in order to apprehend him. Elsewhere, Santiago and Gina attempt to introduce Boyle to proper texting etiquette. Craig Robinson guest stars

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is distressed to learn that Lenny and Carl fixed the result of a senior class presidential election, which he lost in high school - leading him to speculate on how his life would have changed for the better had he won the ballot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge helps a former convict fulfil his artistic ambitions by painting a mural at the school, but he soon clashes with Principal Skinner over the design. With the guest voice of Michael Keaton

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and his friends are recruited to the William Penn Academy baseball team. Barry remains in denial about his pitching skills, while Geoffs father interferes in his relationship with Erica

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Assisted by Geoff, Erica and Valley Erica find a new band member to replace Lainey, but Barry convinces Geoff that the new musician is trying to steal Erica from him. Adam and Murray each plot to get out of going to Valentines Day dinner with Beverly

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Alexs new company puts her up at a new luxury apartment with full amenities - and a list of high-profile residents that everyone is eager to take advantage of, without her knowing. Phil is on a mission to review the restaurants famous sliders for his food blog, while Mitch and Cam sneak in separately to meet David Beckham. Meanwhile, Luke and Manny head straight for the gym to try to pick up older women and end up in hot water. Guest starring Courtney Cox and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil pays a visit to his dad to make sure he is okay after hearing some concerning news about him. Meanwhile, Jay gives Claire and Mitch some of their old childhood memorabilia, which prompts them to revaluate a long-held memory of their first family vacation

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Marge and the kids hitch a ride on a train, where they are entertained by a tramp who tells them a series of colourful yarns based on American folklore - all of which feature characters suspiciously reminiscent of Homer

programme.desc: Viewers including Jordan and Ashley Banjo, Mel B, Martin and Roman Kemp, Fearne Cotton, Gok Wan, Clare Balding, Alice Arnold, Nick Grimshaw and Jane McDonald offer their opinions of shows including The Piano, Bridgerton, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, The Sky at Night, UKs Strongest Man 2024, The Worlds Most Luxurious Retirement Homes and Scam Interceptors

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Mostafas new date Megan has a list of qualities shes looking for in a man and is trying to put the past behind her after being cheated on, while Corinne is hoping it will be third time lucky as she meets Will. Gym manager Claire is impressed by the physique of former basketball player Kenny, Tommy continues his search for Mr Right and suave Parisian Jean-Christophe bonds with twice-divorced writer and fellow wine connoisseur Sarah. Former Countdown contestant Jonny also returns, hoping for someone hell have an intellectual rapport with. Could mystical world traveller Clare be his dream woman?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Talkative teacher Sarah-Jayne is looking for her Prince Charming, Ross returns to the restaurant armed with more jokes following his disappointing date with Regan, and glamorous Rachel talks to old romantic Alan about her experiences of living with OCD. Also meeting each other for the first time are well-groomed rom-com fan Rich and self-confessed ladette Millie

programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares lemon chicken breasts and a recipe from one of her favourite New York restaurants

programme.desc: Recipes for desserts, including fruit filled cranberry and apple cake. There is also a masterclass from patisserie chef Claudia Fleming, who prepares lemon cream napoleon

programme.title: Nadiya Bakes
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain focuses on something close to her heart - baking delicious treats to share with loved ones. Nadiya comes from a large family, so baking for others has always taken centre stage in her own home. She kicks things off with her chilli and cranberry brioche wreath, featuring fluffy indulgent dough balls surrounding an entire baked camembert cheese, creating the ultimate tear and share. Over the years, Nadiya has become an expert in catering for big family gatherings, and she has learnt that there is nothing better for impressing guests than a gigantic stack of delicious desserts. Her mini pecan pies filled with clotted cream ensure that everyone has their own little parcel of perfection. Next up is a cheats bread-and-butter pudding, using ice-cream and shop-bought croissants to slash the traditional cooking time without compromising on flavour

programme.title: Nadiya Bakes
programme.desc: This time, Nadiya Hussain shares some of her favourite recipes for low-cost baking, using ingredients that do not break the bank or compromise on flavour. Dishes include fluffy onion pretzels, a potato rosti quiche, rhubarb and custard kisses, and her signature rich and indulgent chocolate fondant

programme.title: Nadiya Bakes
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain shares some of her favourite recipes for biscuits and small bites to snack on, including chocolate-dipped florentines

programme.title: Nadiya Bakes
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain presents four recipes for special occasions - an eight-layered birthday cake, a sparkly Mardi Gras king cake, jam-filled hot cross buns and a spectacularly festive biscuit tower

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chefs culinary tour of France leads him to the diverse and distinct region of the Camargue, a natural region located south of Arles. James begins at Les Marquises, the Laurent familys farm, where he learns about the Camargue bull, and barbecues local fish for the family. Later, he visits a rice farm and cooks a risotto using his own rice-brewed beer

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef arrives in the city of Arles, famous for its Roman architecture and the largest market in Provence. While there James sets up his mobile kitchen to cook a dish of John Dory with tomatoes, courgettes and clams - all from the stalls around him. He also has a go at pottery with a local ceramicist, visits an award-winning wine producer - who causes him to rethink the merits of rose wine - and heads to an olive grove where he cooks fried lamb chops with baby aubergines

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Comfort Food
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers cook comfort food dishes straight from the oven, including a new take on steak and chips and sticky gingerbread

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Comfort Food
programme.desc: Si and Dave turn up the heat on family favourites, including roasted spiced cauliflower cheese and a Caribbean-inspired plate of jerk pork chops

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy visits a multi-generational joint bringing in Los Angeles, a Minneapolis deli serving up meatless meats, and a Hawaiian noodle spot dishing out ramen and Vietnamese crepes

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten puts a lunch cooked by her up for auction with the winning bidders testing chilled cucumber soup with shrimp, lobster and shells salad along with Eton Mess

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares her recipes for ricotta bruschetta, grilled steak and Arugula

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten provides a modern twist to classic recipes, including meatloaf and smoked salmon devilled eggs

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Chef Ina Garten prepares a roasted butternut squash salad

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares lemon chicken breasts and a recipe from one of her favourite New York restaurants

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Recipes for desserts, including fruit filled cranberry and apple cake. There is also a masterclass from patisserie chef Claudia Fleming, who prepares lemon cream napoleon

programme.title: Nadiya Bakes
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain focuses on something close to her heart - baking delicious treats to share with loved ones. Nadiya comes from a large family, so baking for others has always taken centre stage in her own home. She kicks things off with her chilli and cranberry brioche wreath, featuring fluffy indulgent dough balls surrounding an entire baked camembert cheese, creating the ultimate tear and share. Over the years, Nadiya has become an expert in catering for big family gatherings, and she has learnt that there is nothing better for impressing guests than a gigantic stack of delicious desserts. Her mini pecan pies filled with clotted cream ensure that everyone has their own little parcel of perfection. Next up is a cheats bread-and-butter pudding, using ice-cream and shop-bought croissants to slash the traditional cooking time without compromising on flavour

programme.title: Nadiya Bakes
programme.desc: This time, Nadiya Hussain shares some of her favourite recipes for low-cost baking, using ingredients that do not break the bank or compromise on flavour. Dishes include fluffy onion pretzels, a potato rosti quiche, rhubarb and custard kisses, and her signature rich and indulgent chocolate fondant

programme.title: Nadiya Bakes
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain shares some of her favourite recipes for biscuits and small bites to snack on, including chocolate-dipped florentines

programme.title: Nadiya Bakes
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain presents four recipes for special occasions - an eight-layered birthday cake, a sparkly Mardi Gras king cake, jam-filled hot cross buns and a spectacularly festive biscuit tower

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chefs culinary tour of France leads him to the diverse and distinct region of the Camargue, a natural region located south of Arles. James begins at Les Marquises, the Laurent familys farm, where he learns about the Camargue bull, and barbecues local fish for the family. Later, he visits a rice farm and cooks a risotto using his own rice-brewed beer

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef arrives in the city of Arles, famous for its Roman architecture and the largest market in Provence. While there James sets up his mobile kitchen to cook a dish of John Dory with tomatoes, courgettes and clams - all from the stalls around him. He also has a go at pottery with a local ceramicist, visits an award-winning wine producer - who causes him to rethink the merits of rose wine - and heads to an olive grove where he cooks fried lamb chops with baby aubergines

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Comfort Food
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers cook comfort food dishes straight from the oven, including a new take on steak and chips and sticky gingerbread

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Comfort Food

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Comfort Food

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Comfort Food

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves (1991)
programme.desc: English nobleman Robin of Locksley returns home from fighting in the Crusades, only to discover that his father has been murdered and his lands seized, while the local people are living in fear under the tyrannical rule of the Sheriff of Nottingham. Branded an outlaw for his defiance, Robin and his Moorish travelling companion go into hiding in the forest, where they recruit a group of bandits to fight for justice, protect the downtrodden, and foil the Sheriffs plan to seize the throne while the king is away at war. Medieval action adventure, starring Kevin Costner, Alan Rickman, Morgan Freeman, Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio, Christian Slater and Mike McShane

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Part one of two. A traveling side show, run by Dr Joshua McQueen, features the Wild Boy of the North as its main attraction. programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Part two of two. Matthews life has taken a complete turn, thanks to the love and support of so many people in Walnut Grove, and he is now living happily with Mr Edwards. The trouble is, a certain someone has called McQueen back to town, and the man will do anything to get the child back - even if it means a long and tedious court case

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Nellie Oleson returns to Walnut Grove, making her adopted sister Nancy run away. Drama, starring Allison Arngrim and Allison Balson

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Lauras childhood friend Jane Canfield comes back to Walnut Grove. Despite her blindness, she develops a fondness for Isaiah Edwards - who is twice her age - and the two gradually fall in love

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When a handsome called named Reverend Hale passes through Walnut Grove, he earns Reverend Aldens respect by making a generous donation to the Church, and is quickly accepted by the congregation as a strong and efficient speaker. However, he causes a stir when he begins secret meeting with the towns women secretly - especially as Almanzo and John are away on business

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Dr Marvin Haynes has been practising in Walnut Grove, but his failing eyesight prevents him from renewing his licence, leaving him angry and depressed over the loss of his career. Jenny is paralysed in an accident, but hope arrives in the form of Haynes who takes her as his last patient. Ralph Bellamy guest stars

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Sarah Carters father causes problems when he arrives in Walnut Grove and tries to persuade his family to give up the simple life and enjoy a luxurious existence in New York

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

Branded an outlaw for his defiance, Robin and his Moorish travelling companion go into hiding in the forest, where they recruit a group of bandits to fight for justice, protect the downtrodden, and foil the Sheriffs plan to seize the throne while the king is away at war. Medieval action adventure, starring Kevin Costner, Alan Rickman, Morgan Freeman, Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio, Christian Slater and Mike McShane

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Part one of two. A traveling side show, run by Dr Joshua McQueen, features the Wild Boy of the North as its main attraction. Roughly nine years old, the child escapes and ultimately seeks shelter with the Wilders. With the help of Doc Baker, they find some unsettling truths about him

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Part two of two. Matthews life has taken a complete turn, thanks to the love and support of so many people in Walnut Grove, and he is now living happily with Mr Edwards. The trouble is, a certain someone has called McQueen back to town, and the man will do anything to get the child back - even if it means a long and tedious court case

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Nellie Oleson returns to Walnut Grove, making her adopted sister Nancy run away. Drama, starring Allison Arngrim and Allison Balson

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: As word of a new railway station spreads, Walnut Grove residents look forward to the start of building work - until they learn the true cost of the plan

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Lauras childhood friend Jane Canfield comes back to Walnut Grove. Despite her blindness, she develops a fondness for Isaiah Edwards - who is twice her age - and the two gradually fall in love

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When a handsome called named Reverend Hale passes through Walnut Grove, he earns Reverend Aldens respect by making a generous donation to the Church, and is quickly accepted by the congregation as a strong and efficient speaker. However, he causes a stir when he begins secret meeting with the towns women secretly - especially as Almanzo and John are away on business

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Dr Marvin Haynes has been practising in Walnut Grove, but his failing eyesight prevents him from renewing his licence, leaving him angry and depressed over the loss of his career. Jenny is paralysed in an accident, but hope arrives in the form of Haynes who takes her as his last patient. Ralph Bellamy guest stars

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Sarah Carters father causes problems when he arrives in Walnut Grove and tries to persuade his family to give up the simple life and enjoy a luxurious existence in New York

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Isaiah Edwards is mistakenly identified as part of an outlaw gang when the infamous Younger brothers are released from prison and set about rebuilding their reputation

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: After substituting for Etta Plum at Walnut Groves school, Laura realises that being a housewife is not enough for her restless spirit. programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Part one of two. Charles returns to Walnut Grove with son Albert in an attempt to steer him away from the influence of bad company

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

However, the prisoner has information on several corrupt cops who intend to make sure he does not live long enough to get to court. As they lay siege to the station, the officers and prisoners inside must work together to survive. Remake of John Carpenters 1976 action thriller, starring Ethan Hawke, Laurence Fishburne, Gabriel Byrne and Ja Rule.

Thriller, with Sam Worthington, Jamie Bell, Elizabeth Banks and Ed Harris

However, he soon finds his dark past coming back to haunt him. Action thriller, starring Luke Goss, Caroline Tillette and Danny Midwinter

programme.title: Beyond Suspicion (2018)
programme.desc: On his release from a prison sentence for crimes of which he was innocent, a shamed former cop connects a murder case to a government conspiracy involving rogue agents from a top spy agency. Crime thriller, starring Karl Urban, Sofia Vergara and Andy Garcia.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A man is brought in with stomach pains and a suspected abdominal aortic aneurysm. His son receives a huge blow when he is told his father only has a 50 per cent chance of surviving the operation he urgently needs. A 33-year-old is treated after swallowing a cocktail of drugs in a suicide attempt, and staff fight to save a teenager who was stabbed in a street fight and has lost a life-threatening amount of blood

programme.title: The Antiques Riviera
programme.desc: A couple throw open their home to local dealers, only to discover they may have blown thousands on fake designer furniture. However, one item could be worth millions. Sisters Amy and Laura return to see if their inherited royal relics will fund a family holiday, and a woman grieving the loss of her parents is finally ready to part with their silver heirlooms

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A retired dockworker who suffers from diabetes is brought in with severe stomach pain and doctors believe part of his gut may have permanently stopped working, creating a life-threatening situation where immediate surgery is the only option. Other patients include a man who has twisted his knee dancing in a club, and a cyclist brought in unconscious after falling off his bike

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
