programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton visits a farm in Cornwall to get to the bottom of the flower element in a in cauliflower. Helen Lawal is in Spain to find out what makes lemon juice last so long, while Matt Tebbutt gets the beers in at a Worksop brewery, as he explores what the term bottle conditioned actually means

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: With their tour of the Highlands drawing to a close, the campers head for Scotlands northern coast, pitching up at Barrow Campsite near Nairn. Having visited five campsites, its time for Sean and Marie, Simon and Emmy, and Ian, Jen and Ellis to pick this weeks perfect pitch. But first - theres some paddleboarding, beach yoga and campfire cocktails to enjoy

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel Britain to find items to fix up and flog on to make a handsome profit for their owners. Simon recycles some historic oak, while Henry comes unstuck when he tries to get to grips with an old Ford Escort

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Susan and Ainsley from Cardiff find their perfect holiday home near Mijas on Spains Costa del Sol. The couple, who have two teenage children, feel that nows the right time to buy their dream home in their favourite holiday spot. Laura shows them five impressive properties for their budget of £200,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first of five parties from Cheltenham and Gloucester, where dinner party novice Sheree plans to wow her guests with an evening of mythical fantasy and a comprehensive menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Storyteller Chloe is the second to host in Cheltenham and Gloucester, assisted by her cat puppet as she serves up a fairy-tale feast, tall tales and plenty of dragons

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent Mike is in charge, and plans to win over his guests by hosting a relaxed evening with no theme and no fancy dress. But how will he cope when Chloe turns up with a surprise guest in tow?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In and around Cheltenham and Gloucester, Dan, the so-called King of Critique, presents a British summer time evening event. After a week in which he has been repeatedly criticising the others over their food, he has set himself up with a lot to prove as a host

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In and around Cheltenham and Gloucester, equine events organiser Holly takes her turn as host. However, she soon finds she has some hurdles to overcome. Unhappy with comments on his night, Dan is quick to bicker with Sheree. With their squabbling threatening to dominate Hollys night, it falls to Chloe and Mike to help keep the evening on course

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Ship Inn in Dymchurch, Kent, where James Tindall and Jessica Walton hope to impress their guests and be named best value for money

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Thompson Hall Retreat in Norfolk, boasting stylish shepherd huts, and run by mother and daughter duo Amanda Benton and Becci Howlett

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The White House in Swansea, where guests James and Jessica have an unusual toilet encounter in their room

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Jacobs Plough in Bicester, Oxfordshire, run by manager Duncan Froomes and bar supervisor Ryan Hunt who like to mix banter with business

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid, while also settling some scores

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Three-legged labrador Dave seeks a new best friend, and his owners Laura and Paul hope that Luna, the beautiful but nervous saluki, will win Dave over. Nine-year-old stray westie called Norman gets much attention from mother and son Lorraine and Oliver - upsetting youngster Cynthia, a Staffie cross. Meanwhile, enthusiastic setter-poodle pup Obi might just win the chance to bring the joy and chaos that Mike and his partner Tracey dont yet know they need in their lives

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: Three-year-old Ollie and his family search for a forever friend. Can Frankie the pup help Simon overcome a childhood dog attack trauma? Jaran has the chance to become Liz and Scotts first dog

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Clare Balding is joined by Claudia Winkleman for further live coverage from the National Exhibition Centre. Featuring a special event for vulnerable breeds, the terrier and hound events, and the Freestyle Heelwork to Music competition. Plus, Jim Rosenthal and Graham Partridge as canine athletes of all shapes and sizes climb, weave and jump over obstacles at top speed on the Agility course. Ellie Simmonds explores dog behaviour, and vet Dr Paul Manktelow takes viewers questions

programme.title: Astrid: Murder in Paris
programme.desc: A racehorse belonging to a prestigious stable is killed with an exotic antiquarian weapon, just before a famous race. A young stablehand has disappeared too, and Astrid and Raphaëlle theorise that there may be a connection to the suicide of his father following a horse-doping scandal a decade earlier. In French

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The documentary following life inside an AandE department returns for its first series outside London - at the Queens Medical Centre, Nottingham. Sister Lou tells her story of working at the hospital for more than 30 years and how her life completely changed in her fifties. Forty-five-year-old Kirsty has been rushed into QMC after an accident at a fun run. The team members carry out extensive tests on 93-year-old John, who is suffering from shortness of breath, and in the childrens emergency unit, seven-year-old Hunter is being assessed after falling from a tree

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Sara, 46, is rushed in after a car crash with serious head and chest injuries, and 54 year-old Simon comes in after falling off his bike on his way to buy a helmet. As his condition deteriorates, Simon looks back on his life and the things he wishes he had done differently. Sixteen year-old James comes in with a severed finger after trying to climb a fence

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: On a Friday night, the paramedics are called out to a man who has reportedly collapsed in the street and isnt breathing. Paramedics also treat a man lying unconscious in an alleyway surrounded by needles whos taken a drug overdose but refuses to go to hospital, and a four-year-old who has a high temperature and a nasty cough. On the same shift, a man is struggling to breathe with an abnormal heart rhythm and a woman has fallen and cant get up. The paramedics need to make sure she hasnt broken any bones

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth heads to the west Mani Peninsula in Greece to help house-hunters Liz and Ian find their dream holiday home where they can enjoy the sunny climate and their love of outdoor sports. programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The latest batch of patients to be treated in the AandE department of Londons Kings College Hospital includes two with serious head injuries, including a cyclist from Brighton who has been airlifted to the building. Also brought in by helicopter is a father-of-four who fell from scaffolding as he repaired a roof, while other cases include former docker Bill, who has hurt his knee while drinking at his local working mens club

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The stories of children and teenagers brought into AandE. Sixteen-year-old Ellie has suspected spinal injuries after being thrown from her horse and crushed against a fence, while consultant Jacqui Butler treats four-year-old Destiny, who has a fishbone stuck in his tonsils from his lunchtime curry. Plus, a pregnant woman experiences intense pain following a sudden haemorrhage

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: On a Thursday day shift, a young man has come off his motorbike and slid along the road while not wearing any protective clothing. A young boy is complaining of chest pains; theres a family history of heart problems and his mum is worried about him. On the same shift, a man with only one leg has suspected deep vein thrombosis and needs to be treated in hospital. Paramedics arrive at an address to find a doctor in hospital scrubs holding a baby. Its a father and son and the baby has a worrying cough while a woman is complaining of severe abdominal pain

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A call comes in from the police saying a young man has collapsed outside a nightclub and isnt breathing. Its a category one emergency - the highest priority - meaning theres an immediate threat to life. A young woman is having a sickle cell crisis. This genetic condition makes her normally round blood cells form a sickle shape, sticking together and causing excruciating pain. A woman has the highest blood pressure that one of the paramedics has ever seen, and she needs to go to hospital urgently. A former soldier collapses and is trapped behind a door, and a woman has crippling chest pains. Her condition is a medical mystery that can only be solved with a trip to AandE

programme.title: The Antiques Riviera
programme.desc: A couple throw open their home to local dealers, only to discover they may have blown thousands on fake designer furniture. However, one item could be worth millions. Sisters Amy and Laura return to see if their inherited royal relics will fund a family holiday, and a woman grieving the loss of her parents is finally ready to part with their silver heirlooms

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A retired dockworker who suffers from diabetes is brought in with severe stomach pain and doctors believe part of his gut may have permanently stopped working, creating a life-threatening situation where immediate surgery is the only option. Other patients include a man who has twisted his knee dancing in a club, and a cyclist brought in unconscious after falling off his bike

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A man is brought in with stomach pains and a suspected abdominal aortic aneurysm. His son receives a huge blow when he is told his father only has a 50 per cent chance of surviving the operation he urgently needs. A 33-year-old is treated after swallowing a cocktail of drugs in a suicide attempt, and staff fight to save a teenager who was stabbed in a street fight and has lost a life-threatening amount of blood

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton visits a farm in Cornwall to get to the bottom of the flower element in a in cauliflower. Helen Lawal is in Spain to find out what makes lemon juice last so long, while Matt Tebbutt gets the beers in at a Worksop brewery, as he explores what the term bottle conditioned actually means

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: With their tour of the Highlands drawing to a close, the campers head for Scotlands northern coast, pitching up at Barrow Campsite near Nairn. Having visited five campsites, its time for Sean and Marie, Simon and Emmy, and Ian, Jen and Ellis to pick this weeks perfect pitch. But first - theres some paddleboarding, beach yoga and campfire cocktails to enjoy

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel Britain to find items to fix up and flog on to make a handsome profit for their owners. Simon recycles some historic oak, while Henry comes unstuck when he tries to get to grips with an old Ford Escort

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Susan and Ainsley from Cardiff find their perfect holiday home near Mijas on Spains Costa del Sol. The couple, who have two teenage children, feel that nows the right time to buy their dream home in their favourite holiday spot. Laura shows them five impressive properties for their budget of £200,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first of five parties from Cheltenham and Gloucester, where dinner party novice Sheree plans to wow her guests with an evening of mythical fantasy and a comprehensive menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Storyteller Chloe is the second to host in Cheltenham and Gloucester, assisted by her cat puppet as she serves up a fairy-tale feast, tall tales and plenty of dragons

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent Mike is in charge, and plans to win over his guests by hosting a relaxed evening with no theme and no fancy dress. But how will he cope when Chloe turns up with a surprise guest in tow?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In and around Cheltenham and Gloucester, Dan, the so-called King of Critique, presents a British summer time evening event. After a week in which he has been repeatedly criticising the others over their food, he has set himself up with a lot to prove as a host

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In and around Cheltenham and Gloucester, equine events organiser Holly takes her turn as host. However, she soon finds she has some hurdles to overcome. programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Thompson Hall Retreat in Norfolk, boasting stylish shepherd huts, and run by mother and daughter duo Amanda Benton and Becci Howlett

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The White House in Swansea, where guests James and Jessica have an unusual toilet encounter in their room

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Three-legged labrador Dave seeks a new best friend, and his owners Laura and Paul hope that Luna, the beautiful but nervous saluki, will win Dave over. programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: Three-year-old Ollie and his family search for a forever friend. Can Frankie the pup help Simon overcome a childhood dog attack trauma? Jaran has the chance to become Liz and Scotts first dog

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Clare Balding is joined by Claudia Winkleman for further live coverage from the National Exhibition Centre. Featuring a special event for vulnerable breeds, the terrier and hound events, and the Freestyle Heelwork to Music competition. Plus, Jim Rosenthal and Graham Partridge as canine athletes of all shapes and sizes climb, weave and jump over obstacles at top speed on the Agility course. Ellie Simmonds explores dog behaviour, and vet Dr Paul Manktelow takes viewers questions

programme.title: Astrid: Murder in Paris
programme.desc: A racehorse belonging to a prestigious stable is killed with an exotic antiquarian weapon, just before a famous race. A young stablehand has disappeared too, and Astrid and Raphaëlle theorise that there may be a connection to the suicide of his father following a horse-doping scandal a decade earlier. In French

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The documentary following life inside an AandE department returns for its first series outside London - at the Queens Medical Centre, Nottingham. Sister Lou tells her story of working at the hospital for more than 30 years and how her life completely changed in her fifties. Forty-five-year-old Kirsty has been rushed into QMC after an accident at a fun run. The team members carry out extensive tests on 93-year-old John, who is suffering from shortness of breath, and in the childrens emergency unit, seven-year-old Hunter is being assessed after falling from a tree

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Sara, 46, is rushed in after a car crash with serious head and chest injuries, and 54 year-old Simon comes in after falling off his bike on his way to buy a helmet. programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: On a Friday night, the paramedics are called out to a man who has reportedly collapsed in the street and isnt breathing. programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: A look at one of Britains worst air disasters - the crash of British European Airways 548, which saw 118 people lose their lives. The plane plummeted shortly after taking off from Heathrow on June 18, 1972 and narrowly missed a main road before crashing into a field. Investigators were forced to rely on witness testimony to determine why the plane nosedived as there was no cockpit voice recorder on board, but both the investigation process and its results were deemed controversial

programme.desc: Clare Jackson examines how the Stuarts became fatally divided by religion, with brothers in opposition and two daughters supporting the overthrow of their father. programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.desc: In the summer of 1944, war-torn France reaches a crisis point. At its heart lies Paris - a symbol of liberty and democracy on the brink of collapse after four years of Nazi occupation. Though conquered, Parisians are yet to give in. The allied landings in Normandy and their advances through France now offer a tantalising glimmer of hope. By mid-August, a resistance-led insurrection is under way in the capital, in the hopes the allied forces will secure their liberation

programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.desc: When the US Air Force develops a new wonder bomber, they want a base close to Japan to launch their raids. Marines are tasked with taking the enemies prized home island of Iwo Jima. US Naval might pummels the island in preparation for an invasion, unaware the Japanese have withdrawn to a central mountain peak and a hidden tunnel network

programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.desc: Hitlers Nazi empire is in ruins, but there is still one city to take before the allies can declare victory. But as the British, Americans and Soviets close in on Berlin, new questions about the post-war world start to emerge. Who will rule Europe? And who will take the glory of ending the war?

programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.desc: As relentless firebombing and blockade of war-ravaged Japan shows no sign of securing a surrender, the US reluctantly prepares to invade. First, they need Okinawa, an island close to the mainland, as a base to stage their attack. The Marines fear the worst - but their amphibious invasion is met with almost total silence. Lulled into a false sense of security, its just the calm before the storm

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Phil Serrell go shopping for items of interest in Northern Ireland. Natasha is dazzled by the sight of a bright pink Majolica lotus pattern tea service and the sounds of the Irish fiddle. She even gets a mini masterclass on how to play this centuries-old instrument of the Emerald Isle. Philip is feeling the pinch and is desperate to find some profit-making antiques. He scoops up an old bowler hat, a pair of early dumbbells and a mid-19th-century worktable that reminds him of his grandmother. The duo later head to their final auction in Wales, where an unexpected bidding frenzy ensues

programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Phil Serrell go shopping for items of interest in Northern Ireland. Natasha is dazzled by the sight of a bright pink Majolica lotus pattern tea service and the sounds of the Irish fiddle. She even gets a mini masterclass on how to play this centuries-old instrument of the Emerald Isle. Philip is feeling the pinch and is desperate to find some profit-making antiques. He scoops up an old bowler hat, a pair of early dumbbells and a mid-19th-century worktable that reminds him of his grandmother. The duo later head to their final auction in Wales, where an unexpected bidding frenzy ensues

programme.title: The Shelter: Animal SOS
programme.desc: A dogs X-Ray reveals a mystery piece of metal thats making it sick, the Vet team work for weeks to get the problem resolved, but eventually surgery is the only option. An elderly pedigree cat arrives at the shelter in a dishevelled state. After a thorough grooming, the Persian is returned to her former glory and given a new name, Princess Butternut Squash

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby
programme.desc: Giles Coren and Monica Galetti work in Ashford Castle, Co Mayo. Set in 350 acres, it was founded 800 years ago by the Anglo-Norman De Burgo family, and much later became the family home of the Guinness family. With the help of hotel historian, Fintan, Giles discovers that the castle has had a rollercoaster journey through the centuries, sporadically reaching moments of real jeopardy, only to be saved by a turn of events or new owners. Giles and Monica soon learn that the secret of the castles success is the people who work here and the hotels strong, long-running community ties

programme.title: My Uni Life
programme.desc: Cameras follow the final submissions of the TU Dublin first year students who are designing an important public space for an inner-city community. University of Galway archivist Niamh Ní Charra is in Mayo to help launch President Mary Robinsons historic archive. The McElhinney family are at the National Indoor Championship to support UCD student Darragh on his journey to the Olympic games

programme.title: Dancing with the Stars

programme.title: Reeling in the Years
programme.desc: A retrospective of news and music from 1969, the year man first set foot on the surface of the moon, Paul McCartney married Linda Eastman, and John Lennon and Yoko Ono staged a week-long bed-in in the name of peace. Concorde took to the skies for the first time, while Jack Lynch won the general election and the Dublin Housing Action Committee led a campaign against homelessness

programme.title: Catherine Fulvios St Patricks Way
programme.desc: Part one of two. TV chef, food writer, and owner of Ballyknocken House and Cookery School Catherine Fulvio takes viewers on a journey along Northern Irelands Saint Patricks Way. In this edition, Catherine highlights Armaghs rich history with a guided tour from local Donna Fox, before meeting Darren Rice to explore Gosford Forest Park and learn about the Mourne Gullion Strangford area

programme.title: Tracks and Trails
programme.desc: Cameras tour Abbeyfeale to Rathkeale on the Limerick Greenway. There is also a city walk through Limericks historic core with Barry Murphy from Hermitage Green

programme.title: Its Complicated (2009)
programme.desc: Divorced couple Jane and Jake are reunited at their sons college graduation after 10 years apart, and end up sleeping together. Despite Jakes marriage to a younger woman and Janes fledgling romance with a kindly architect, the pair end up having a clandestine affair. Romantic comedy, starring Meryl Streep, Alec Baldwin and Steve Martin

programme.desc: Greg and Fiach get into a spat over Michelle. Greg in a moment of anger reveals a little too much about Michelle. Berni bravely gives her statement to OShea in the hope that Briain will be punished for what he did to her

programme.title: MasterChef: The Professionals
programme.desc: The semi-finals conclude with the second group of four chefs facing two tough challenges as they try to win a place in Finals Week and move one step closer to lifting the trophy. Once again, a pop-up restaurant opens its doors in a warehouse micro-brewery in industrial east London, setting the scene for an intriguing opening challenge. Then, the contenders have 75 minutes to cook a Desert Island Dish - something they would take with them if they were stranded on a desert island

programme.title: RTÉ News: One OClock and Weather
programme.desc: National and international news

programme.title: Eva Paus Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: Eva returns with a fresh selection of recipes bridging the gap between traditional flavours and modern life. She begins by serving up family favourites chicken katsu curry, teriyaki salmon and banana fritters

programme.title: The Shelter: Animal SOS
programme.desc: A dogs X-Ray reveals a mystery piece of metal thats making it sick, the Vet team work for weeks to get the problem resolved, but eventually surgery is the only option. An elderly pedigree cat arrives at the shelter in a dishevelled state. After a thorough grooming, the Persian is returned to her former glory and given a new name, Princess Butternut Squash

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby
programme.desc: Giles Coren and Monica Galetti work in Ashford Castle, Co Mayo. Set in 350 acres, it was founded 800 years ago by the Anglo-Norman De Burgo family, and much later became the family home of the Guinness family. With the help of hotel historian, Fintan, Giles discovers that the castle has had a rollercoaster journey through the centuries, sporadically reaching moments of real jeopardy, only to be saved by a turn of events or new owners. Giles and Monica soon learn that the secret of the castles success is the people who work here and the hotels strong, long-running community ties

programme.title: My Uni Life
programme.desc: Cameras follow the final submissions of the TU Dublin first year students who are designing an important public space for an inner-city community. University of Galway archivist Niamh Ní Charra is in Mayo to help launch President Mary Robinsons historic archive. The McElhinney family are at the National Indoor Championship to support UCD student Darragh on his journey to the Olympic games

programme.title: Dancing with the Stars
programme.desc: The RTÉ Concert Orchestra is in the studio for the annual orchestra special - which also doubles up as the quarter-final. At the end of the evening, six will become five as another competitor hangs up their dance shoes. Oti Mabuse, Brian Redmond, Arthur Gourounlian and Karen Byrne judge their efforts, while Jennifer Zamparelli and Laura Fox keep things moving

programme.title: The Tommy Tiernan Show
programme.desc: Chat show in which neither the presenter nor the viewers are told the identity of the guests in advance. With the comedian in the dark about who he will be interviewing until they walk out to greet him, anything can happen - especially if Tommy doesnt have a clue who they are

programme.title: These Sacred Vows
programme.desc: Having come on holiday to learn English, Elodie is forced to deal with the crazy Irish family who are hosting her as it seems Sandra, Jerry, and Karen are each hiding something that is making them implode - with Elodie caught in the middle. To make matters worse, she has an issue with her mum back home in France and an interaction with an older wedding guest that leaves her shaken

programme.title: Gosford Park (2001)
programme.desc: A weekend shooting party at a country estate is disrupted by a murder. As the numerous guests deal with their own personal agendas, their actions are quietly observed by their servants, notably an inquisitive maid, who drink in the scandalous gossip while maintaining their own strict social hierarchy. Robert Altmans period drama, starring Maggie Smith, Helen Mirren, Kelly Macdonald, Michael Gambon, Clive Owen and Kristin Scott Thomas

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Sidney is woken in the early hours by a fire in the village and, putting his life on the line, races to rescue Marion Taylor from the burning house, much to the relief of her husband Dominic. But there are questions surrounding the blaze - was it really an accident, and why was Marion so reluctant to leave? Normally Sidney would turn to Geordie to help solve a mystery like this, but he finds the detective is far from his usual self. When Dominic is then found stabbed to death, its Geordies junior, Atkins, who is sent to head up the case - and hes not exactly a fan of interfering vicars

programme.title: Live Six Nations Rugby Union
programme.desc: Ireland v Wales (Kick-off 8.10pm). Jacqui Hurley presents all the action from the opening match in the fourth round of fixtures, held at Aviva Stadium. Garry Ringrose was shown a 20-minute red card last year at the Principality Stadium with Ireland 10-3 ahead, and Wales made the most of the visitors being down to 14 men by scoring 15 unanswered points to lead 18-10 thanks to tries from Jac Morgan and Tom Rogers. However, Six Nations debutant Jamie Osborne then scored a brilliant try for the Irish as they fought back to win 27-18. With analysis from Jamie Heaslip, Simon Zebo and Stephen Ferris

programme.title: FIFA Womens World Cup Qualifier
programme.desc: Republic of Ireland v Netherlands (Kick-off 7.45pm). Coverage of both teams second Group A2 match, held at Stadion Galgenwaard in Utrecht. The teams last met in qualifying for the 2019 FIFA World Cup, when the Republic earned a goalless draw in Nijmegen before falling to a 2-0 defeat at home, and the Dutch will go into this match as slight favourites despite their largely good form since Carla Ward took over as head coach in January 2025. Marie Crowe presents, with analysis from Karen Duggan and Megan Campbell

programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the American actor, who shot to fame in The Godfather, before starring in Serpico, Scarface and Scent of a Woman, for which he won an Academy Award

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man on holiday in the West Indies become involved in a bizarre bet with a stranger. Starring Pamela Stephenson, Jose Ferrer and Michael Ontkean

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: Mrs Bixby and the Colonels Coat
programme.desc: An unfaithful wife receives a mink coat from her lover - and must explain the gift to her husbands satisfaction. Starring Richard Greene, Julie Harris and Michael Hordern

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: An American journalist meets a soccer star while traveling behind the Iron Curtain, but the authorities arrest the reporter as a suspected smuggler

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A young man tries to insinuate his way into a monastery in order to gain revenge on a thief whom he blames for ruining his life

programme.title: Guy Garvey: From the Vaults
programme.desc: The Elbow frontman returns to introduces more music performances from the TV archives, beginning with a selection from 1989 including the Stone Roses. Inspiral Carpets, Happy Mondays, Sonic Youth, the Las, Ice-T, Inner City and Neneh Cherry. Guy also takes a look at rarely seen footage of college rock favourites They Might Be Giants and 10,000 Maniacs and Black Francis performing an acoustic version of a Pixies classic

programme.title: Blur: Live at Wembley Stadium
programme.desc: A concert by the band at the London venue in July 2023, featuring performances of End of a Century, Parklife, To the End, Song 2, This Is a Low, Girls and Boys and The Universal

programme.title: Blur: To the End
programme.desc: Documentary tracing the relationship of the bands Damon Albarn, Graham Coxon, Alex James and Dave Rowntree over the course of three decades, unfolding against the backdrop of the quartet collaborating on 10 new songs ahead of two sold-out concerts at Wembley Stadium

programme.title: Led Zeppelin: In the Light
programme.desc: A look at the albums Houses of the Holy, Physical Graffiti, Presence and In Through the Out Door, the live film The Song Remains the Same, John Bonhams death, the bands splitting up and Live Aid

programme.title: The Doors Live at the Hollywood Bowl 68
programme.desc: Footage of a concert by the band staged at the Los Angeles amphitheatre on July 4, 1968, including performances of Alabama Song, Light My Fire and The End

programme.title: Discovering Music
programme.desc: Music critics discuss the history of the American psychedelic rock band, who had hits with Light My Fire, Riders on the Storm and Hello, I Love You

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: Artworks by Gustav Klimt, Amedeo Modigliani, Pablo Picasso and Camille Pissarro, which are expected to fetch tens of millions of pounds at Sothebys

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: Artworks by Boudin, Matisse, Dali and and Monet go on offer at Christies, as does Paul Gauguins Te Fare, which is expected to fetch up to £18million

programme.title: Bregenz: Madama Butterfly
programme.desc: A production of Puccinis opera

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Colonel George Peregrines comfortable life is disturbed when his wife writes a raunchy novel that becomes a best-seller and he becomes convinced she is having an affair. With Joss Ackland, Pauline Collins, Rupert Frazer and Gareth Thomas

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A surgeon saves the life of a wealthy patient and receives a wonderful gift - but his new asset proves a fearful liability. Starring John Alderton and Alison Fiske

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When the new vicar of a church plans radical changes, conflict arises over a secret one of the locals has kept for years

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A fencing contest in London lands naive Nicholas Lillie in the middle of a bizarre adventure. Drama, with Benedict Taylor and Jim Broadbent

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A woman joins a dating agency to try to overcome her shyness, but her plan backfires when an out-of-town solicitor tries a one-night stand

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A farmer buys a strange jar at a carnival. His wife is scared of it, but townspeople come from miles to see it - and finder Charlie becomes a local celebrity. Drama, starring Pat Buttram and Collin Wilcox

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A convict at a state prison work camp plans a clever escape with the help of the aging, alcoholic fellow prisoner whos in charge of making coffins and burying the camps deceased. Edd Byrnes and Robert Keith star

programme.title: The Beach Boys: Endless Harmony
programme.desc: A profile of the American band, featuring archive footage and interviews with band members and musicians such as Jackson Browne, Glen Campbell, Elvis Costello and Sean Lennon

programme.title: Fun in Acapulco (1963)
programme.desc: A former trapeze artist tries to put a work-related tragedy behind him by taking a job as a lifeguard and entertainer in a luxury hotel at the Mexican resort. He ends up contending with the considerable wiles of his beautiful boss and a female matador who each have romantic designs on him. Musical comedy, starring Elvis Presley, Ursula Andress, Paul Lukas and Alejandro Rey

programme.title: Landscape Artist of the Year
programme.desc: The grand finale takes place at the Falkirk Wheel , where the three artists battle it out for a prestigious £10,000 commission from the National Gallery of Ireland. Stephen Mangan presents, with judges Tai Shan Schierenberg, Kathleen Soriano and Kate Bryan

programme.title: Landscape Artist of the Year
programme.desc: The programme follows the winner of this years competition as they travel to Co Mayo to research their £10,000 prize commission for the National Gallery of Ireland

programme.title: Peter Gabriel: Live in Athens 1987
programme.desc: A concert by the singer at the hillside open-air theatre at Lycabettus, featuring hits including Solsbury Hill, Sledgehammer, This Is the Picture and Biko, with Senegalese musician Youssou NDour joining in on Gabriels In Your Eyes

programme.title: Phil Collins: Going Back to Detroit
programme.desc: The singer explores the roots and legacy of Detroits unique music scene in the 1960s and 70s, as he joins the Funk Brothers to record an album of his favourite Motown hits

programme.title: Electric Light Orchestra: Live - The Early Years
programme.desc: Highlights from three of the bands concerts in the 1970s, featuring performances at Brunel University and the New Victoria Theatre in London and on German TV show Rockpalast

programme.title: Pink Floyd: P.U.L.S.E.
programme.desc: A 1994 concert by the band in which they performed their classic 1973 album The Dark Side of the Moon at Earls Court during their Division Bell tour

programme.title: Live from Abbey Road
programme.sub-title: Paul Simon, David Gilmour, Sheryl Crow
programme.desc: Performances by Paul Simon, David Gilmour and Sheryl Crow

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: A restless Basilone is assigned to train new recruits after urging the army to give him a more active role, but finds himself becoming surprisingly close to a female sergeant at his new base. However, the pair are driven apart when he is called on to lead his trainees into battle on Iwo Jima. Second World War drama, based on the memoirs of US Marines who served in the conflict, starring Jon Seda and Annie Parisse

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: Avon puts a bounty on Omar for stealing his drug stash and McNulty and Bunk reinvestigate the murder of a woman that may be linked to Barksdales crew. Those caught in the police raid on the low-rises refuse to give up their superiors, and dealer Bodie escapes from juvenile detention. Drama, starring Dominic West and Wood Harris

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Dawns body is discovered, and Jason is suspected of killing her. Hauled in by the police, things look bleak - especially when he realises he still has the vampire blood Lafayette gave him. Initially unsure of her brothers innocence, Sookie decides to visit the Fangtasia vampire bar with Bill to uncover fresh links in the case. Vampire drama, starring Anna Paquin and Stephen Moyer

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: The Bear and the Maiden Fair
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Sansa frets about her prospects, Tyrions new situation agitates Shae, and Tywin counsels the king. Daenerys exchanges gifts with a slave lord outside Yunkai, Melisandre reveals a secret to Robert Baratheons illegitimate son Gendry, and Brienne faces a formidable foe at Harrenhal. Emilia Clarke and Peter Dinklage star in an episode written by George RR Martin, whose novels form the basis for the series

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Daenerys and her entourage discover Yunkais powerful friends are the Second Sons, an elite army of mercenaries. Determined to take the city and increase the strength of her own forces, the queen agrees to meet the sellsword companys captains - intending to make them a better offer. Meanwhile, Davos is still desperate to make Stannis see clearly and demands to see proof of Melisandres power. There is a wedding in Kings Landing, and beyond the Wall, Sam and Gilly have a chilling encounter with a foe that seems to have come straight from their nightmares. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke and Liam Cunningham

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: Pauls next session with Gina gets off to a bad start when he asks her to read his letter to Alex and has to dodge all of her concerns about why he has chosen to send it. He accuses her of not taking responsibility for her patients, resulting in their first fight, but she takes a gentler tack when he begins discussing Walters suicide attempt. Drama, starring Gabriel Byrne

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: At Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming discovers more little-known facts on a journey between Smithfields and Spitalfields, two of Londons most famous markets. He begins with a fry-up breakfast before visiting the remains of a Roman amphitheatre and investigating a mysterious secret in a Liverpool Street hotel, as well as meeting former EastEnders star Larry Lamb (Archie Mitchell)

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores Newcastle, discovering strange sounds by the river and finding out how traditional culture is being reinterpreted in the Byker district. He goes behind the scenes at Newcastle United with local football hero Peter Beardsley, learns about the history of adult comic Viz from former editor Simon Donald and accompanies comedienne Sarah Millican to her favourite part of the city

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Carmela receives surprising news about one of Tonys past relationships. Meadow asks a dangerous favour, and Juniors retaliation against Christopher and Brendan takes a deadly turn

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Uncle Junior seeks revenge on Brendan, and a smitten Tony has Dr Melfi followed. Anthony Jr gets into trouble at school - and ends up finding out a few home truths about his father

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: The Thompson brothers become engaged in a battle of wills with Van Alden, as they try to prevent the sole survivor of the shooting from revealing anything about the incident. Jimmy begins to worry about what his family got up to while he was at war, while Nucky endures a torrid round of negotiations with Chalky White. Meanwhile, Margaret is surprised when she gets a new job - but her colleagues have no interest in making her feel welcome. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Michael Pitt and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Jimmy hides in Chicago under the protection of Torrio and Al Capone, but an act of violence threatens to cause further bloodshed. Back in Atlantic City, Nucky encourages his brother to solve the racially-motivated killing of one of Chalkys employees, and Lucky Luciano falls for Jimmys showgirl mother. Crime drama, starring Michael Pitt, Greg Antonacci, Stephen Graham and Steve Buscemi

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Margaret asks Nucky to shut down a bootlegging operation - but when he fails to take her complaint seriously, she angrily decides to take matters into her own hands. In Chicago, Jimmy tries to help Pearl recover from her attack, but finds Torrio wants to kick her out of the Four Deuces. Meanwhile, Eli is desperate to impress the guests at a prestigious St Patricks Day dinner, and Rothstein becomes infuriated by press speculation. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nuckys weekly takings are stolen in a mugging on the Boardwalk - and the finger of suspicion points firmly at Luciano. In Chicago, Jimmy sees a different side of Al Capone when he joins his family for dinner, before the pair try to broker an agreement between Torrio and Sheridan. Van Alden gets a surprise visit from his boss, and Margaret and Lucy have a vicious argument at the lingerie store. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Michael Pitt, Stephen Graham and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky is forced to confront painful memories from his childhood when his father suffers an accident at home, but is surprised when Margaret seems unwilling to hear about his past. Jimmy goes to hospital, where he befriends a disfigured former soldier with an intriguing story to tell. Meanwhile, Angela worries about how her clandestine affair will affect her future, Chalkys suspicions are aroused by a mysterious visitor, and Lucy makes a desperate bid for Nuckys affections. Prohibition-era drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Kelly Macdonald and Michael Pitt

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky heads for the Republican Party convention in Chicago, where he tries to influence plans for the presidential election - and crosses paths with Jimmy once more. Back in New Jersey, Eli is eager to prove he can step into his brothers shoes, while Van Alden struggles to deal with his wifes problems, Gillian tries to offer Angela financial advice, and an alcohol-fuelled Lucy causes a scene at the Ritz - forcing Margaret to intervene. Prohibition-era drama, starring Steve Buscemi and Michael Pitt

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Jimmy returns to Atlantic City, having decided to work with Nucky again - but is determined to do it on his own terms. However, he is surprised to learn that neither his boss nor Angela had been expecting him. Meanwhile, an under-pressure Mme Jeunet begs Margaret to persuade Nucky to lower her rates, Rothstein welcomes a new face into the fold, and Robert Dittrich raises Angelas hopes of getting her big break in the art world. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Michael Pitt and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky gets an unexpected opportunity for revenge on his would-be assassins, and enlists Chalky to help bring them down. Masked sniper Richard Harrow struggles to fit in at his new lodgings, while Margaret is delighted when a law is passed giving women the right to vote - unaware that the good news has made her an increasingly important part of Nuckys plans. Meanwhile, a dressing-down from Elliott causes Val Aldens behaviour to become increasingly erratic. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Kelly Macdonald and Michael Kenneth Williams

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The various warring factions of Westeros receive news of the events of the wedding at the Twins. In Kings Landing, Joffrey stands up to his grandfather Tywin, Daenerys discovers whether shell be remembered as a conqueror or a liberator in Yunkai, and mercy comes from a surprising source in Dragonstone. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke, Charles Dance and Jack Gleeson

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion is sent out to welcome a royal party from Dorne outside the walls of Kings Landing, and Jon Snow finds himself on trial at Castle Black over his time with the wildlings and the death of Qhorin Halfhand. Daenerys heads toward the slave city of Meereen, and Arya runs into a familiar face. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: When Clark and Floyd learn that both their marriages have stalled, they begin to explore a new dating app for extramarital affairs. Black comedy, starring David Harbour, Jason Bateman and Linda Cardellini

programme.title: The Time Travelers Wife
programme.desc: In the clearing behind her home, six-year-old Clare Abshire encounters 36-year-old time traveller Henry DeTamble for the first time. Fourteen years later, an unexpected reunion at the library gives Henry the opportunity to meet Clare. Adaptation of Audrey Niffeneggers novel, starring Rose Leslie and Theo James

programme.title: Task
programme.sub-title: Out Beyond Ideas of Wrongdoing and Rightdoing, There Is a River
programme.desc: The task force, Dark Hearts and Robbie converge in the woods, leading to a dramatic showdown with far-reaching consequences for all involved. In the aftermath, Tom turns his attention back to his now fragmented team as the FBI launches an investigation

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: The detail receives cloned pagers to get a lead on the Barksdale gangs plans, but has trouble cracking a code used by the dealers - until a solution arrives from an unlikely source. Stringer warns DAngelo there might be an informant in his crew, Carver and Herc track down Bodie, and Omar makes McNulty and Greggs an offer. Drama, starring Dominic West, Idris Elba and Larry Gilliard Jr

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Sookie tells Bill she has decided to stop seeing him and accepts Sams invitation to go on a date - but things do not go as planned. Elsewhere, Jason continues to score vampire blood from Lafayette, and also takes an interest in Tara. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin and Stephen Moyer

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Robb and his bannermen gather at the Twins in the northern Riverlands to attend the wedding of Lord Edmure Tully and Roslin Frey, daughter of Lord Walder. Elsewhere, Jon faces his harshest test to date, Daario and Ser Jorah debate how to take Yunkai, and Bran discovers a new gift. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire novels, starring Richard Madden, Michelle Fairley and David Bradley

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The various warring factions of Westeros receive news of the events of the wedding at the Twins. In Kings Landing, Joffrey stands up to his grandfather Tywin, Daenerys discovers whether shell be remembered as a conqueror or a liberator in Yunkai, and mercy comes from a surprising source in Dragonstone. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke, Charles Dance and Jack Gleeson

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: Mia tells Paul she confronted her father about her childhood, but the resulting argument left her unable to leave her bed for three days. She then threatens to leave therapy, before challenging Paul to break his professional boundaries by sleeping with her. Drama, starring Gabriel Byrne and Hope Davis

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham residents raise money for a statue to commemorate fishermen lost at sea, but Pat Seddons plan to support the cause by participating in a fundraising skydive worries her friends and relatives. Jan Hart goes trawling for scallops, and shares some ancient superstitions

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Pat Seddon considers selling up and visits a clairvoyant, while celebrity chef Mitch Tonks makes an appearance at Brixhams Crab Festival

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The seven kingdoms of Westeros prepare for all-out war as newly crowned King in the North Robb Stark marches south to avenge his father. Tyrion Lannister arrives in Kings Landing to curb the excesses of teenage tyrant Joffrey, and Stannis Baratheon, brother of the late King Robert, sets his sights on the Iron Throne. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire novels, starring Stephen Dillane, Richard Madden, Peter Dinklage and Jack Gleeson

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion turns his anger on Cersei for alienating Joffreys subjects in the wake of the capitals bloody purge, and Theon returns to the Iron Islands for first time in nine years, where he discovers his father Balon is planning to rebel against the crown once again. Arya shares a secret with her new friend Gendry while travelling north to the Wall, and Davos Seaworth recruits an ally who may prove useful in Stannis Baratheons naval invasion of Kings Landing

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: What Is Dead May Never Die
programme.desc: Tyrion strengthens his position as Hand of the King with a risky gambit devised to identify the member of the small council in league with his sister Cersei, while at Winterfell, Maester Luwin tries to help Bran make sense of his dreams. Catelyn travels to the Stormlands to foster an alliance with the Baratheons, but King Renly, his new wife Margaery Tyrell and her brother Ser Loras have other plans. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Robb Starks chain of victories against the Lannisters enrages Joffrey, who punishes Sansa for her brothers successes. Tyrion struggles to find a way to curb his nephews cruel excesses and enlists Cerseis lover Lancel as an informant. Catelyn urges the Baratheon brothers to forgo their ambitions and unite against a common enemy, while across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys and her exhausted retinue arrive at the walled city of Qarth

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Catelyn is forced to flee when the Baratheon brothers rivalry comes to a bloody end, and Lord Baelish spots an opportunity to further his own ambitions. Tyrion discovers Joffrey is planning to use a secret weapon to defend his seat of power, and Theon sails for the Stony Shore to prove his worth as a Greyjoy. Arya receives a favour from the man she freed from Harrenhal, and the Nights Watch arrives at the Fist of the First Men to stem the advance of the wildling army

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: The Old Gods and the New
programme.desc: King Joffreys tyrannical rule prompts the people of Kings Landing to riot, with near devastating consequences for Sansa. Meanwhile, beyond the Wall, Qhorin gives Jon a chance to prove himself. and across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys resolve strengthens as she vows to reclaim what she believes is rightfully hers. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Theons determination to prove his Ironborn status prompts him to embark on a hunt. Daenerys receives an invitation that could prove useful to her cause, and Jaime Lannisters fortunes appear to change after a meeting with a relative among Robb Starks captives. Fantasy drama, starring Alfie Allen, Emilia Clarke and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: King in the North Robb Stark is incensed when he learns he has been betrayed by one of his closest friends, while his fugitive sister Arya calls in a debt, leaving mysterious convict Jaqen Hghar with a difficult decision to make. Meanwhile, across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys is presented with a dilemma as she struggles to negotiate with the seemingly egalitarian lords of Qarth

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: King Joffreys days on the Iron Throne appear to be numbered as Stannis lays claim to his late brother Roberts realm with a naval assault on Kings Landing. The realities of all-out war leave the young tyrant reeling, and it is left to his sharp-witted uncle Tyrion to launch a defensive strategy that could save his family and decide the fate of the seven battle-scarred kingdoms of Westeros. Jack Gleeson, Peter Dinklage and Stephen Dillane star in an episode written by George RR Martin, whose novels form the basis for the series

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Theon Greyjoy stirs his men into action as Maester Luwin offers some final advice, Arya receives a gift from the mysterious Jaqen, and Daenerys summons the courage to enter the House of the Undying. Meanwhile, Jon proves his worth as a brother of the Nights Watch to Qhorin Halfhand. Fantasy drama, based on George RR Martins Song of Ice and Fire novels, and starring Maisie Williams, Kit Harington and Alfie Allen

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Sansa grows in confidence under the watchful eye of the Machiavellian Lord Baelish, while Tyrion is after his just reward for the part he played in the Battle of the Blackwater. In the far North, Jon Snow is brought before formidable wildling leader Mance Rayder (Ciaran Hinds) and attempts to earn the trust of the King-beyond-the-Wall. Across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys Targaryen arrives in Slavers Bay with adviser Ser Jorah Mormont looking to form an army. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire series of novels, starring Peter Dinklage, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Shae sneaks into Tyrions chamber to tell him Ros warned her about Baelishs interest in Sansa, who goes to tea with Margaery and her grandmother Lady Olenna and is encouraged to speak freely about Joffrey. Jaime passes the time by taunting his escort Brienne, Arya encounters outlaw group the Brotherhood Without Banners, while Lord Karstark makes Robb aware he no longer has faith in him. Fantasy drama, guest starring Diana Rigg

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: In April 1986, workers and firefighters put their lives on the line to try to deal with an explosion at the Chernobyl nuclear power plant near the city of Pripyat in Ukraine. Fact-based drama, starring Jared Harris, Emily Watson and Stellan Skarsgard

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: With millions of lives already at risk, Ulana races to warn leading Soviet nuclear physicist Valery Legasov about the threat of second, devastating explosion

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Drama following the exploits of various guests and employees at the tropical White Lotus resort over the course of a week. In the opening episode, tensions quickly arise between the hotel staff and the volatile vacationers that have recently arrived at the resort. Rachel approaches Nicole for advice, Paula and Olivia lose track of their stash, while a revived Mark attempts to connect with Quinn. Starring Murray Bartlett and Connie Britton

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Belinda walks a fine line with Tanya, Armond deals with his guilt and Rachel seeks advice from Nicole. Elsewhere, Mark reconnects with Quinn

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In the midst of a brutal storm, Danvers and Navarro find themselves stuck at Tsalal with no electricity or means of contact. As the truth about what happened to Annie and the Tsalal men unfolds, Navarro and Danvers each confront the demons from their past.

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: Avon puts a bounty on Omar for stealing his drug stash and McNulty and Bunk reinvestigate the murder of a woman that may be linked to Barksdales crew. Those caught in the police raid on the low-rises refuse to give up their superiors, and dealer Bodie escapes from juvenile detention. Drama, starring Dominic West and Wood Harris
