programme.desc: The Thompson brothers become engaged in a battle of wills with Van Alden, as they try to prevent the sole survivor of the shooting from revealing anything about the incident. Jimmy begins to worry about what his family got up to while he was at war, while Nucky endures a torrid round of negotiations with Chalky White. Meanwhile, Margaret is surprised when she gets a new job - but her colleagues have no interest in making her feel welcome. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Michael Pitt and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Jimmy hides in Chicago under the protection of Torrio and Al Capone, but an act of violence threatens to cause further bloodshed. Back in Atlantic City, Nucky encourages his brother to solve the racially-motivated killing of one of Chalkys employees, and Lucky Luciano falls for Jimmys showgirl mother. Crime drama, starring Michael Pitt, Greg Antonacci, Stephen Graham and Steve Buscemi

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Margaret asks Nucky to shut down a bootlegging operation - but when he fails to take her complaint seriously, she angrily decides to take matters into her own hands. In Chicago, Jimmy tries to help Pearl recover from her attack, but finds Torrio wants to kick her out of the Four Deuces. Meanwhile, Eli is desperate to impress the guests at a prestigious St Patricks Day dinner, and Rothstein becomes infuriated by press speculation. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nuckys weekly takings are stolen in a mugging on the Boardwalk - and the finger of suspicion points firmly at Luciano. In Chicago, Jimmy sees a different side of Al Capone when he joins his family for dinner, before the pair try to broker an agreement between Torrio and Sheridan. Van Alden gets a surprise visit from his boss, and Margaret and Lucy have a vicious argument at the lingerie store. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Michael Pitt, Stephen Graham and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky is forced to confront painful memories from his childhood when his father suffers an accident at home, but is surprised when Margaret seems unwilling to hear about his past. Jimmy goes to hospital, where he befriends a disfigured former soldier with an intriguing story to tell. Meanwhile, Angela worries about how her clandestine affair will affect her future, Chalkys suspicions are aroused by a mysterious visitor, and Lucy makes a desperate bid for Nuckys affections. Prohibition-era drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Kelly Macdonald and Michael Pitt

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky heads for the Republican Party convention in Chicago, where he tries to influence plans for the presidential election - and crosses paths with Jimmy once more. Back in New Jersey, Eli is eager to prove he can step into his brothers shoes, while Van Alden struggles to deal with his wifes problems, Gillian tries to offer Angela financial advice, and an alcohol-fuelled Lucy causes a scene at the Ritz - forcing Margaret to intervene. Prohibition-era drama, starring Steve Buscemi and Michael Pitt

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Jimmy returns to Atlantic City, having decided to work with Nucky again - but is determined to do it on his own terms. However, he is surprised to learn that neither his boss nor Angela had been expecting him. Meanwhile, an under-pressure Mme Jeunet begs Margaret to persuade Nucky to lower her rates, Rothstein welcomes a new face into the fold, and Robert Dittrich raises Angelas hopes of getting her big break in the art world. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Michael Pitt and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky gets an unexpected opportunity for revenge on his would-be assassins, and enlists Chalky to help bring them down. Masked sniper Richard Harrow struggles to fit in at his new lodgings, while Margaret is delighted when a law is passed giving women the right to vote - unaware that the good news has made her an increasingly important part of Nuckys plans. Meanwhile, a dressing-down from Elliott causes Val Aldens behaviour to become increasingly erratic. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Kelly Macdonald and Michael Kenneth Williams

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The various warring factions of Westeros receive news of the events of the wedding at the Twins. In Kings Landing, Joffrey stands up to his grandfather Tywin, Daenerys discovers whether shell be remembered as a conqueror or a liberator in Yunkai, and mercy comes from a surprising source in Dragonstone. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke, Charles Dance and Jack Gleeson

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion is sent out to welcome a royal party from Dorne outside the walls of Kings Landing, and Jon Snow finds himself on trial at Castle Black over his time with the wildlings and the death of Qhorin Halfhand. Daenerys heads toward the slave city of Meereen, and Arya runs into a familiar face. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: When Clark and Floyd learn that both their marriages have stalled, they begin to explore a new dating app for extramarital affairs. Black comedy, starring David Harbour, Jason Bateman and Linda Cardellini

programme.title: The Time Travelers Wife
programme.desc: In the clearing behind her home, six-year-old Clare Abshire encounters 36-year-old time traveller Henry DeTamble for the first time. Fourteen years later, an unexpected reunion at the library gives Henry the opportunity to meet Clare. Adaptation of Audrey Niffeneggers novel, starring Rose Leslie and Theo James

programme.title: Task
programme.sub-title: Out Beyond Ideas of Wrongdoing and Rightdoing, There Is a River
programme.desc: The task force, Dark Hearts and Robbie converge in the woods, leading to a dramatic showdown with far-reaching consequences for all involved. In the aftermath, Tom turns his attention back to his now fragmented team as the FBI launches an investigation

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: The detail receives cloned pagers to get a lead on the Barksdale gangs plans, but has trouble cracking a code used by the dealers - until a solution arrives from an unlikely source. Stringer warns DAngelo there might be an informant in his crew, Carver and Herc track down Bodie, and Omar makes McNulty and Greggs an offer. Drama, starring Dominic West, Idris Elba and Larry Gilliard Jr

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Sookie tells Bill she has decided to stop seeing him and accepts Sams invitation to go on a date - but things do not go as planned. Elsewhere, Jason continues to score vampire blood from Lafayette, and also takes an interest in Tara. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin and Stephen Moyer

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Robb and his bannermen gather at the Twins in the northern Riverlands to attend the wedding of Lord Edmure Tully and Roslin Frey, daughter of Lord Walder. Elsewhere, Jon faces his harshest test to date, Daario and Ser Jorah debate how to take Yunkai, and Bran discovers a new gift. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire novels, starring Richard Madden, Michelle Fairley and David Bradley

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The various warring factions of Westeros receive news of the events of the wedding at the Twins. In Kings Landing, Joffrey stands up to his grandfather Tywin, Daenerys discovers whether shell be remembered as a conqueror or a liberator in Yunkai, and mercy comes from a surprising source in Dragonstone. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke, Charles Dance and Jack Gleeson

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: Mia tells Paul she confronted her father about her childhood, but the resulting argument left her unable to leave her bed for three days. She then threatens to leave therapy, before challenging Paul to break his professional boundaries by sleeping with her. Drama, starring Gabriel Byrne and Hope Davis

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham residents raise money for a statue to commemorate fishermen lost at sea, but Pat Seddons plan to support the cause by participating in a fundraising skydive worries her friends and relatives. Jan Hart goes trawling for scallops, and shares some ancient superstitions

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Pat Seddon considers selling up and visits a clairvoyant, while celebrity chef Mitch Tonks makes an appearance at Brixhams Crab Festival

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The seven kingdoms of Westeros prepare for all-out war as newly crowned King in the North Robb Stark marches south to avenge his father. Tyrion Lannister arrives in Kings Landing to curb the excesses of teenage tyrant Joffrey, and Stannis Baratheon, brother of the late King Robert, sets his sights on the Iron Throne. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire novels, starring Stephen Dillane, Richard Madden, Peter Dinklage and Jack Gleeson

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion turns his anger on Cersei for alienating Joffreys subjects in the wake of the capitals bloody purge, and Theon returns to the Iron Islands for first time in nine years, where he discovers his father Balon is planning to rebel against the crown once again. Arya shares a secret with her new friend Gendry while travelling north to the Wall, and Davos Seaworth recruits an ally who may prove useful in Stannis Baratheons naval invasion of Kings Landing

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: What Is Dead May Never Die
programme.desc: Tyrion strengthens his position as Hand of the King with a risky gambit devised to identify the member of the small council in league with his sister Cersei, while at Winterfell, Maester Luwin tries to help Bran make sense of his dreams. Catelyn travels to the Stormlands to foster an alliance with the Baratheons, but King Renly, his new wife Margaery Tyrell and her brother Ser Loras have other plans. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Robb Starks chain of victories against the Lannisters enrages Joffrey, who punishes Sansa for her brothers successes. Tyrion struggles to find a way to curb his nephews cruel excesses and enlists Cerseis lover Lancel as an informant. Catelyn urges the Baratheon brothers to forgo their ambitions and unite against a common enemy, while across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys and her exhausted retinue arrive at the walled city of Qarth

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Catelyn is forced to flee when the Baratheon brothers rivalry comes to a bloody end, and Lord Baelish spots an opportunity to further his own ambitions. Tyrion discovers Joffrey is planning to use a secret weapon to defend his seat of power, and Theon sails for the Stony Shore to prove his worth as a Greyjoy. Arya receives a favour from the man she freed from Harrenhal, and the Nights Watch arrives at the Fist of the First Men to stem the advance of the wildling army

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: The Old Gods and the New
programme.desc: King Joffreys tyrannical rule prompts the people of Kings Landing to riot, with near devastating consequences for Sansa. Meanwhile, beyond the Wall, Qhorin gives Jon a chance to prove himself. and across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys resolve strengthens as she vows to reclaim what she believes is rightfully hers. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Theons determination to prove his Ironborn status prompts him to embark on a hunt. Daenerys receives an invitation that could prove useful to her cause, and Jaime Lannisters fortunes appear to change after a meeting with a relative among Robb Starks captives. Fantasy drama, starring Alfie Allen, Emilia Clarke and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: King in the North Robb Stark is incensed when he learns he has been betrayed by one of his closest friends, while his fugitive sister Arya calls in a debt, leaving mysterious convict Jaqen Hghar with a difficult decision to make. Meanwhile, across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys is presented with a dilemma as she struggles to negotiate with the seemingly egalitarian lords of Qarth

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: King Joffreys days on the Iron Throne appear to be numbered as Stannis lays claim to his late brother Roberts realm with a naval assault on Kings Landing. The realities of all-out war leave the young tyrant reeling, and it is left to his sharp-witted uncle Tyrion to launch a defensive strategy that could save his family and decide the fate of the seven battle-scarred kingdoms of Westeros. Jack Gleeson, Peter Dinklage and Stephen Dillane star in an episode written by George RR Martin, whose novels form the basis for the series

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Theon Greyjoy stirs his men into action as Maester Luwin offers some final advice, Arya receives a gift from the mysterious Jaqen, and Daenerys summons the courage to enter the House of the Undying. Meanwhile, Jon proves his worth as a brother of the Nights Watch to Qhorin Halfhand. Fantasy drama, based on George RR Martins Song of Ice and Fire novels, and starring Maisie Williams, Kit Harington and Alfie Allen

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Sansa grows in confidence under the watchful eye of the Machiavellian Lord Baelish, while Tyrion is after his just reward for the part he played in the Battle of the Blackwater. In the far North, Jon Snow is brought before formidable wildling leader Mance Rayder (Ciaran Hinds) and attempts to earn the trust of the King-beyond-the-Wall. Across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys Targaryen arrives in Slavers Bay with adviser Ser Jorah Mormont looking to form an army. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire series of novels, starring Peter Dinklage, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Shae sneaks into Tyrions chamber to tell him Ros warned her about Baelishs interest in Sansa, who goes to tea with Margaery and her grandmother Lady Olenna and is encouraged to speak freely about Joffrey. Jaime passes the time by taunting his escort Brienne, Arya encounters outlaw group the Brotherhood Without Banners, while Lord Karstark makes Robb aware he no longer has faith in him. Fantasy drama, guest starring Diana Rigg

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: In April 1986, workers and firefighters put their lives on the line to try to deal with an explosion at the Chernobyl nuclear power plant near the city of Pripyat in Ukraine. Fact-based drama, starring Jared Harris, Emily Watson and Stellan Skarsgard

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: With millions of lives already at risk, Ulana races to warn leading Soviet nuclear physicist Valery Legasov about the threat of second, devastating explosion

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Drama following the exploits of various guests and employees at the tropical White Lotus resort over the course of a week. In the opening episode, tensions quickly arise between the hotel staff and the volatile vacationers that have recently arrived at the resort. Rachel approaches Nicole for advice, Paula and Olivia lose track of their stash, while a revived Mark attempts to connect with Quinn. Starring Murray Bartlett and Connie Britton

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Belinda walks a fine line with Tanya, Armond deals with his guilt and Rachel seeks advice from Nicole. Elsewhere, Mark reconnects with Quinn

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In the midst of a brutal storm, Danvers and Navarro find themselves stuck at Tsalal with no electricity or means of contact. As the truth about what happened to Annie and the Tsalal men unfolds, Navarro and Danvers each confront the demons from their past.

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion assumes new responsibilities, Jon is taken to the imposing Fist of the First Men, and Jaime strikes a deal with his captors. Meanwhile, Daenerys meets with the slavers as she moves to build an army. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Pet Sematary (1989)
programme.desc: A father tries to resurrect his dead son by placing him in an enchanted burial ground but the plan backfires with devastating results. Horror, starring Dale Midkiff, Fred Gwynne and Denise Crosby, with a cameo appearance by author Stephen King, whose book provided the basis for the film

programme.title: Pitch Black (2000)
programme.desc: A spaceship crashes on a desolate alien planet inhabited by nocturnal predators. The creatures fear of light seems to guarantee the survivors safety - but when an eclipse takes place, they face a desperate struggle to survive. Their only hope lies with a convicted murderer, who is equally at home in the darkness - but is far from trustworthy. Sci-fi horror, starring Vin Diesel and Radha Mitchell

programme.title: Salems Lot (2024)
programme.desc: A writer attempts to destroy vampires in a small American town. Horror based on Stephen Kings novel of the same name, starring Lewis Pullman, Makenzie Leigh, Jordan Preston Carter and Alfre Woodard

programme.title: The Cinema List: Jurassic (2025)
programme.desc: Welcome to a Cinema List 65 million years in the making, going through the best moments from the Jurassic franchise - from the 1993 original to Jurassic World: Dominion

programme.title: Hero (2002)
programme.desc: A warlord in ancient China sends out messengers throughout his kingdom to declare a reward for whoever can kill three assassins intent on murdering him. In response, a warrior arrives at the rulers palace and claims that he has already defeated the would-be killers, but his story does not quite ring true. Martial arts adventure, starring Jet Li, Tony Leung Chiu Wai and Maggie Cheung Man-Yuk. In Mandarin

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: American Sniper (2014)
programme.desc: A Navy Seal becomes a legend to his colleagues thanks to his skills as a deadly sniper. On his return to the US following four tours of duty in Iraq, he finds living an ordinary life as a husband and father far more difficult to deal with than the demands of warfare. Biopic based on the experiences of real-life Iraq conflict veteran Chris Kyle, directed by Clint Eastwood and starring Bradley Cooper, Sienna Miller and Kyle Gallner

programme.title: Dunkirk (2017)
programme.desc: Allied soldiers from Belgium, the British Empire and France are surrounded by the German army, and face a tense wait for evacuation, during a fierce battle in northern France during the Second World War. Christopher Nolans wartime drama, which he wrote, directed and produced, starring Kenneth Branagh, Tom Hardy, Mark Rylance and Fionn Whitehead

programme.title: Hero (2002)
programme.desc: A warlord in ancient China sends out messengers throughout his kingdom to declare a reward for whoever can kill three assassins intent on murdering him. In response, a warrior arrives at the rulers palace and claims that he has already defeated the would-be killers, but his story does not quite ring true. Martial arts adventure, starring Jet Li, Tony Leung Chiu Wai and Maggie Cheung Man-Yuk. In Mandarin

programme.title: The Bodyguard (1992)
programme.desc: Rachel Marron, a famous singer and actress is subjected to death threats by an obsessive fan and persuaded to hire a former secret service agent as her bodyguard. However, neither she or her new minder realise the effect they are about to have on each others lives. Romantic thriller directed by Mick Jackson, starring Kevin Costner, Whitney Houston, Gary Kemp and Bill Cobbs

programme.title: Dunkirk (2017)
programme.desc: Allied soldiers from Belgium, the British Empire and France are surrounded by the German army, and face a tense wait for evacuation, during a fierce battle in northern France during the Second World War. Christopher Nolans wartime drama, which he wrote, directed and produced, starring Kenneth Branagh, Tom Hardy, Mark Rylance and Fionn Whitehead

programme.title: Sinners (2025)
programme.desc: Hoping to escape their troubled pasts, twin brothers return to their hometown to start over, only to find an even darker force waiting to welcome them back. Writer/director Ryan Cooglers blockbusting horror thriller, starring Michael B Jordan, Miles Caton and Saul Williams

programme.title: Troy (2004)
programme.desc: A Trojan prince elopes with the king of Spartas wife, sparking a bitter and bloody war between a mighty alliance of Greek kings and the city of Troy, whose champion engages in intense personal conflict with the enemys most formidable warrior. Wolfgang Petersens adventure, inspired by Homers epic poem The Iliad, with Brad Pitt, Eric Bana, Orlando Bloom, Brian Cox, Sean Bean and Peter OToole

programme.title: Taxi Driver (1976)
programme.desc: An isolated, misanthropic New York cab driver becomes increasingly disturbed by the corruption he sees all around him. His desperate attempts to make connections with a political campaigner and a teenage prostitute, whom he feels compelled to save, seem doomed to failure, and he is gradually driven towards a brutal act of violence. Martin Scorseses drama, starring Robert De Niro, Jodie Foster, Cybill Shepherd and Harvey Keitel

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Love Story (1970)
programme.desc: Two students at Harvard University fall in love, but their romance is fated to be cut tragically short by the discovery that one of them has a terminal illness. Romantic drama, starring Ali MacGraw, Ryan ONeal and Ray Milland

programme.title: Singin in the Rain (1952)
programme.desc: A silent-movie star tries to win the heart of an aspiring actress as the introduction of sound changes the film business for ever. However, his frequent on-screen love interest does not take kindly to this real-life romance. Musical comedy, starring Gene Kelly, Debbie Reynolds, Donald OConnor, Jean Hagen and Millard Mitchell. Songs include Make em Laugh, You Are My Lucky Star and the title number

programme.title: The Blues Brothers (1980)
programme.desc: Two criminal brothers discover the orphanage where they were raised faces closure unless the nuns who run it can pay their tax bill, so the pair embark on an urgent mission to revive their old blues band to raise the money needed. Comedy, starring John Belushi, Dan Aykroyd, Aretha Franklin, James Brown, Ray Charles, Cab Calloway, Carrie Fisher, John Candy and John Lee Hooker

programme.title: May December (2023)
programme.desc: Twenty years after their notorious tabloid romance gripped the nation, a married couple buckles under pressure when an actress arrives to do research for a film about their past. Director Todd Haynes drama, starring Natalie Portman, Chris Tenzis and Julianne Moore

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop (1984)
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berkoff

programme.title: The Wedding Singer (1998)
programme.desc: A failed rock star carves out a career as a popular wedding singer, but his hopes for a bright future are dashed when his fiancee jilts him at the altar and he tries to shut himself off from the outside world. At one of his functions, a waitress catches his eye - but unfortunately for him, she is already engaged to someone else. Romantic comedy set in the 1980s, starring Adam Sandler and Drew Barrymore

programme.title: About a Boy (2002)
programme.desc: An idle womaniser pretends to be a father to meet women in a single mothers group - but he starts to change his selfish ways when a lonely youngster with a depressed mum becomes emotionally attached to him. Romantic comedy adapted from Nick Hornbys novel, starring Hugh Grant, Toni Collette, Nicholas Hoult and Rachel Weisz

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary (2001)
programme.desc: A single woman begins a new year with resolutions to find love, quit her bad habits and take a step up the career ladder. Her plans crumble as she tries to deal with her mothers infidelity, get over a passionate fling with her boss and come to terms with her feelings for an uptight lawyer. Romantic comedy based on Helen Fieldings novel, starring Renee Zellweger, Hugh Grant and Colin Firth

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: The disaster-prone journalist seems to have finally found the perfect boyfriend. However, when the couple start to squabble over their personal habits, she decides to decamp for a while to Thailand and write a travelogue. Unfortunately, she has reckoned without the reappearance of a duplicitous old flame - and a spell behind bars in a Thai prison. Romantic comedy sequel, with Renee Zellweger, Colin Firth, Hugh Grant, Jim Broadbent and Gemma Jones

programme.title: Terms of Endearment (1983)
programme.desc: A woman supports her daughter despite their differences over three tumultuous decades. The indomitable matriarch disapproves of her daughters marriage and finds grandmotherhood hard to get used to, but is fiercely protective of her family when tragedy strikes. Oscar-winning drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Debra Winger, Jack Nicholson, Danny DeVito and Jeff Daniels

programme.title: Risky Business (1983)
programme.desc: An upper-class suburban teenager gets involved with a prostitute while his parents are away on holiday, turning the family home into a brothel and jeopardising his plans for the future. Coming-of-age comedy, starring Tom Cruise, Rebecca De Mornay, Bronson Pinchot and Joe Pantoliano

programme.title: M3GAN 2.0 (2025)
programme.desc: Two years following M3GANs rampage, her creator, Gemma, resorts to resurrecting her infamous creation in order to take down Amelia, the military-grade weapon built by a defense contractor who stole M3GANs underlying tech, which has turned on its creators. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Violet McGraw, Jemaine Clement and Allison Williams

programme.title: Plainclothes (2025)
programme.desc: An undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies orders when he falls for a target. Writer/director Carmen Emmis thriller, starring Tom Blyth, Russell Tovey and Maria Dizzia

programme.title: Reckless (2026)
programme.desc: A former convict on parole must outwit the police to get his share of an old heist. Action comedy, starring Scott Adkins, Vinnie Jones, and former EastEnders star Dean Gaffney

programme.title: The Cinema List: Brit Hit
programme.desc: Celebrating the best of British. Featuring classics like Snatch and Bridget Jones. Expect iconic performances and a uniquely British blend of humour and heart

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon (2025)
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, where Vikings and dragons have been enemies for generations, young warrior Hiccup breaks tradition by forming an unlikely bond with Toothless, a feared Night Fury. Live action fantasy adventure, starring Mason Thames, Nico Parker and Gerard Butler

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: The Gentleman (2025)
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman

programme.title: Plainclothes (2025)
programme.desc: An undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies orders when he falls for a target. Writer/director Carmen Emmis thriller, starring Tom Blyth, Russell Tovey and Maria Dizzia

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch (2025)
programme.desc: When a man thinks he witnesses an abduction, he turns to his next-door neighbour, an ex-security guard, to help solve the case. Thriller, starring Jeffrey Dean Morgan, Jack Quaid and Malin Akerman

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth (2025)
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth (2025)
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey

programme.title: Bring Her Back (2025)
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Lauras home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins

programme.title: Plainclothes (2025)
programme.desc: An undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies orders when he falls for a target. Writer/director Carmen Emmis thriller, starring Tom Blyth, Russell Tovey and Maria Dizzia

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Reckless (2026)
programme.desc: A former convict on parole must outwit the police to get his share of an old heist. Action comedy, starring Scott Adkins, Vinnie Jones, and former EastEnders star Dean Gaffney

programme.title: King Ivory (2024)
programme.desc: Tulsa narcotics cop Layne West is locked in a battle with the citys criminal underworld. When his son becomes addicted to fentanyl, West teams up with his partner Ty and FBI agent Beatty to bring down those responsible. Thriller, starring James Badge Dale and Ben Foster

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. programme.title: Bring Her Back (2025)
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Lauras home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins

programme.title: Murders That Shocked the Nation
programme.desc: The presenter explores the case of John Straffen, who killed two young girls in the summer of 1951. He was found to be unfit to plead and committed to Broadmoor Hospital, but during a brief escape from the facility in 1952 he killed again. It was determined that the cause of his behaviour was severe brain damage, traced back to an attack of encephalitis as a child in India. When he died in 2007, he was the longest-serving prisoner in Britain

programme.title: I Am Burt Reynolds (2020)
programme.desc: Family and friends of the iconic Hollywood actor come together to share memories of his life and fruitful career, from its beginnings in Old Hollywood through to breakout roles in Deliverance and The Longest Yard, to the smash hit, Smokey and the Bandit and on to Boogie Nights

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: The former sprint superstar and Olympic gold medalist discusses the individuals that have inspired him in his life and career

programme.title: Hill
programme.desc: A profile of ex-Formula One driver Damon Hill, revealing how he overcame the adversity of losing his father Graham to follow in his footsteps and become world champion himself

programme.title: Schmeichel
programme.desc: Documentary profile of Peter Schmeichel, the goalkeeper who won the Euros with Denmark in 1992 and was part of Manchester Uniteds 1999 treble-winning squad

programme.title: When We Were Kings (1996)
programme.desc: Leon Gasts Oscar-winning documentary charting the challenge of an ageing Muhammad Ali for George Foremans World Heavyweight title held in Zaire in 1974. The film explores the impact of Alis visit to Africa before focusing on the epic fight, dubbed the Rumble in the Jungle, which has gone down in history as one of the greatest of all time. Spike Lee and Norman Mailer are among the contributors offering personal opinions on its importance to them

programme.title: The Last Rider

He begins with a towpath exploration of industrial engineering along the Leeds and Liverpool Canal. programme.title: Curse of the Ancients
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts reveals how archaeologists are shedding light on one of historys most mysterious periods. For 300 years after the collapse of Rome, Saxons and Vikings rampaged through Europe. However, these pagan societies then seemed to disappear. From new discoveries of Viking settlements and burials in Scandinavia, to the last stand of paganism against Christendom in Poland, Alice reveals the catastrophes, calamities and disasters which helped shape modern Europe

Egos flare across Rust Valley as the teams prepare for the race

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: American couple and civil rights activists Betty and Barney Hill, who claimed they were abducted by extraterrestrials in a rural area of New Hampshire in September 1961. What really happened to the hills that night? Was this a real case of aliens among us or a couple just looking for attention?

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: The remarkable story of retired war gamer Gilbert Roberts, officer Jean Laidlaw and the Womens Royal Navy Service (WRNS) - aka the Wrens - as they use revolutionary war gaming tactics to defeat Admiral Karl Donitz and his Wolf Pack fleets of U-boats in the Battle of the Atlantic during the Second World War. The Second World War breaks out and a force of U-boats try to starve Britain into submission. Meanwhile, Vera Laughton Mathews recruits talented women into the WRNS. Narrated by Derek Jacobi

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: After the fall of France in 1940, Donitzs most famous U-boat commanders embarked on a race to send British merchant ships to the bottom of the sea. Driven by a fierce competition to sink the highest tonnage, they terrorised the North Atlantic convoys and converged on them in wolfpack attacks. All the while, Vera Laughton Mathews Wrens worked around the clock to bring the battle directly to Donitzs U-boats. When confronted with unprecedented losses, and the real risk of starvation, the British Royal Navy seized on a manoeuvre developed by the famous U-boat hunter, Commander Johnny F Walker. Narrated by Derek Jacobi

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: The story of the Womens Royal Naval Service (WRNS) who helped take down Germanys fearsome U-boats. Narrated by Derek Jacobi

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers

Roberts and Laidlaw uncovered a fatal flaw in the Royal Navys anti-U-boat strategy and developed their own countertactic. Their next task was winning over the Admiralty. Narrated by Derek Jacobi

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers

programme.desc: Part two of two. The secrets behind animals group games, from dolphins that play catch to a hyena tug of war, revealing the benefits they gain from their playful behaviour. programme.title: Age of the Big Cats
programme.desc: The series unravels a story of world domination through the plight of the lion and the tiger. Travelling back in time, the documentary tells a story of adaptation and survival to reveal how lions conquered the world and the tiger became the real undisputed king of the jungle

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: A young boys trip to the toilet is interrupted by a snake hiding under the toilet rolls and Stuart faces off against an old foe

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Surf life savers call the team for help after finding a red bellied black snake in their board room. Stuart and Oliva attempt to remove three pythons from a building site

programme.title: Dogs with Extraordinary Jobs
programme.desc: A look at some working dogs. A German shepherd mix search-and-rescue dog and her Los Angeles firefighter partner search for survivors after a mudslide, while elsewhere spaniels use their noses to search for underground water leaks, with their human handlers

programme.title: Dogs with Extraordinary Jobs
programme.desc: A look at the use of dogs natural instinct to love, nurture and protect, including a blind Philadelphia woman who has found a new lease of life thanks to her new running mate and a Jack Russell caring for a surprising array of species in Namibia

programme.title: Secret Life of the Koala
programme.desc: Profile of the eucalyptus-eating, tree-hugging Australian icons. The creatures live in the east and south-east parts of the continent. This episode reveals how their behaviours differ in different regions

programme.title: Secret Life of the Koala
programme.desc: While koalas may seem lazy, their behaviour drastically changes during mating season. As the season of love begins, the documentary follows two males on a mission to mate

programme.title: Wild Family Ties
programme.desc: Following animal protagonists as they fall in love, build families and take care of their little ones and comparing their relationships to those in humans

programme.title: Wild Family Ties
programme.desc: Exploring what it is like to be a parent in the animal kingdom

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: A look at some of the animals that take a playful approach to surviving Australia

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: A look at some of Australias most sinister animals and the clever means of survival that lie behind each of these creatures sinister traits

programme.title: My Best Friends an Animal
programme.desc: Cameras check in on Elsa the sloth with Pedro, who has dedicated his life to her care after a fall left her paralysed

programme.title: Shark: British Isles Special with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Naturalist Steve Backshall goes in search of some of the 30-plus shark species that inhabit waters of the British Isles, showing how the big fish in home waters are just as astonishing and mysterious as their global cousins. Along the way he encounters a four-ton basking shark near the Hebrides and dives with his favourite of all time, the blue shark, off the coast of Cornwall. He also meets scientists and conservationists in Wales who are working to protect endangered species

programme.title: Deep in the Heart
programme.desc: A celebration of Texan wildlife, showing the world through the eyes of catfish, ocelots and other native creatures and discovering how conservation efforts can save habitats. Narrated by Matthew McConaughey

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands with Eoin Warner
programme.desc: A journey through Irelands Atlantic islands. This edition focuses on winter and early spring on the west coast, where red deer battle on windswept Inishvickillane

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands with Eoin Warner
programme.desc: The wildlife presenter wanders in Clares magical woods and witnesses hundreds of basking sharks engaged in a mating display

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals
programme.sub-title: From the Seas to the Skies
programme.desc: Part one of two. The naturalist explores the evolution of vertebrates over the past 500 million years, beginning with a look at how remarkable advances allowed primitive fish to make the radical move on to land, and then take to the skies with the advent of flight. He uses fossils of both ancient and living species combined with CGI and film to chart their journey out of the water to populate all corners of the globe

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals
programme.desc: The naturalist concludes his two-part exploration of the evolution of vertebrates over the past 500 million years by looking at the history of mammals. He traces their journey from humble origins as tiny nocturnal forest-dwellers to their astonishing explosion in diversity and domination of the world following the death of the dinosaurs

programme.title: Pride Rules
programme.desc: A look at lion prides, witnessing births, deaths and battles galore as the Waterfront Pride fights to maintain control over the banks of Botswanas Chobe River

programme.title: Super Shark Highway
programme.desc: The southern team test new migration tech, while the northern team catch and tag bull sharks in a bid to help local swimmers

programme.title: Carpathian Predators
programme.desc: The Carpathian Mountains stretch across seven European countries. Vast primeval forests, steep gorges and isolated peaks offer a vital refuge to some of the continents most charismatic creatures. The opening instalment of this two-part documentary takes place in the summer months. A mother brown bear struggles to find food for her two cubs before the winter arrives. A pair of lynx kittens venture away from their den and honeybees pollinate flowers

programme.title: Carpathian Predators
programme.desc: Part two of two. The role played by one of the most misunderstood creatures of the Carpathian mountains - the Eurasian wolf

programme.title: Pride Rules
programme.desc: A look at lion prides, witnessing births, deaths and battles galore as the Waterfront Pride fights to maintain control over the banks of Botswanas Chobe River

programme.title: Super Shark Highway
programme.desc: The southern team test new migration tech, while the northern team catch and tag bull sharks in a bid to help local swimmers

programme.title: Wild Fighters
programme.desc: An investigation into the different reasons that lead animals to fight, from power and territory to family and food - beginning with the most basic of instincts - the fight for life

programme.title: Wild Fighters
programme.desc: The documentary reveals how, for species that live in packs or pods, the survival of each individual is tied to the success of the group

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: A Dogs Purpose (2017)
programme.desc: A dog is reincarnated as different breeds over several generations, with multiple owners and with a variety of names, but he is fated to be reacquainted, decades later, with his original owner. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Quaid, with the voice of Josh Gad

programme.title: Shrek (2001)
programme.desc: Anti-social ogre Shrek resolves to stop an evil ruler from banishing fairy-tale characters to his swampland home. However, the reluctant hero ends up forced to rescue the beautiful Princess Fiona from a castle guarded by a dragon, aided only by a wisecracking donkey. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, John Lithgow, Cameron Diaz, Eddie Murphy and Vincent Cassel

programme.title: The NeverEnding Story (1984)
programme.desc: A lonely boy, neglected by his father and bullied at school, finds comfort in a mysterious book about a young heros quest to save his world from destruction. However, as he reads the tale, he begins to become part of the story. Fantasy adventure based on Michael Endes novel, starring Barret Oliver, Noah Hathaway, Gerald McRaney, Moses Gunn and Patricia Hayes

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorins Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: Lemony Snickets A Series of Unfortunate Events (2004)
programme.desc: Three orphans are entrusted into the care of their sinister uncle, a master of disguise who intends to kill them for the family fortune. Quickly realising he is up to no good, the children flee, moving from one prospective guardian to the next - but their wily relative is never far behind. Comedy adventure based on the childrens books, starring Jim Carrey, Meryl Streep, Jude Law, Liam Aitken and Emily Browning, with Kara and Shelby Hoffman

programme.title: Wicked (2024)
programme.desc: Green-skinned Elphaba Thropp becomes part of the new intake at Shiz University, and shares a room with fellow spell-caster Galinda Upland. Its the beginning of a friendship which culminates in an epic showdown as Elphaba transforms a renegade witch with a skill for bursting into show-stopping songs, like Defying Gravity. Part one of The Wizard of Oz prequel based on the hit stage musical, starring Cynthia Erivo, Ariana Grande-Butera, Jonathan Bailey, Michelle Yeoh and Jeff Goldblum

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon (2024)
programme.desc: Harold and pals Moose and Porcupine live in a hand-drawn world of limitless possibilities. The trio become concerned when the Old Man, who narrates their illustrated existence, suddenly falls silent. Using his magical crayon, Harold draws a door to the real world and tumbles into the present day as a flesh-and-blood man, who collides head-on with widow Terry and her young son, Mel. Family adventure, starring Zachary Levi, Lil Rel Howery, Zooey Deschanel and Benjamin Bottani

programme.title: Oliver! (1968)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning musical version of the stage play based on Charles Dickens classic tale about a lonely workhouse orphan who ends up on the cold streets of London, where he falls under the wing of petty crook Fagin and his gang of young backstreet thieves. Featuring the iconic songs Food, Glorious Food, Consider Yourself, As Long as He Needs Me and Youve Got to Pick a Pocket or Two. Starring Ron Moody, Mark Lester, Oliver Reed, Jack Wild, Harry Secombe, Shani Wallis and Leonard Rossiter

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat (2003)
programme.desc: Two bored youngsters are led on a series of zany misadventures when a manic moggy comes knocking at their door with a magical stovepipe hat on his head and mischief in mind. Comedy fantasy based on the childrens book by Dr Seuss, starring Mike Myers, Alec Baldwin, Dakota Fanning and Spencer Breslin

programme.title: The NeverEnding Story (1984)
programme.desc: A lonely boy, neglected by his father and bullied at school, finds comfort in a mysterious book about a young heros quest to save his world from destruction. However, as he reads the tale, he begins to become part of the story. Fantasy adventure based on Michael Endes novel, starring Barret Oliver, Noah Hathaway, Gerald McRaney, Moses Gunn and Patricia Hayes

programme.title: Widow Clicquot (2023)
programme.desc: In the late 18th century, a group of women create the Veuve Clicquot champagne business. Drama, starring Haley Bennett, Tom Sturridge and Sam Riley

programme.title: Little Women (1994)
programme.desc: Four sisters are raised by their strong-willed mother while their father is away fighting in the American Civil War. Although one yearns to become a writer and another dreams of being married, the girls remain firmly united as the family steers a course through hard times and tragic events. Period drama, based on Louisa May Alcotts novel, with Winona Ryder, Susan Sarandon, Claire Danes, Samantha Mathis and Kirsten Dunst

programme.title: The United States Vs. Billie Holiday (2021)
programme.desc: The acclaimed singer is targeted by the Federal Department of Narcotics with an undercover sting operation led by Federal Agent Jimmy Fletcher, with who she had a tumultuous affair. Director Lee Daniels biopic based on the novel by Johann Hari, starring Andra Day, Trevante Rhodes and Natasha Lyonne

programme.title: Miss Congeniality (2000)
programme.desc: A feminist FBI agent is sent undercover as a contestant in the Miss United States pageant when the event becomes the target of a terrorist bomb threat. As she is not exactly catwalk material, a veteran British coach is brought on board to oversee her transformation into a glamorous beauty queen. Comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Michael Caine, Benjamin Bratt, Candice Bergen and William Shatner

programme.title: Little Women (1994)
programme.desc: Four sisters are raised by their strong-willed mother while their father is away fighting in the American Civil War. Period drama, based on Louisa May Alcotts novel, with Winona Ryder, Susan Sarandon, Claire Danes, Samantha Mathis and Kirsten Dunst

programme.title: Lee (2023)
programme.desc: American fashion model-turned-war photographer Lee Miller is determined to document the truth of the Nazi regime, and in spite of the odds stacked against female correspondents, she captures some of the most important images of the Second World War. Fact-based drama, starring Kate Winslet, Andy Samberg, Alexander Skarsgard and Marion Cotillard

programme.title: Oceans 8 (2018)
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of brother Danny, light-fingered Debbie Ocean plans to steal the Toussaint, a $150million necklace from Vogues Met Gala, with the help of a famous actress. Crime caper, starring Sandra Bullock, Cate Blanchett, Anne Hathaway and Mindy Kaling

programme.title: Wonder Woman (2017)
programme.desc: An Amazon princess who grows up in enchanted realm has her first encounter with the outside world during the First World War. American airman Steve Trevor crash lands on her isolated island home. Determined to bring the chaos sweeping the world to an end, she ventures onto the front line in an attempt to bring down an ancient and powerful evil force that is driving the human race towards destruction. Director Patty Jenkins blockbusting fantasy adventure, starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine and David Thewlis

programme.desc: After two Roma womens lives collide in the suburbs of Madrid, they are forced to make a difficult choice between community and love. Award-winning LGBTQ+ drama, starring Rosy Rodríguez and Zaira Romero

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Romans death gives Russell free reign to lure the loyalist vampires to his anti-human cause, and as Salome reveals her true allegiances, Bill and Eric are given a taste of the blood of Lilith. Meanwhile, Sam is given an opportunity to put his shape-changing powers to good use as he sets out to track down the gang responsible for the attacks on the shifters. Supernatural drama, starring Stephen Moyer and Alexander Skarsgard

programme.title: True Blood
programme.sub-title: Somebody That I Used to Know
programme.desc: The Chancellors return to the Authority headquarters and revel in the aftermath of tasting Liliths blood. Meanwhile, Sookie and Jason are aided by the fairies as they visit the site where their parents died. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin, Stephen Moyer and Alexander Skarsgard

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Another chance to see the cliffhanger that brought the last series to an end, as a curtain-raiser to the new series starting soon. Danny, Connor and Abby race to stop Helen wiping out the whole of humankind, coming under attack from raptors and pterosaurs as they journey through several anomalies. Fantasy drama, starring Jason Flemyng, Andrew Lee Potts and Hannah Spearritt

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: After a year trapped in the Cretaceous period, Connor and Abby find a lost anomaly device in a raptors bower and escape back to their own time, only to discover ARC has been privatised and taken over by a new regime led by scientific entrepreneur Philip Burton (Star Trek: Deep Space Nines Alexander Siddig) - and their services are no longer required. Hannah Spearritt and Andrew-Lee Potts star, with Ben Mansfield, Ben Miller, Ciaran McMenamin and Ruth Kearney

programme.desc: Love is in the air as Waverly and Nicole celebrate their engagement with an enchanted evening. Dominique Provost-Chalkley and Katherine Barrell star

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and a team of paranormal investigators visit Jamaica Inn, Cornwall, an 18th-century hostelry thought to be haunted by the ghost of a man in a tricorne hat

programme.desc: Legendary villain Professor Moriarty is accidentally recreated and proceeds to wreak havoc aboard the Enterprise. Sci-fi adventure, guest starring Stephanie Beacham

programme.desc: The Enterprise crew investigates two suspicious deaths on a space station close to the Klingon border, but when Geordi reads the duty logs of one of the suspects, he starts to fall in love with her. Sci-fi drama, starring LeVar Burton and Patrick Stewart

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Troi wakes to discover she has been surgically transformed as part of Spocks plans to unite the Vulcans and Romulans. Sci-fi adventure, starring Marina Sirtis

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew finds a deactivated humanoid robot floating in space and BElanna manages to repair it - only to end up being abducted. Sci-fi drama, starring Kate Mulgrew and Roxann Dawson

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway forms a strategic alliance with Kazon factions, hoping to lay the ground rules for a mutually beneficial pact - but realises the warlike aliens are not so easily appeased. Sci-fi capers, starring Kate Mulgrew and Robert Beltran

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Lieutenant Paris breaks the Warp 10 barrier, but the fulfilment of his ambition results in unforeseen and terrifying biological changes which even the Doctor cannot cure. Sci-fi adventure, starring Robert Duncan McNeill and Robert Picardo

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Tuvok explores Ensign Suders psyche in a bid to discover why he killed a fellow crew member - but their meeting of minds proves to have deadly consequences. Sci-fi drama, starring Kate Mulgrew and Tim Russ

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A heavily populated planet comes under threat from a rogue Cardassian missile stolen and reprogrammed by Maquis rebels, leaving the crew struggling to intercept the weapon before it is too late. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kate Mulgrew

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: As the third series of the sci-fi drama unfolds, the critical event that marked the end of the last season threatens to consume the outside world. Dolores develops a relationship with Caleb, and comes to learn how artificial beings are treated in the real world. Starring Evan Rachel Wood, Aaron Paul and Vincent Cassel

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: Maeve finds herself in a new park and meets a ghost from the past. Meanwhile, Bernard makes his way back to Westworld. Starring Evan Rachel Wood and Thandie Newton

programme.title: Westworld

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: Bernard and Ashley infiltrate a private charity event, Dolores and Caleb make plans, and The Man in Black prepares to re-enter society. Starring Evan Rachel Wood and Aaron Paul

programme.title: Law and Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Broadway star Marc Landry falls to his death after his flying harness fails during a performance of a play based on the Greek myth of Icarus. Goren and Eames are called in when it becomes clear the rigging had been tampered with, and the detectives talk to director Amanda Rollins about the significance of a bouquet of flowers with peacock feathers delivered to the victim. Goren also pays a visit to old friend and mythology lecturer Cleo Andrews for expert advice. Guest starring Cynthia Nixon and Patti Smith

programme.title: Law and Order: Criminal Intent
programme.sub-title: To the Boy in the Blue Knit Cap
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the long-running crime drama, twins Parker and Thomas Gaffney are found dead in the offices of a successful internet dating website. It emerges they believed the companys owner Danielle Magee had stolen their business idea after they employed her as a programmer and had filed a lawsuit against her. Goren attends his final therapy session and finds his future in the force is in question. Vincent DOnofrio stars

programme.title: Law and Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A web of lies and betrayal is uncovered when a woman is faced with video of a night she cant remember. Carisi tries to move on from his ordeal

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: McCall helps a concerned wife locate her husband before he and an extremist group carry out an imminent bombing in the city. She also worries that her anonymity will be compromised when Delilah asks her to participate in a mother-daughter social media video

programme.title: Law and Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames are called out to an apparent suicide, but come to different initial conclusions as to whether Theresa Esperna actually killed herself or was murdered. Further investigation reveals that she worked at a bank whose only client was the Catholic Church and her specific role was to manage the trust fund set up to pay compensation settlements in sexual abuse cases involving priests. Crime drama, starring Kathryn Erbe and Vincent DOnofrio

programme.title: Law and Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A programmer working for a defence contractors cyberwarfare department falls to his death from an apartment building. Goren and Eames discover he was a hacker secretly employed by a rival company under a false identity, and a woman claiming to be a friend of the victim says they were actually on a mission to destroy both businesses. Guest starring Michael Kelly (House of Cards) and Jeri Ryan (Body of Proof)

programme.title: Law and Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Broadway star Marc Landry falls to his death after his flying harness fails during a performance of a play based on the Greek myth of Icarus. Goren and Eames are called in when it becomes clear the rigging had been tampered with, and the detectives talk to director Amanda Rollins about the significance of a bouquet of flowers with peacock feathers delivered to the victim. Goren also pays a visit to old friend and mythology lecturer Cleo Andrews for expert advice. Guest starring Cynthia Nixon and Patti Smith

programme.title: Law and Order: Criminal Intent
programme.sub-title: To the Boy in the Blue Knit Cap
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the long-running crime drama, twins Parker and Thomas Gaffney are found dead in the offices of a successful internet dating website. It emerges they believed the companys owner Danielle Magee had stolen their business idea after they employed her as a programmer and had filed a lawsuit against her. Goren attends his final therapy session and finds his future in the force is in question. Vincent DOnofrio stars

programme.title: Law and Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames are called out to an apparent suicide, but come to different initial conclusions as to whether Theresa Esperna actually killed herself or was murdered. Crime drama, starring Kathryn Erbe and Vincent DOnofrio

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Angus wants a garden that reminds him of his favourite holiday destination, Cyprus. Currently he hates his awkward shaped plot and absolutely loathes the domineering dark grey retaining wall, which he thinks makes the space look like a prison yard. Angus loves to barbeque and entertain friends so would like a generous Cypriot-inspired space in which to do that and is also keen to try to grow his own produce. Lee Burkhill and Flo Headlam head to Southampton to address his needs on a budget of £6,000

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: Constant rain threatens the harvesting of the oat crop so Peter Ginn tries to fashion a weather vane in the hope of predicting future conditions, before the team deploys the latest in farming technology, including a tractor and an Edwardian film crew captures progress. The town enjoys a grand fete where new innovations of the era such as the electric lightbulb, the petrol-powered Lister engine and a genuine flying machine are showcased

programme.title: The Wild Gardener
programme.desc: Colin Stafford-Johnson cuts his wildflower meadow. With the flowering season coming to an end it is time to remove his first-year growth to make room for the native plants that lie waiting in the soil beneath. Working through the winter Colin reflects on his journey so far and plans the busy spring and summer months ahead

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as buyers bid for the neon sign of a Soho sex shop and a piece of the wedding cake of William and Catherine, the Prince and Princess of Wales. Plus, one of only five remaining copies of Henry Becks redesign of the London Tube map dating back to the 1930s

programme.title: Futtocks End (1970)
programme.desc: A general invites a motley group of guests to stay at his country estate - and chaos ensues. Silent comedy. starring Ronnie Barker, Michael Hordern and Roger Livesey

programme.desc: DIY expert Dave Wellman is in West Midlands, using reclaimed bricks during a masterclass in old English brickwork

programme.title: Come Play With Me (1977)
programme.desc: A nurse at a health farm takes over running the establishment, and comes up with her own range of sexual treatments. Meanwhile, two forgers on the run hide out at the farm. Sex comedy, starring Mary Millington, Alfie Bass and Irene Handl

programme.title: House of Whipcord (1974)

Horror, starring Penny Irving, Barbara Markham, Patrick Barr and Ray Brooks

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and his team travel to Walsall to surprise young widow Nina Perrin Seedhouse. With three children under seven to look after, she does not have time for anything else, so her garden is a blank canvas. Its up to the green-fingered experts to finally realise the dream garden her husband was going to create for his family

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: In Moorland, Somerset, Alan Titchmarsh surprises the Colquhouns, a couple devastated by the floods of 2014, which arrived in the wake of a major health problem. Sheila had to undergo treatment for breast cancer, but after moving back home, in the year the couple will retire and celebrate their 40th wedding anniversary, Alan and the team attempt to transform their flood-wrecked garden

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team head for rural Cornwall, where they create a spectacular contemporary garden for Chris Finney, a former serviceman who was awarded the George Cross in 2003. A space age-inspired area - complete with solar dome - will test Chriss knowledge as a novice gardener, and provide a stimulating haven for his young family

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team head to Chessington to create a car-themed garden for hospital worker and automobile fan Alan Rendall. In July 2014, he managed to rescue his unconscious neighbour, Roy Whiteway, from his burning house, but was unable to save Dorothy, Roys wife, as the fire was so intense. To recognise his bravery, Alan and the team surprise the whole Rendall family and turn their featureless plot into an automobile-inspired haven

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team are in Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, where they meet deaf couple Asif Iqbal and wife Sabina. The green-fingered experts attempt to turn a boring lawn and crumbling patio into a Bollywood dream garden with an outdoor kitchen for Asif, Sabina and their family

programme.title: Vendetta for the Saint (1969)
programme.desc: The suave anti-hero investigates a murder in Naples, but ends up facing the Sicilian Mafia. Action adventure, starring Roger Moore, Ian Hendry and Rosemary Dexter

programme.title: Heartbreakers (2001)
programme.desc: Mother and daughter Max and Page develop a canny system of conning rich bachelors out of a fortune. Max marries the target, then Page seduces him, allowing for a lucrative divorce settlement. However, the scheme is threatened when Page falls in love, while a former victim tracks Max down hoping to give their marriage another chance. Comedy, starring Sigourney Weaver, Jennifer Love Hewitt, Gene Hackman, Ray Liotta and Jason Lee.

programme.title: Got It Made (1974)
programme.desc: Norfolk-set coming-of-age drama. Mere days before her wedding, an aristocratic girl discovers some hideous truths about the people closest to her. Contains sexual scenes.

programme.title: School For Sex (1969)
programme.desc: A fraudster hatches a plan to open his own finishing school, where women can learn how to use sex to take advantage of wealthy men. programme.desc: An ex-convict claims that while he served time his girlfriend stole from his bank account; she claims the money was spent on him.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: An altercation on St. Patricks Day leads to a man allegedly spitting on a womans car window; Judge Judy tracks down his accomplices.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A dog sitter makes an ill-fated decision to visit a locale with an allegedly dangerous large dog; a bruised spine and over 7k in vet bills soon follow.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man claims he was bleeding profusely after an alleged attack by a Pit Bull whose owner claims it would never hurt anyone.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man openly admits he doesnt pay taxes and sues a former friend for the return of property and for allegedly filing a false police report.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A wild party leaves a vacation rental in shambles after an intended group of eight turns into a caught on video gang of 30 partygoers.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Even though puppies look exactly like their dog, a mother and son deny that their pet was responsible and sue neighbours for an alleged attack.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Judge Judy advises a father to appeal any grievances against previous judges, as he takes on the mother of his teenager over child support.

programme.title: Millionaire Murders
programme.desc: William Saunderson-Smith is found bludgeoned to death and police discover cash stuffed in bags and sixty-seven different mobile phones.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: Single mother Margie Coffey had been missing for ten days when her frozen body is pulled from a creek.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Kirsty Carver worked as a civilian employee of the Humberside Police. One night, she disappeared. Her killer would be revealed as Craig Belcher.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In Chandler, Arizona in 1991, an intruder viciously sexually assaults a woman in her own home. The case goes unsolved for decades until revolutionary science connects the dots.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: Despite being housebound as he recovers from his injuries, Blake investigates the death of a teenage girl in the dressing room at the debutante ball

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: Pilot of the crime drama series, starring Martin Shaw as the eponymous 1960s detective who despairs at the corruption he witnesses around him and resolves to find the gangster who killed his wife, before hanging up his truncheon. Paired with a headstrong officer, Gently struggles in solving an increasingly complex case while keeping his partner on the straight and narrow. With Phil Davis

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When a terminally ill celebrity florist returns to Kembleford to live out her final days, she brings glamour to the community. Mystery drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, guest starring Elaine Paige, with Mark Williams and Nancy Carroll

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuthing clerics past collides with the present when he investigates a missing person, a murder and a mythical wild cat. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams and Claudie Blakley

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Chief Inspector Sullivan pays Father Brown a visit to warn him that Hercule Flambeau is on the run and wanted for a series of brutal murders. Mystery drama, starring Mark Williams, with John Light

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The visit of Princess Margaret to Kembleford is jeopardised when a school caretaker is found murdered. It falls to Father Brown to resolve matters and save the royal occasion from being cancelled. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators

programme.desc: When an amnesiac wanders into their lives, Frank Hathaway and Luella Shakespeare must work out what happened to him. Comedy drama, starring Mark Benton and Jo Joyner

programme.desc: Sullivan asks for Father Browns help when Mrs Devines son Eddie is framed for murder. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams and Tom Chambers

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.sub-title: Beyond the Shining Sea - Part One
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part story, a fishing community is excited about the arrival of their festival queen for an annual celebration, but when her boat arrives with only her dead body on board, DI Mooney is left, yet again, with a baffling mystery to solve. What could a missing loaf of bread have to do with the crime? Meanwhile, Florence and Patrice look forward to their wedding, which is only a week away, but a huge strain is put on their relationship when the groom is drawn into the murder case as a former employer and long-time friend of the victim
