programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu investigate a missing person case at a casino, where gambling is a matter of life or death. Starring Mark Benton and Jo Joyner

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: When an amnesiac wanders into their lives, Frank Hathaway and Luella Shakespeare must work out what happened to him. Comedy drama, starring Mark Benton and Jo Joyner

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Sullivan asks for Father Browns help when Mrs Devines son Eddie is framed for murder. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams and Tom Chambers

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.sub-title: Beyond the Shining Sea - Part One
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part story, a fishing community is excited about the arrival of their festival queen for an annual celebration, but when her boat arrives with only her dead body on board, DI Mooney is left, yet again, with a baffling mystery to solve. What could a missing loaf of bread have to do with the crime? Meanwhile, Florence and Patrice look forward to their wedding, which is only a week away, but a huge strain is put on their relationship when the groom is drawn into the murder case as a former employer and long-time friend of the victim

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When a terminally ill celebrity florist returns to Kembleford to live out her final days, she brings glamour to the community. She also gains Father Browns interest after the suspicious death of an angry neighbour. Mystery drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, guest starring Elaine Paige, with Mark Williams and Nancy Carroll

programme.title: Mudtown
programme.desc: Beca brings Sonny over for dinner, which only succeeds in heightening Claires distrust and has her questioning his alibi for the night of Neds shooting

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuthing clerics past collides with the present when he investigates a missing person, a murder and a mythical wild cat. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams and Claudie Blakley

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Chief Inspector Sullivan pays Father Brown a visit to warn him that Hercule Flambeau is on the run and wanted for a series of brutal murders. Mystery drama, starring Mark Williams, with John Light

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.sub-title: Great Balls of Fire - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. As the fire continues to rage through Toronto, Julia Ogden is lured into the back room of a blazing dress shop by an apparition of Eva Pearce.

programme.title: The Diplomat
programme.desc: The body of a British man is found in Barcelonas marina, and British diplomat Laura Simmonds supports the victims fathers search for answers, with neither the Spanish police nor the Foreign Office keen to pursue a murder investigation. Drama, starring Sophie Rundle

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Dara O Briain and Hugh Dennis try to recollect the previous seven days with guests Angela Barnes, Ed Byrne, Sean McLoughlin and Glenn Moore

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedian Bob Mortimer and actress Patsy Kensit join team captain Lee Mack, while comedy actor Greg Davies and Pointless co-host Richard Osman are enlisted by his counterpart David Mitchell. Rob Brydon oversees proceedings as the two sides engage in a battle of wits to determine which of them can most successfully stretch the truth about their own lives

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedians Greg Davies and Guz Khan, Strictly co-host Claudia Winkleman and historian Lucy Worsley join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As usual, the participants set out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory, through rounds including Home Truths and Quick-fire Lies. Savvy viewers may have noted that after 12 series, both Mitchell and Mack are running woefully short of truthful bizarre experiences to recount of themselves

programme.title: Hate Thy Neighbour
programme.desc: Jamali Maddix travels to meet members of the National Socialist Movement, the largest neo-Nazi group in America who openly idolise Adolf Hitler and White Power

programme.desc: Jamali Maddix heads to Harlem to meet members of the Israelite School of Universal Practical Knowledge who believe they are descendants of the Twelve Tribes of Israel

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers are on alert for a cartel ambush as they transfer a Sicario to the Mexican military. A random inspection of a pick-up truck reveals 32kg of narcotics

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Documentary with unrestricted access to Americas Customs and Border Protection working on the bridges that separate Texas and Mexico, following the work of the many officers who police the bridges and keep America safe. In the first episode, a shipment of cardboard packaging hides a deadly secret, and heroin disguised as a laptop baffles the worlds most advanced narcotic detection device

programme.title: Railroad Australia
programme.desc: Engineers working a Fortescue track have just four hours to fix a faulty line, and if they fail, it could cost their heavyweight iron ore company millions

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chef continues his journey through Croatia and savours the native oysters of Ston, before crossing the border into Albania, where he is joined by his son Jack and the pair sample local dishes such as chicken jufka and kokoretsi. In his own kitchen on the Greek island of Symi, Rick cooks traditional Albanian dishes, including Lepur Comlek and Tave Kosi

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Suspicions are raised when a routine x-ray reveals suspicious packages hidden inside the tyres of a pick-up truck. Officers also seize a large shipment of marijuana

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: People forced out of their homes in Honduras by the notorious MS-13 gang plead their case for asylum in America. Officers discover 3,000lb of marijuana hidden in a cargo truck

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Rhod Gilbert and friend and fellow comedian Angela Barnes cross Italys most treacherous Alpine roads in Rhods first adventure since being treated for cancer

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond, Jeremy Clarkson and James May try to find the perfect car for 17-year-olds, dealing with insurance companies, accident repairs and a muddy music festival car park in the process. Richard also visits Abu Dhabi to test the Lamborghini Murcielago SV and stages a race between the 1000hp Bugatti Veyron and the McLaren F1. Actor, writer and comedian Stephen Fry is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May find three small cars at an affordable price - a task that involves pestering bankers, harnessing large dogs and almost getting arrested. James meets American rally driver Ken Block, and Jeremy tests out the Mercedes SL Black. Comedian Michael McIntyre is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explain how necessity often forced cooks to make the most of limited ingredients to create tasty dishes. They reveal that many popular meals were invented during hard times, from mince and dumplings to Scotch broths

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers prepare a selection of extravagant British gourmet dishes, using high-quality ingredients including lobster, truffles, prime cuts of meat and expensive chocolate. The duo also explore the stories behind the recipes

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chef continues his journey through Croatia and savours the native oysters of Ston, before crossing the border into Albania, where he is joined by his son Jack and the pair sample local dishes such as chicken jufka and kokoretsi. In his own kitchen on the Greek island of Symi, Rick cooks traditional Albanian dishes, including Lepur Comlek and Tave Kosi

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, James May and Richard Hammond travel to Africa, where they are challenged to buy a second-hand car costing less than £1,500 and in no way designed to go off-road, and drive across Botswana. Along the way they must negotiate salt pans, rivers and reserves full of animals while facing sweltering heat and suffocating dust

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May find three small cars at an affordable price - a task that involves pestering bankers, harnessing large dogs and almost getting arrested. James meets American rally driver Ken Block, and Jeremy tests out the Mercedes SL Black. Comedian Michael McIntyre is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Twenty Twelve co-stars Hugh Bonneville and Jessica Hynes pair up again to go on a road trip through the former Soviet republic of Georgia. Driving from the border with Azerbaijan to the Black Sea, Jessica soon discovers her spirit of adventure is causing Hugh a few moments of high anxiety, but there is worse to come when they find themselves stuck on a high mountain pass in bad weather and he has to overcome his vertigo. While the drive is a challenge all the way, the country and its people delight and surprise them at every turn

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Comedians Phill Jupitus and Marcus Brigstocke head to Bolivia for a high-altitude trip, first driving along the infamous Road of Death, only to find themselves deep in bandit country. Disorientation takes them by surprise as they have to navigate Salar de Uyuni - a salt lake so vast that Buzz Aldrin could see it from space. Their goal is the ancient mountain city of Potosi, whose silver mines financed the Spanish empire in the 16th century and which is almost 5,000 metres above sea level

programme.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
programme.desc: Paul Merton and his wife Suki Webster are in the Lake District, the first time they have had a holiday there. Their first destination is Kendal, but first they have to negotiate their motorhome under a low bridge. Later they go to the Kendal mint cake factory, and after crossing Windermere by ferry from Bowness, they head to a beautiful campsite on Coniston Water

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Documentary-maker and reigning Strictly champion Stacey Dooley, presenter Alex Jones, comedian and musician Rachel Parris and stand-up comic Henning Wehn join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As ever, the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory

programme.desc: Comedians Phill Jupitus and Marcus Brigstocke head to Bolivia for a high-altitude trip, first driving along the infamous Road of Death, only to find themselves deep in bandit country. Disorientation takes them by surprise as they have to navigate Salar de Uyuni - a salt lake so vast that Buzz Aldrin could see it from space. Their goal is the ancient mountain city of Potosi, whose silver mines financed the Spanish empire in the 16th century and which is almost 5,000 metres above sea level

programme.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
programme.desc: Paul Merton and his wife Suki Webster are in the Lake District, the first time they have had a holiday there. Their first destination is Kendal, but first they have to negotiate their motorhome under a low bridge. Later they go to the Kendal mint cake factory, and after crossing Windermere by ferry from Bowness, they head to a beautiful campsite on Coniston Water

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Documentary-maker and reigning Strictly champion Stacey Dooley, presenter Alex Jones, comedian and musician Rachel Parris and stand-up comic Henning Wehn join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As ever, the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Bored with life at the Linton Travel Tavern, Alan goes looking for excitement in time-honoured fashion - by getting drunk and stealing a traffic cone. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan, Phil Cornwell, Sally Phillips and David Schneider

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Alan has the misfortune to meet his biggest fan, whose bizarre behaviour proceeds to ruin his already slender chances of landing an Irish TV series. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan, with guest appearances by Father Ted creators Graham Linehan and Arthur Mathews

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Alan jumps for joy at the news that his arch-enemy, BBC commissioning editor Tony Hayers, has died in a bizarre accident, convinced it can now only be a matter of time before he is back where he belongs - fronting his own TV chat show. Steve Coogan stars

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Stephen Fry hosts an extended edition of the comedy quiz show, in which he awards points for answers he finds most interesting. This edition sees Noel Fielding, Rhod Gilbert and Cariad Lloyd join regular panellist Alan Davies to tackle miscellaneous M-themed matters

programme.desc: Jo Brand hosts an extended episode of the satirical current affairs quiz, with team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton joined by comedian Nabil Abdulrashid and journalist Tom Peck

programme.desc: Joe gets embroiled in a feud involving three sisters when he is called out to look after a dying patient. Julia suspends Archie and Daniel when a fight between the pair results in Michelle getting hit in the face. Emily has lunch with Nick, telling him about her condition and her plans to return to Letherbridge

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Daniel makes a confession that appals Julia, and Michelle discovers her old English teacher sleeping rough behind the Mill. Meanwhile, Joe confronts Emily about whether she would rather go back to live in Boston. Medical drama, starring Matthew Chambers, Diane Keen and Donnaleigh Bailey

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Two new nurses struggle to make a good impression on their first day as one of them questions Mubbss judgement, while the other gives her superiors cheek and stuns Diane by revealing she spent the night with Peter. Meanwhile, Jess grows closer to her patient Robert Pullman, causing Lisa and Ric to worry she has more than just a professional interest in him. Kath feels uncomfortable with Larrys spontaneity, but he is determined to win her round

programme.title: Casualty
programme.sub-title: What Tonight Means to Me - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Lenny and Yukis fight for the Jafa fellowship comes to a head in the middle of the Holby power cut, but the pair later put aside their personal differences to deliver Shonas baby when she is discovered collapsed on the floor. Zoe finally confesses to Jordan that she is not pregnant, Adam celebrates his 40th birthday at a surprise party thrown by his colleagues, and Charlie finds a way to deal with his grief

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: As police rumours circle the Square, will Ronnie be able to follow through with her promise of a fresh start? Max does what he can to protect Bradley

programme.desc: A smallholder hopes a windfall will mean he can realise his dream of expanding into pig-keeping - until James diagnoses a case of swine fever. Christopher Timothy and Peter Davison star

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletch tries to ensure that Godber has not blown his chances of early release after he gets into a fight a week before his parole board hearing. Final episode of the classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and Richard Beckinsale

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Smiler reminisces about a woman who escaped his advances during the war without leaving her contact details, so Truly, Alvin and Billy volunteer to track her down - even though it means a foray into hostile territory. Long-running comedy series, starring Frank Thornton, Brian Murphy, Keith Clifford and Stephen Lewis

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The Afterthoughts of a Co-op Manager
programme.desc: Truly discovers a former suitor of Marinas went off to Australia, and convinces her the emigrant did so to forget about her - and that she should stop seeing Howard out of respect to the other mans memory. Long-running comedy series, starring Frank Thornton, Jean Fergusson and Robert Fyfe

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Auntie Wainwright is thrilled to have picked up a bargain at the auction rooms, but puzzled as to what the object is. Worse yet, when she does find out what her purchase is meant for, she still has no idea what to do with it. Long-running comedy series, starring Jean Alexander, Peter Sallis and Frank Thornton

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuth investigates the murder of a Colonial Postal Service officer when the fair comes to Kembleford. Drama, starring Mark Williams and Sorcha Cusack

programme.title: Happy Valley
programme.desc: Drama from the pen of Sally Wainwright. Catherine Cawood is the sergeant on duty when accountant Kevin Weatherill enters her police station to report a crime - the kidnapping of his bosss daughter. Although he originally came up with the plan as a way of paying for his childrens private education, he eventually backed out. However, his partner is dangerous local drug kingpin Ashley Cowgill - and he has gone ahead with the plot anyway. The case hits a nerve for Catherine, who has lost her own daughter and is determined to bring the captors to justice. Sarah Lancashire stars, with Steve Pemberton, Joe Armstrong, James Norton, Siobhan Finneran and George Costigan

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The team investigates claims that celebrity chef Kitty Campbell murdered her husband Bertie during the 1960s. A former assistant of the couple claims Bertie was gay, and that she killed him for fear of a scandal wrecking her career - but Halford thinks they are being taken for a ride. Honor Blackman and Stephen Tompkinson guest star

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu investigate a death threat at Runningbrook, an exclusive tennis club that hides a toxic threat. Crime drama, starring Mark Benton and Jo Joyner

programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The mismatched detectives investigate the murder of businessman Richard Mattis and discover a family tormented by sinister secrets. A second body found in the canal behind Mattiss factory makes matters even more puzzling. Warren Clarke, Colin Buchanan and Alison Steadman star

programme.desc: Micki arrives in Port Elizabeth to testify in the trial of the gruesome cannibal killer Stewart Wilken - and shes also desperate to interview him and study his mind

programme.desc: In an effort to find out what life is like for Darryl behind bars, Tracey decides to build her own prison in the attic - with Sharon as her cellmate. Comedy, with Linda Robson and Pauline Quirke

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey and Sharon witness a robbery committed by someone they know, leaving them agonising over whether to turn a blind eye or inform on a mate. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.sub-title: The Black Virgin of Vladimir - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Lovejoy sets out to exact revenge on the dealer responsible for deceiving his American acquaintance - and make a little money for himself into the bargain. Linda Gray and Brian Blessed guest star, with Ian McShane

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: The roguish antiques dealer returns from six months in Spain to find a guest of Lady Jane has fled Peru with a priceless Inca ring. Joanna Lumley guest stars, with Ian McShane

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Madly in love with one of Lady Janes old school friends, Lovejoy finds it hard to keep his mind on work and mistakes a set of fake watercolours for the real thing. While hes off trying to put matters right, Eric takes charge of furnishing Dalrymples stately home - with disastrous results. Joanna Lumley guest stars

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuth investigates the murder of a Colonial Postal Service officer when the fair comes to Kembleford. Drama, starring Mark Williams and Sorcha Cusack

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: An unknown tagger begins to paint graffiti around London, and claims to have been responsible for killing a celebrated street artist four years previously. Originally part of a gang, the victim went solo after receiving support from a wealthy art patron, and when the detectives reopen the case, they become suspicious of his resentful former crew members. Meanwhile, Brian signs up to a social networking site as TopCop999 to chart the gritty life of a lawman, much to his colleagues displeasure

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: When a retrospective exhibition of murdered fashion designer Ritchie Levenes work opens, the team is prompted to re-examine the three-year-old crime. The detectives learn about his tempestuous relationships with his new spouse, personal assistant and ex-wife Sarah, who believes his brother Adrian is the killer because he had the most to gain from his death. Meanwhile, Gerry enlists Emily to help update his image, although not everyone is impressed with the results. Crime drama, guest starring Rupert Graves and Hannah Waterman

programme.title: Jonathan Creek
programme.desc: Chinese gangsters threaten to murder a High Court judge, prompting a major security operation at his home. Despite a wall of police protection, however, he is fatally stabbed through the heart in his own bedroom and Creek believes a clock and a local pub hold the key to the mystery. Drama, starring Alan Davies and Caroline Quentin

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.desc: When a man with no ID and no connection to Marlow is found dead in the middle of a suburban road, Judith, Becks and Suzie delve into secrets between the residents

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.desc: A surprising link to a past missing persons case shines a new light on the residents of Linnet Close - but could they be responsible for murder on their doorstep?

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: When a local nun is strangled to death on her way to the chapel, the team find investigating the murder to be a real challenge after they learn that the members of her order have taken a vow of silence

programme.title: Whitechapel
programme.desc: Part two of two. Another torso is washed up from the Thames, this time at Putney Bridge, and Llewellyn finds traces of Spanish Fly, an aphrodisiac used by the infamous Marquis de Sade. The discovery propels Miles and the team into a world of dark obsessions, where romance and love take a sinister turn. Crime thriller, starring Rupert Penry-Jones, Phil Davis and Claire Rushbrook

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The Lynleys are looking forward to becoming parents, but Helen succumbs to temptation and dabbles in her husbands latest case. However, her past involvement with the victim unwittingly puts her in the firing line, with devastating consequences for everyone. Jemma Redgrave and Barbara Flynn guest star, with Nathaniel Parker, Sharon Small and Lesley Vickerage

Working with DS Livingstone, Sister Boniface soon works out the real target was the shows producer, Dick Lansky, who has many enemies on and off set and a roving eye for the actresses. Lorna Watson stars

programme.desc: Part one of two. Mattie is assigned the unglamorous job of searching for a lost dog, but the case is put on hold when one of the bands members turns up dead

programme.title: The Lakes with Paul Rose
programme.desc: Coniston Water isnt the biggest of Cumbrias lakes - but its one of the most iconic and the place where Donald Campbell died trying to break the world water speed record. Paul meets Campbells daughter Gina and crew member Robbie Robinson, who was there on the fateful day in January 1967 when Bluebird somersaulted and crashed on the water. The explorer also enters a Lakeland bike ride with a difference before ending his visit with a spot of rock climbing at Dow Crag before the ascent of one of the areas best known hills, The Old Man of Coniston

programme.desc: Remote Eskdale is the next destination in the explorers trek through the Lake District, enjoying the landscapes and meeting its people. programme.title: The Lakes with Paul Rose
programme.desc: Coniston Water isnt the biggest of Cumbrias lakes - but its one of the most iconic and the place where Donald Campbell died trying to break the world water speed record. Paul meets Campbells daughter Gina and crew member Robbie Robinson, who was there on the fateful day in January 1967 when Bluebird somersaulted and crashed on the water. The explorer also enters a Lakeland bike ride with a difference before ending his visit with a spot of rock climbing at Dow Crag before the ascent of one of the areas best known hills, The Old Man of Coniston

programme.title: The Lakes with Paul Rose
programme.desc: Remote Eskdale is the next destination in the explorers trek through the Lake District, enjoying the landscapes and meeting its people. The corner of the western Lakes he focuses on is off the normal tourist track, yet boasts Englands highest mountain. However, before making the tough climb to the summit of Scafell Pike, Paul meets the folk who run one of the countrys most scenic railways, has a close encounter with a vulture, and gets to grips with the locals in a spot of Cumberland wrestling

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!

programme.title: The Green Green Grass

programme.sub-title: The Miraculous Curing of Old Goff Helliwell

programme.title: Katie Piper: Locked Up in Louisiana
programme.desc: Katie meets Kia, who is accused of attempted murder after shooting a man while working as a security guard. She claims self-defence, but Katie wonders if she used reasonable force

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Under the Knife
programme.desc: The roving broadcaster travels to California, the birthplace of plastic surgery, to investigate the obsession with beauty and self-image. In his quest he meets Eve, a domineering stylist and her client Laura, and DJ Kris, who is resorting to liposuction to achieve the six-pack he so desires, leading Louis to consider having a nip and tuck himself

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Documentary series following the heart-pounding action and human stories of the frontline paramedics of one of Britains busiest ambulance services. Loz and student paramedic Dan are called out in the middle of the night to 72-year-old Florence, whos pressed her panic button after waking up with agonising chest pain

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: Contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing a cash prize. Helping them this time round are Stacey Dooley, Roman Kemp, Omid Djalili, Judy Murray, Owain Wyn Evans, Kate Humble and Vikkstar

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Pastry chef Kirsten Tibballs brings in a dessert pantry for todays challenge

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: V and Ollie blue light to a rugby pitch to help a man who had a seizure. Plus, Stef and Lee treat an excitable 6-year-old Spider-Man fighting an asthma attack

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team come to the aid of a couple in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, who started out building their own extension to meet the needs of their growing family, only to receive a double blow when husband Neil was made redundant and their youngest child Ben began to show signs of autism. The builders have just 10 days to bring designer Gabrielle Blackmans ideas to life - but as usual, local tradesmen and other members of the community turn out in force to help

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team head to Fareham, Hampshire, to help Haanagh and Mike, who have three children, including twins - one with cerebral palsy, the other profoundly deaf. The family house is small and the cramped conditions are making life difficult, and at times dangerous, for the growing boys. Local tradespeople and members of the community muck in to help the builders create a new single-storey extension in just nine days, with designer Gabrielle Blackman on hand to protect her vision

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles meets Kettering mum of four Lindsey, who married her ex-Royal Engineer husband Shaun in December 2019, after which they began to extend their Kettering home. But a few months later Shaun was struck down with cancer, and died in November 2021, leaving Lindsey and her children with an unfinished home. But help is on hand as the DIY SOS team, along with hundreds of local trades and several of Shauns old army buddies, step in to finish the job

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats an 11-month-old dog who has a severely dislocated hip which Noel suspects is the result of trauma experienced at the tender age of only two months. Elsewhere, overweight Labradoodle Fletcher is brought into the veterinary practice all the way from Scotland after previous surgery to fix a bad ankle fracture has failed, and a tiny hedgehog needs treatment on his broken hind legs

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The West Midlands crews treat a pensioner whose heart rate is so erratic they are worried he might have a heart attack on the way to the hospital

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The Hazardous Area Response Team is called to help defuse a bomb found in Wakefield, and to rescue a BMX rider who fell and fractured his spine in woods near Leeds

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A suspected acid attack on the streets of Bradford leads to a busy shift for the crew. Documentary following the work of Yorkshire Ambulance Services Hazardous Area Response Team

programme.title: Nurses Down Under
programme.desc: Emergency nurses fight to save a man who has gone into anaphylactic shock. Transplant nurse Rodrigo leads a mission across Australia to retrieve a donor heart

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Documentary series following the work of the West Midlands Ambulance Service. Hannah and Mike are called to a young woman who has had a fit in the street

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Documentary following West Midlands ambulance workers. Michelle and Simon rush to a young man who has collapsed at work, while Gaz and Debbie help a teenager with chest pain

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: Award-winning comedian Michael McIntyre hosts, as contestants, guided by celebrity experts including Rachel Riley, Joel Dommett and Daisy Lowe, attempt to answer their way to a sizable cash prize

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Arun is incensed when a gang on the Bronte estate sets upon a young couple. He is then completely taken in by one of the local youngsters, who draws him into a trap that strips him of his dignity - and most of his uniform. Smithy sets out to trace the gang by way of Aruns stolen radio, and the crusading PC is shocked to discover who is masterminding the beatings and muggings - and is all the more determined to nail them this time

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: A missing 15-year-old is found unconscious and badly beaten in an alleyway, a sight that touches a nerve with Leon, who is reminded of events buried in his own past. CCTV footage reveals the girl had argued violently with her barman boyfriend on the night of the attack, but he claims this was because he broke off their relationship after discovering she was much younger than she claimed

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Elize Du Toit guest stars as a barristers daughter with a cocaine habit, who is beaten up and pushed out of a car by her supplier when she fails to settle her debts. programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: First of a two-part story, originally shown to to celebrate 25 years of The Bill, filmed in London and Germany in collaboration with the cast and crew of German series SOKO: Leipzig. programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Concluding the two-part story filmed in London and Germany in collaboration with the cast and crew of drama series SOKO: Leipzig. programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. programme.title: Louis Theroux: Under the Knife
programme.desc: The roving broadcaster travels to California, the birthplace of plastic surgery, to investigate the obsession with beauty and self-image. programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Documentary series following the heart-pounding action and human stories of the frontline paramedics of one of Britains busiest ambulance services. programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team come to the aid of a couple in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, who started out building their own extension to meet the needs of their growing family, only to receive a double blow when husband Neil was made redundant and their youngest child Ben began to show signs of autism. The builders have just 10 days to bring designer Gabrielle Blackmans ideas to life - but as usual, local tradesmen and other members of the community turn out in force to help

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team head to Fareham, Hampshire, to help Haanagh and Mike, who have three children, including twins - one with cerebral palsy, the other profoundly deaf. The family house is small and the cramped conditions are making life difficult, and at times dangerous, for the growing boys. Local tradespeople and members of the community muck in to help the builders create a new single-storey extension in just nine days, with designer Gabrielle Blackman on hand to protect her vision

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles meets Kettering mum of four Lindsey, who married her ex-Royal Engineer husband Shaun in December 2019, after which they began to extend their Kettering home. But a few months later Shaun was struck down with cancer, and died in November 2021, leaving Lindsey and her children with an unfinished home. But help is on hand as the DIY SOS team, along with hundreds of local trades and several of Shauns old army buddies, step in to finish the job

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos Scottish railway journey reaches Aberdeen. From the granite city, Michael heads out to Forvie National Nature Reserve, which is 1,000 hectares of protected coastal habitat dominated by grassy dunes

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo crosses the Culloden Viaduct aboard the Caledonian Sleeper to arrive bright and early in Inverness, from where he heads north on a magnificent scenic adventure to the Orkney archipelago. On boggy moorland overlooking the Moray Firth near Inverness, Michael explores the battlefield at Culloden, where Bonnie Prince Charlies Jacobite army fought British Government troops in 1746

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels by train north from Inverness to the Orkney Islands. Beginning on the Moray Firth, Michael admires the Cullen Viaduct then enjoys a bowl of Cullen skink at a family-run fishmonger of 150 years standing. In the factory smokery, he learns from the owner how the famous soup acquires its distinctive taste

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos Scottish coastal railway journey reaches Invergordon on the Cromarty Firth, the third great inlet on the northeast coast of the Highlands. He arrives on Britains northernmost railway, the Far North Line, and heads straight onto the water to explore a former oil drilling rig now moored in the firth

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: 100 motorbikes come in for auction from every era of the 20th century, and the team assess a 1965 Vanden Plas Princess with a four litre Rolls Royce engine thats seen better days

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A rusty 1970 Fiat 500 goes under the hammer - Derek Mathewson reckons its the kind of vehicle that is so iconic that it has to be saved

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The incredible story of the arms race to create Americas nuclear arms factories

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Dramatised documentary examining how Hitler and the Nazi party rose to power in Germany during the 1930s, revealing the greed, manipulation and frightening underestimation of Adolf Hitlers ambition. In 1930, Germany was a liberal democracy, with elections, parliament and the rule of law, but just four years later its leader was a dictator and its government is in the hands of murderers. Leading historians and experts take viewers inside the minds of those hellbent on gaining power and those who tried to stop them. First broadcast in 1997

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Eltham Palace in South London. Finds include a collection of Gerry and Sylvia Anderson puppets, two unknown paintings by Mexican Marxist artist Diego Rivera, whose work documented working class culture in the 1960s, a well-preserved mammoth tooth, a newspaper printing plate telling the story of the moon landings, and letters written by an Army officer captured by the IRA in the 1920s

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of antiques experts visit Erddig, north Wales. On a scorching hot day, the crowds come out, bringing with them items including a dazzling emerald and diamond ring worn by the owners grandmother on the Titanic, a Welsh love spoon carved in 1859 by a young man for his sweetheart and an avid fans collection of James Bond props

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave meets the inspirational owner of a Reliant Robin whos selling it to raise money for charity

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave Mathewson has put his best clean T-shirt on to collect a 1965 Land Rover from a stately home - and it turns out that the trusty car has a real pedigree

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The explorer travels the length of North and South America. The expedition begins at the northernmost point in Alaska, journeying south through Canada to the border with the US. In Denali National Park, he witnesses first hand the impact of climate change on a glacier. He also hunts caribou with native Americans, hears from both sides of the conflict over a controversial oil drilling plan, and discovers Vancouvers opioid addiction crisis

programme.title: Allo Allo!
programme.desc: General von Flockenstuffen decides to launch a raid to capture Churchill, leaving the Colonel, Gruber and Bertorelli to resort to desperate measures to stop him

programme.title: Allo Allo!
programme.desc: A medal for bravery, a suicide pill and an unlikely hiding place all add up to a confusing time for reluctant Resistance fighter Rene, who determines to flee to England with Yvette instead of the two British airmen Fairfax and Carstairs

programme.title: Allo Allo!
programme.sub-title: Up the Crick Without a Piddle
programme.desc: Rene and Edith are rewarded with medals by Churchill after being transported to England in place of the British airmen, and are reunited with an old friend who has changed sides

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: The latest stage of Michael Portillos trek takes him past lochs and castles on the Far North Line to Britains northernmost railway station at Thurso. From Lairg on the banks of Loch Shin, Michael heads for a secret conservation area in the 18-mile-long loch to track down one of Scotlands most elusive and endangered species, the freshwater pearl mussel

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: From Britains northernmost station at Thurso in Caithness, Michael Portillo heads for the ferry port of Scrabster to cross the Pentland Firth to the Orkney Islands. Passing the Old Man of Hoy, Michael takes in stunning views of the Orkney archipelago and the rugged coastlines of its 70 islands

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo sets off from Tynemouth on the first leg of a trip to Berwick-upon-Tweed, hearing about of a 19th-century tragedy at sea that inspired 140 local men to set up a coastal rescue service. At Long Sands beach, Michael rolls up his sleeves to help volunteers caring for sick and injured seals at the Tynemouth Aquarium Seal Hospital

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo heads from Newcastle to Lynemouth, and is intrigued to hear of its part in Newcastles early industrial development. En route, Michael travels through the huge Northumberland coalfield and, at Cramlington, he alights to visit an extraordinary work of landform art made from the spoil of a coalmine, the vast Northumberlandia, known as the Lady of the North

programme.title: How to Build a Motor Car
programme.desc: Access all areas to the Bentley factory: We see the luxury car manufacturer build a new, £170k Continental GT from bolts to finished car

programme.title: How to Build a Motor Car
programme.sub-title: How to Build an Aston Martin
programme.desc: Access all areas to the Aston Martin factory: From the oven baked chassis to being painted in actual moon rock, see how a DBS Superlegerra is made

programme.title: How to Build a Motor Car
programme.desc: At the Maserati factory in Turin: Discover how a Quattroporte Super Saloon is built. Using aerospace technology and techniques from robot assembly

programme.title: How to Build a Motor Car
programme.desc: The Morgan Motor Company have opened their doors to reveal how they hand-build their brand new Plus Six.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Continuing his trek from Philadelphia to Jamestown, Michael Portillo arrives in the nations capital, Washington, DC, centre of political power in the worlds most powerful country. Steered by his Appletons Guide of 1879, he admires its fine public buildings, including the largest library in the world, and discovers how the capital was built from scratch after a political compromise between north and south. After this, he travels on to Mount Vernon, exploring a former slave market and visiting an archaeological dig along the way

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo arrives in Manassas, Virginia, scene of two crucial battles during the American Civil War. In Fredericksburg, he tries bottling bourbon corn whiskey and learns how it became the nations spirit. In Richmond, the ex-politician enjoys a tour of the Virginia state Capitol building, where he hears of the dilemma faced by one of its most famous sons, General Robert E Lee, before donning his dancing shoes for a Cotillion ball. Michael ends his journey in Jamestown, the first permanent English settlement in North America

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo crosses the Culloden Viaduct aboard the Caledonian Sleeper to arrive bright and early in Inverness, from where he heads north on a magnificent scenic adventure to the Orkney archipelago. On boggy moorland overlooking the Moray Firth near Inverness, Michael explores the battlefield at Culloden, where Bonnie Prince Charlies Jacobite army fought British Government troops in 1746

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels by train north from Inverness to the Orkney Islands. Beginning on the Moray Firth, Michael admires the Cullen Viaduct then enjoys a bowl of Cullen skink at a family-run fishmonger of 150 years standing. In the factory smokery, he learns from the owner how the famous soup acquires its distinctive taste

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos Scottish coastal railway journey reaches Invergordon on the Cromarty Firth, the third great inlet on the northeast coast of the Highlands. programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Dramatised documentary examining how Hitler and the Nazi party rose to power in Germany during the 1930s, revealing the greed, manipulation and frightening underestimation of Adolf Hitlers ambition. In 1930, Germany was a liberal democracy, with elections, parliament and the rule of law, but just four years later its leader was a dictator and its government is in the hands of murderers. Leading historians and experts take viewers inside the minds of those hellbent on gaining power and those who tried to stop them. First broadcast in 1997

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Eltham Palace in South London. Finds include a collection of Gerry and Sylvia Anderson puppets, two unknown paintings by Mexican Marxist artist Diego Rivera, whose work documented working class culture in the 1960s, a well-preserved mammoth tooth, a newspaper printing plate telling the story of the moon landings, and letters written by an Army officer captured by the IRA in the 1920s

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of antiques experts visit Erddig, north Wales. programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo sets off from Tynemouth on the first leg of a trip to Berwick-upon-Tweed, hearing about of a 19th-century tragedy at sea that inspired 140 local men to set up a coastal rescue service. At Long Sands beach, Michael rolls up his sleeves to help volunteers caring for sick and injured seals at the Tynemouth Aquarium Seal Hospital

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo heads from Newcastle to Lynemouth, and is intrigued to hear of its part in Newcastles early industrial development. En route, Michael travels through the huge Northumberland coalfield and, at Cramlington, he alights to visit an extraordinary work of landform art made from the spoil of a coalmine, the vast Northumberlandia, known as the Lady of the North

programme.title: How to Build a Motor Car
programme.desc: Access all areas to the Bentley factory: We see the luxury car manufacturer build a new, £170k Continental GT from bolts to finished car

programme.title: How to Build a Motor Car

programme.title: How to Build a Motor Car

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Continuing his trek from Philadelphia to Jamestown, Michael Portillo arrives in the nations capital, Washington, DC, centre of political power in the worlds most powerful country. Steered by his Appletons Guide of 1879, he admires its fine public buildings, including the largest library in the world, and discovers how the capital was built from scratch after a political compromise between north and south. After this, he travels on to Mount Vernon, exploring a former slave market and visiting an archaeological dig along the way

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo arrives in Manassas, Virginia, scene of two crucial battles during the American Civil War. In Fredericksburg, he tries bottling bourbon corn whiskey and learns how it became the nations spirit. In Richmond, the ex-politician enjoys a tour of the Virginia state Capitol building, where he hears of the dilemma faced by one of its most famous sons, General Robert E Lee, before donning his dancing shoes for a Cotillion ball. Michael ends his journey in Jamestown, the first permanent English settlement in North America

programme.desc: The stories of two sons who were given up for adoption and the families who have stopped at nothing to find them. Andrew Barlow was adopted as a baby, but his birth mother Patricia Clark refused to sign the adoption papers and never gave up looking for him, while as a child, Julie Redman discovered that her mother Joan had given up her older brother for adoption

programme.title: Cooper and Fry
programme.desc: After the body of local photographer Jenny Westlake is found dead lying among the stones at the popular tourist spot, The Nine Virgins, Cooper and Fry are called in to investigate. As the detectives learn about the belief that the stones represent women who danced on the Sabbath with the ability to grant wishes, suspicion focuses on those close to the old religion. But when the burned body of a man is found nearby, a truth begins to unravel that sends shockwaves through the team

programme.title: Cooper and Fry
programme.desc: The detectives continue their investigation into the murder of photographer Jenny Westlake - a case that takes them deep into local folklore. Starring Mandip Gill and Robert James-Collier

programme.title: Gogglebox Ireland
programme.desc: Deirdre OKane provides the voiceover as a selection of telly addicts pass comment on the weeks programmes from the comfort of their living rooms

programme.title: The Regency: 10 Years On
programme.desc: Exploring the hotel attack that killed David Byrne, ignited a deadly gang war, and the policing and trials that reshaped Irelands crime landscape

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi visits The Falcon Hotel in Cambridgeshire. Run by lifelong hotelier Colin and his daughter Jean, the duo took on the lease of this 16th-century coaching inn 11 years ago. Despite rock-bottom room rates, Colin and Jean are still struggling to pull in enough punters, so the business is heading towards a make-or-break moment - unless Alex can help turn things around

programme.title: Cash Trapped
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Bradley Walsh in which six contestants battle it out across a series of fast-paced question rounds where the players must actively try to sabotage their opponents by beating them to the buzzer and trapping them out of the game. In the final round, the person who has earned the most cash will go head to head against the rest of the group to try to take their winnings home

programme.title: What Would Your Kid Do?
programme.desc: Jason Manford presents the show which asks how well people really know their kids, by challenging parents to guess what their children will do in a variety of entertaining situations. Each show sees youngsters filmed while taking part in a variety of classroom activities and games, unaware that were actually testing everything from empathy and lateral thinking to curiosity and rule breaking

programme.title: What Would Your Kid Do?
programme.desc: Jason Manford presents the show which asks how well people really know their kids, by challenging parents to guess what their children will do in a variety of entertaining situations. Each show sees youngsters filmed while taking part in a variety of classroom activities and games, unaware that were actually testing everything from empathy and lateral thinking to curiosity and rule breaking

programme.title: Ireland AM
programme.desc: Ireland AM is the longest running daytime show in Ireland. Blending a mixture of lifestyle interviews and news content, with gardening, health, food and fashion seven days a week

programme.title: The Floor
programme.desc: Just 25 players are left as Rob Brydon hosts another tense round of quick-fire quiz duels, with each win expanding a players territory, while each loss sends another home. With a £5,000 Floor bonus on the line and a £50,000 jackpot up for grabs at the end of the series, its all to play for as friends turn to foes and challenge one another

programme.title: In for a Penny
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a game show which takes place in public locations around the UK. He invites passers-by in Norwich to take part in a series of unusual challenges

programme.title: Live: Guinness Six Nations
programme.desc: Scotland v France (Kick-off 2.10pm). Coverage of the both teams fourth and penultimate match of the championship, held at Scottish Gas Murrayfield. France secured the title with a 35-16 victory over Scotland at Stade de France last year and also won 20-16 at this venue in 2024. However, the Scots prevailed 31-20 in their only other home match of this campaign and that contest will give them high hopes of another strong display this afternoon

programme.title: Live: Guinness Six Nations
programme.desc: Italy v England (Kick-off 4.40pm). All the action from the match in the fourth round of fixtures, held at Stadio Olimpico in Rome. England have won all 32 of the previous meetings between the sides, including a 47-24 victory at Twickenham last year and a narrow 27-24 win when they last visited here in 2024. However, Italys 18-15 victory over Scotland in their only other home match in this campaign will give them high hopes of a famous victory

programme.title: Virgin Media News Update
programme.desc: The latest national and international stories from the Virgin Media News team

programme.title: Britains Got Talent
programme.desc: Ant and Dec host as more performers take to the stage at the auditions in Blackpool, trying to impress judges Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon and KSI and secure their place in the live semi-finals

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Cheryl Baker, Laura Tobin, Jason Bell and Mark Steel pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: A compilation of highlights from the recent series, featuring a host of stars including Chris Pratt, Cynthia Erivo, Idris Elba, Erin Doherty, Wunmi Mosaku, Ant and Dec, Chris Hemsworth, Halle Berry, Rachel McAdams, Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi, Amanda Seyfried, Johannes Radebe, Laura Dern, Will Arnett, Carey Mulligan, Tom Hiddleston, Stephen Graham and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Another line-up of contestants answer questions that could change their lives - with lifelines, including Ask the Audience, Phone a Friend and 50-50 available to them if they get stuck. Jeremy Clarkson hosts

programme.title: Dark Side of Reality TV
programme.desc: The impact of Americas Next Top Model on some of the aspiring models involved, focusing on those for whom the show not only ruined their careers, but scarred them for life

programme.title: Coma
programme.desc: Devoted family man Simon finds himself at a breaking point as his neighbourhood falls victim to the terrorising behaviour of a group of teenagers, led by menacing 17-year-old Jordan. When Simons frustration reaches its peak and he confronts Jordan outside his own home, a split-second decision changes everything. Drama, starring Jason Watkins and Joe Barber

programme.title: Billy Connolly: Journey to the Edge of the World
programme.desc: The comedian sets off on a journey through the remote regions of Canada, travelling by boat, motorbike, aeroplane and car from the Atlantic to the Pacific by way of the Northwest Passage. On the first leg of his trip, Billy visits Nova Scotia and Newfoundland, taking in the Titanic graveyard, a Highland Games and spotting a whale on his way to stay at a lighthouse

programme.title: The Six OClock Show
programme.desc: Chat show featuring celebrity interviews, food from leading chefs and guidance on a wide range of topics, from consumer affairs to the latest trends, with viewers invited to contribute with pictures, comments, stories and gossip

programme.title: Ireland AM
programme.desc: Magazine programme blending lifestyle interviews and news content with human interest stories, consumer affairs, health, politics, gardening, education, finance, food and fashion

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: Daily magazine, featuring a mix of celebrity chat, showbusiness news, lifestyle features, topical discussion, health and beauty advice and more

programme.title: News at 12:30
programme.desc: The latest national and international stories from the Virgin Media News team, followed by sport and weather

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants - Dick from Brighton, Jenny from Surrey, Evie from Corby and Matthew from Altrincham - pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Loose Women
programme.desc: Guest panellists engage in topical debate and celebrity interviews from a female perspective

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson hosts the quiz where each episode sees six hopefuls compete for £1 million - however, only one player can take their place in the Hot Seat at a time and answer multiple-choice questions to work their way up the Money Ladder

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Real-life small-claims cases on issues affecting family life, presided over by outspoken former New York judge Judy Sheindlin

When Simons frustration reaches its peak and he confronts Jordan outside his own home, a split-second decision changes everything. Drama, starring Jason Watkins and Joe Barber

programme.title: Billy Connolly: Journey to the Edge of the World
programme.desc: The comedian sets off on a journey through the remote regions of Canada, travelling by boat, motorbike, aeroplane and car from the Atlantic to the Pacific by way of the Northwest Passage. On the first leg of his trip, Billy visits Nova Scotia and Newfoundland, taking in the Titanic graveyard, a Highland Games and spotting a whale on his way to stay at a lighthouse

programme.title: World on Fire
programme.desc: Harry is reunited with Stan in the Sahara Desert, but soon finds that the realities of desert combat are very different to what he is used to. In Paris, Henriette is placed in grave danger when she discovers the Gestapo are hunting for her brother, a situation that could jeopardise the Resistance escape route. Lois recovers from her injuries, but the psychological trauma could take longer to fade

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Barrister Robert Rinder recalls how the Border Force and the National Crime Agency worked together to carry out the UKs biggest ever drugs bust. He also recounts the events of February 2006, when the small market town of Tonbridge in Kent made headlines around the world as news broke of the biggest cash robbery in British history

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Walker and Miller struggle to decide whether an ex-Army major is guilty of murder after shooting a youth who broke into his home, while Carol tries to get through to a pregnant teenager. Rosie learns the garage is in financial trouble - unaware Peggy and a salesman with big ideas (impressionist Jon Culshaw) have already dreamed up a plan that could save it. Jonathan Kerrigan and Gwen Taylor star

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Cassie and Sam prepare to celebrate their first wedding anniversary. Cassie welcomes Grey House guest Joy, who seems to be spying on the Merriwicks. Fantasy, starring Catherine Bell

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: How the worlds biggest ship, designed to install oil platforms and lay pipelines, was inspired by a logging machine, a wire rope and 1940s shipbuilding techniques

programme.title: Ainsleys National Trust Cook Off
programme.desc: Ainsley Harriott is joined by chefs Tristan Welch and Philli Armitage-Mattin at the Wimpole Estate in Cambridgeshire to see who can create and cook the Dish of the Day. Ainsley makes beetroot and carrot patties with a vegan horseradish yoghurt, Tristan brings his passion for zero-waste cooking to the kitchen with his honey and lemon roasted carrots with spiced-up beans, and Philli uses her knowledge of Japanese cuisine to make a summer vegetable pancake with garlic aioli

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Reports of attacks in a remote part of Ukraine take extreme angler Jeremy Wade on a hunt for an elusive lake monster, and to the site of the worlds worst nuclear accident - Chernobyls reactor number four. Can he reveal the culprit and deliver it to the scientists searching for evidence of mutant species?

programme.title: Peter Andres 60 Minute Makeover
programme.desc: Peter Andres 60 Minute Makeover is back and bigger than ever on Quest Red. Peter and his army of helpers will be surprising deserving people across the country with a stunning home mkeover - performed in a day and brought to you in 60 minutes. In each episode one deserving person will get the surprise home makeover of a lifetime. Nominated by their friends and family they are everyday heroes with moving stories that tug at the heart.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Tragedy casts a dark shadow over the idyllic landscape of Aidensfield when Nick receives an anonymous tip-off about a local shopkeepers unsavoury antics. Meanwhile, Greengrass finds himself in trouble courtesy of the village gossip-mongers. Sixties-based rural drama, starring Nick Berry and Bill Maynard

programme.title: Help Me Buy a Home
programme.desc: Buyers agent Liz OKane records the unfiltered realities Irish people face in the search for a home, taking a raw and honest look at the emotional rollercoaster, challenges and hard-won joys of buying a property

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi visits a hotel located in six acres of Dorset countryside, complete with stables, an outdoor pool and a cricket pitch. The owners of the lodge have seen a steady decline in bookings since they stopped letting it for profitable functions, causing concern that the house may not be able to support them in the future. Alex believes, however, their long-serving assistant could help guide the venue to prosperity

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Cain comes under severe pressure, while Graham advises him to sell up. There is a near miss for Jai and Kerry

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Lily and Shona catch Jodie out, Todd frets over the demands on his purse, George gets a call from his solicitor, and Sally offers Carla and Lisa some parenting tips

programme.title: The Royal
programme.sub-title: Its Whats on the Inside That Counts
programme.desc: New recruit Thelma Parker catches the eye of Harper, but proves to be less popular with the rest of the team, and an injured boxer causes concern for the staff at the hospital. Dr Weatherill finds herself caught in an ethical battle when the parents of a dangerously ill baby refuse treatment, while Samantha receives unwanted news. Medical drama starring John Axon, Amy Robbins, Anna Madeley and Barbara Marten

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: An anonymous enemy goes all out to ruin Wycliffe by sending the police a batch of photos apparently showing him taking bribes. As soon as she hears the news, Lane puts an investigation into the deaths of two drug-dealers on hold and leaps to her bosss defence - risking her career in the process. Jack Shepherd and Helen Masters star

programme.title: Agatha Christies Poirot
programme.desc: A well-known eccentric contacts the Belgian sleuth when he is haunted by suicidal nightmares. However, he fails to follow Poirots advice, and is found dead soon afterwards. Drama, starring David Suchet, with Joely Richardson and Mary Tamm

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick and Kate investigate possible arson attacks on barns in the area, while a wandering horse and a stray salmon add to the problems in Aidensfield. Rural drama, starring Nick Berry and Bill Maynard

programme.title: Vigil
programme.desc: The submarine is left exposed by a reactor shutdown, and the crew races to repair the fault. Kirsten uncovers a feud on board the Vigil, leading Amy to question whether her investigation has been deliberately obstructed. A hard-won breakthrough leads Amy to believe she finally has the killer in her sights, only for surprising new evidence to cast doubt on her theory. On land, Kirstens investigation leads to tragedy

programme.title: Prime Suspect
programme.desc: Part one of two. Tough Superintendent Jane Tennison is transferred to the Manchester police force, where her uncompromising methods soon create a stir among her more conventionally minded colleagues. Called on to investigate the murder of a local drug dealer, she is unconvinced by an all-too-convenient confession from a 14-year-old possible suspect and decides to pursue her own line of inquiry _ homing in on the victims former boss, a drugs kingpin known only as The Street. Helen Mirren, John McArdle and Steven Mackintosh star

programme.title: The Body in the Lake
programme.desc: Unhappily married art teacher Dani Oxley starts an affair with colleague Jimmy while they are supervising a school trip to an adventure centre. After leaving her students unattended to meet Jimmy in a boathouse, Dani gets back to find one of her charges is missing. Drama, starring Kara Tointon and Will Mellor

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Barrister Robert Rinder examines the case of Edith Negus from Bridlington, East Yorkshire. Edith died in October 2014 at the age of 102, but it was only after her death that her family discovered she was conned out of nearly £290,000 by Julie Sayles, her carer. Sayles bought two houses with money she took from a bank account she shared with Edith, and after being found out, was jailed for nine years in June 2017

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An old friend of Merton is sent from CID to help track down a bank robber, and he agrees to be best man at the wedding, while Jennys disgraced brother Steve tries to patch things up with his sister before she ties the knot. Events conspire to jeopardise the special day and stop the happy couple making it to the church on time. Duncan Bell, Sarah Tansey, Mark Jordon and Tricia Penrose star

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Ventress goes in search of a bogus water board official who has been robbing the elderly, but ends up investigating a suspicious death linked to one of the burglaries. Meanwhile, Blaketon seeks to rectify a miscarriage of justice by reviving a pre-war darts tournament between the Aidensfield Arms and the White Lion, and Gina begins to get cold feet about her impending marriage to Phil. Rural drama, starring Derek Fowlds and William Simons

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Jenny and Dennis are forced to cut short their honeymoon in Spain, and Gina grows increasingly unhappy at the thought of having to give up her job as pub licensee to marry a policeman. Ventress creates a bad impression at the station, and a crooked travel agent finds a way of cashing in on local holiday-makers absence, while Vernon organises a Bentley owners rally at the hall. Sarah Tansey and Duncan Bell star

programme.title: Agatha Christies Poirot
programme.desc: An actress engaged to marry a foreign prince becomes the polices number one suspect in the murder of a shady producer. Desperate to ensure she escapes prosecution, her wealthy fiance asks Poirot to catch the real killer. Unfortunately, the celebrated detective ends up concluding she has lied - or is an accomplice. David Suchet stars, with Niamh Cusack, Abigail Cruttenden and Sean Pertwee

programme.title: Agatha Christies Poirot
programme.desc: A well-known eccentric contacts the Belgian sleuth when he is haunted by suicidal nightmares. However, he fails to follow Poirots advice, and is found dead soon afterwards. Drama, starring David Suchet, with Joely Richardson and Mary Tamm

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Bear finds himself getting into further trouble, while Cain feels he is at the end of his tether and Arthur is fearful.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah betrays Jacobs trust, while Jai and Kerry enjoy working together and the truth about Laurels fall might finally be revealed

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah accuses Cain of being a coward, while Gabby has her suspicions raised and Kerry taunts Jai in public

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Cain comes under severe pressure, while Graham advises him to sell up. There is a near miss for Jai and Kerry

programme.title: Paul OGrady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: The comedian follows the work of Battersea Dogs and Cats Home in London, meeting staff involved in treating, training and rehoming animals. This time, Paul meets a pair of shih tzus from a puppy farm that need to learn all about domestic life, and an American bulldog struggling to cope without its owner. Later, he is introduced to a stray that has been living at Battersea for two years

programme.title: Paul OGrady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: Paul meets more dogs struggling to find a home, including a golden retriever with an incontinence problem and a boisterous border collie with a bad hip - who needs Pauls help in the hydrotherapy centre. He also calls in on a tiny pregnant mongrel, and spends time with an OAP Patterdale who just needs a bit of company in her twilight years

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The leader of a censorship campaign comes to Oxford on a speaking tour, and Morse is charged with protecting her in light of a series of death threats. A bricklayer working on a controversial pop singers house is later found dead, and when a second killing occurs, a connection emerges to the speakers movement, plunging Morse into the middle of a conflict over the nature of British culture

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help Joselyn Taylor, who has been searching for her elder brother James to find out why she was put in a childrens home at two weeks old. James in turn has also been searching for the father he never knew and had only been able to dream about

programme.title: Titanic
programme.desc: The story returns to the beginning, to the Belfast shipyard where political strife interferes with the Titanics construction, prompting the designer to offer electrical engineer Jim Maloney steerage passage on the liner - if he and his team can finish the wiring on time. A month later, as the passengers board, Jim meets a mysterious passenger who unsettles his wife, while in second class, Muriel Batley bitterly resents her husband Johns fawning to the Earl and reveals she knows a secret about his employer. But their worries are overshadowed by a looming iceberg and a chaotic scramble for the lifeboats. Drama, starring Toby Jones, Maria Doyle Kennedy and Peter McDonald

programme.title: Hotel Benidorm: Fun-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: With the Benidorm Plaza full to bursting, and housekeeping pushed to their limits, the clock is ticking as bride-to-be Hannah and her hen party are keen to check into their rooms to get the party started. Meanwhile, restaurant manager Pepe is challenged by new hotel manager Angel to revamp his weekly Gala Dinner

programme.title: Alex Polizzi: My Hotel Nightmare
programme.desc: For the last 15 years, Alex Polizzi has spent her career telling people how to run a hotel. Now shes putting her money where her mouth is - as she attempts to open one of her own. For years she helped run her mother Olgas two luxury hotels. Now for the first time theyve gone into business together as equal partners. In 2019 they bought a 37-bedroom medieval coaching inn in east Sussex in need of a total overhaul. But what should have been a six-month project soon becomes an 18-month struggle. Olga and Alex are forced to deal with spiralling costs, building challenges and a global pandemic

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: A chilling event at the Royal Edward hotel on the night of Assistant Chief Constable Alison Vospers leaving do forces Grace and Branson into a difficult position. They must investigate all guests, including high ranking East Sussex police attendees. Something about the incident is causing a deep unease in Grace - he knows hes seen this before. Has a sinister offender from the crime busters past resurfaced or is this a copycat? Return of the crime drama based on the books by Peter James, starring John Simm

programme.title: Weekend at Bernies II (1993)
programme.desc: The two aspiring accountants return for another round of comic mayhem with the corpse of their murdered playboy boss, this time attempting to clear themselves of an embezzling charge - only to end up racing against the Mafia to locate a stash of cash. Unfortunately, this so-called comedy is deeply disappointing, and even die-hard fans of the original wont find much to laugh about here. Andrew McCarthy and Jonathan Silverman star, alongside Barry Bostwick and Troy Beyer

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: After a volatile six-year relationship with on/off boyfriend Anthony Riley, 22-year-old Adele Bellis finally called time on their romance. Barrister Robert Rinder examines the case that took a dramatic turn in August 2014, when Riley set about ensuring Adeles life would never be the same again

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules
programme.desc: In the first part of the reunion, Raquel and James make a jaw-dropping announcement that shakes their friends to the core, while Sandoval and Katie clash over their control issues

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules
programme.desc: The reunion comes to an electrifying conclusion as Brock and Scheana defend their plan to get married during James and Raquels engagement weekend

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The history of pioneering modern-day mega structures, revealing that behind every seemingly impossible marvel of modern engineering is a cast of historic trailblazers who designed new building techniques, took risks on untested materials and revolutionised their field

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Justin from Manchester, Reanna from Liverpool, Nicola from Nottingham and Matthew from Leeds pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Sam from Telford, Lucie from Surrey, Betty from Hayling Island and Gary from Leeds pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. programme.title: Jann
programme.desc: After months without a manager, Jann realses she needs to take control of both her life and career, and decides to hire a personal assistant, so she sits in on her sisters nanny interviews to poach the best assistant for herself. Comedy, starring singer-songwriter Jann Arden

programme.title: Jann
programme.desc: When Janns record label refuses to help her make a new album, she vows to find another way. Canadian comedy series, starring singer-songwriter Jann Arden

programme.title: Riddiculous
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Ranvir Singh in which Victoria and Luca, Hayley and Conor and Ola and Luke take on Riddlemaster Henry Lewis. They attempt to answer general knowledge questions and confusing conundrums. Only one team will make it through to the high-stakes final with the chance of winning a cash prize

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: Michael Jackson impersonator Mitch, bar manager Aiden and student JJ try to impress Becky, a student from Leeds, with their outfit choices

programme.title: How to Lose Weight Well
programme.desc: Xand van Tulleken and Helen Lawal oversee proceedings as three more pairs road test some of the most popular and talked about diets. Sade and Becky have two weeks to slim down for a day at the races, Derek and Bruce go on four-week dieting plans ahead of a summer barbecue, and Sam and Fay want to slim down for their annual bus drivers picnic in four months. Xand also investigates the latest liposuction techniques and finds out if unconscious persuasion can melt away peoples fat

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade responds to reports from one of the US east coasts most popular vacation destinations, the sunny Florida Keys. A creature is attacking both visitors and locals alike, striking its victims so violently it is slicing open flesh and even smashing bones, and the assaults are happening both above and below the water. Jeremy is determined to discover the identity of the assailant and uncover what is triggering these attacks. He knows it is not going to be easy, and it is not long before the intrepid marine biologist fears he may be out of his depth

programme.title: Harbour Cops
